body:
We're about to hand control of the Senate to Mitch McConnell
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73654770/439207257/-2054302023?&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4605-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNTA0YmI2Zi0zODg3LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EBXthUxFzSP-noaAXHx6-JEWne25_FqP0RXEgw76PIQ=)
Friend, it's Gov. Gavin Newsom. I'm fighting every day to win progress for families here in California. But to move our entire country forward and defeat the GOP extremists who are pushing us backward, we _need_ a strong Democratic majority in the Senate.
The truth is, I'm seriously concerned that we're about to hand control of the Senate to Mitch McConnell. **That's why I'm reaching out today to personally ask you to make a donation to help my friend Kirsten Gillibrand defend her must-win Senate seat. [_Please, will you donate now to help Kirsten save our Senate majority?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73654771/439207258/-2054302023?&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4605-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNTA0YmI2Zi0zODg3LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EBXthUxFzSP-noaAXHx6-JEWne25_FqP0RXEgw76PIQ=)**
If you've read almost anything about the 2024 elections, you know that Senate Democrats are facing an uphill battle.
**We have to defend a massive 23 seats across the country next fall — nearly half of the entire Democratic caucus._Republicans, on the other hand, only have to defend 11._** Our resources are going to be spread incredibly thin. That alone puts us at a massive fundraising disadvantage — not to mention the GOP's army of megadonors waiting in the wings. It's no wonder why election experts have called the Senate map a "GOP dream."
Listen, if Republicans retake power, everything that we care about will be at risk. We already know that key leaders within the GOP want to ban abortion nationwide, cut Social Security and Medicare, undo critical gun safety reforms, give ultra-wealthy Americans another massive tax break, and weaken our democracy even further. _And that's only what they've admitted out loud._
We simply cannot afford to let the GOP gain control of the Senate. But Kirsten is facing a tough battle. **Some might think New York is a safe blue state, but last year, Republicans nearly flipped the governorship in a damaging red wave. Now, following their best election cycle in decades, Republicans have their sights set on Kirsten's vital Senate seat.**
Friend, Kirsten isn't just my friend — she's a relentless leader for progress. We need her voice in the Senate.**And if she loses, it could hand control of the Senate to Mitch McConnell.** **[_So please, will you rush a donation right now to power Kirsten's grassroots campaign and defend our Democratic Senate majority? I'm really counting on your support here._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73654772/439207259/-2054302023?&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4605-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNTA0YmI2Zi0zODg3LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EBXthUxFzSP-noaAXHx6-JEWne25_FqP0RXEgw76PIQ=)**

name: Mike Rogers
subject: closing down the candy store
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rogers for Senate
body:
I know double-dealing politicians when I see them. | | |
---
[](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=8aa13260bd1a499790a3545d2ccca311&_e=y2VxEIaNpjrQW_FPO0c-ccEW6egURhUnfhgx8HQ6hV3TNR9fEAeJ5Bdj8pi0EHMK9e9nS4tIRA4uSHdOm3lfhGLyMv-W71OBN-mbvYIaZ3Cd35jUupl9sI3Rqpe9s_bqcRqUNJTrELGY9M9w0fWY9j7DKTghoxHwXwvYwFB6n_YqUYvimxf83Hy6tCImDTOkwLUk-B6jMTK2dP3uUFKHSMcfEtHfJf_NUbHIxtLHzk4OnRih2kiWbB9AvL00LweWFXV6SLEZTVdnSe9TMpPOfeyfq87w0mvSZDdAOob7P-TjOkGTVc7cCkQo9Exk6KX2AHn01WhWU6NDANlsVK7olRKMQyUzh6Bd5y6T-uHofFngy00OFY2zgL741ku0zQxhPy2ryt6sfzbBz64d-r12fNmrjp6xW45YiXpdjc0Huuw%3D)
---
Friend, In the early 1990s, I was part of the FBI team that uncovered an unbelievably brazen racketeering scheme in the town of Cicero, just outside Chicago. Long story short: Cicero’s mayor siphoned millions in taxpayer funds to mobsters. Upon officially busting the scheme, the special agent-in-charge declared, “...the Cicero candy store is closed." Let me tell you, Friend: it felt good to close up that candy shop. After years on the case, I was immersed in the deep-seated corruption, neglect, and selfishness of these white-collar criminals who were elected to be nobly representing the people in their town. So suffice it to say I know double-dealing politicians when I see them. **[Friend: This is why I’m running for Senate in Michigan. I am sick and tired of watching from the sidelines as career politicians exploit the very people they were elected to represent. I am ready to get back into the action, uncover the corruption, and close down the candy store that’s been robbing Americans of their livelihoods.](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=8aa13260bd1a499790a3545d2ccca311&_e=y2VxEIaNpjrQW_FPO0c-ccEW6egURhUnfhgx8HQ6hV3TNR9fEAeJ5Bdj8pi0EHMK9e9nS4tIRA4uSHdOm3lfhGLyMv-W71OBN-mbvYIaZ3Cd35jUupl9sI3Rqpe9s_bqcRqUNJTrELGY9M9w0fWY9j7DKTghoxHwXwvYwFB6n_YqUYvimxf83Hy6tCImDTOkwLUk-B6jMTK2dP3uUFKHSMcfEtHfJf_NUbHIxtLHzk4OnRih2kiWbB9AvL00LweWFXV6SLEZTVdnSe9TMpPOfRoDDafz1YD1YWNHvngJLkwFry-N9YA3gVG_f2dV-yxxo9wPcOIaOgu0xksD58obJWRuhQ-Sg92BqkTMn7XzKoApAxrZV3rsFQGxwyksR-MNxgRxFCckrZUjj32hHr8BbC7NLNbO1QTTM70YVka0hSQ%3D)** I ask that you’ll help me get to Washington to do just that.
---
[**JOIN THE FIGHT**](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=8aa13260bd1a499790a3545d2ccca311&_e=y2VxEIaNpjrQW_FPO0c-ccEW6egURhUnfhgx8HQ6hV3TNR9fEAeJ5Bdj8pi0EHMK9e9nS4tIRA4uSHdOm3lfhGLyMv-W71OBN-mbvYIaZ3Cd35jUupl9sI3Rqpe9s_bqcRqUNJTrELGY9M9w0fWY9j7DKTghoxHwXwvYwFB6n_YqUYvimxf83Hy6tCImDTOkwLUk-B6jMTK2dP3uUFKHSMcfEtHfJf_NUbHIxtLHzk4OnRih2kiWbB9AvL00LweWFXV6SLEZTVdnSe9TMpPOfbDIfSa7_YXgTbmWNyHex3XZ6eBHga3UyHkff6XLQbi-VdyHxqyODC9gCkVrhTd3lu2I5Hi6bXpG9x5pW6pzIrtFqmCK1IrZ30eOMZVJrmsYYp8nqgb8yrSlu09v-xLJdTSkjOcfG0zyzVxjDwW8bSE%3D)

| The fate of our Democratic majority could come down to Wisconsin.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=1562%2E35263%2Em2U_gH)
Peter, headlines like this one are exactly why we can’t slow down — not even for a second — in our fight to defend Wisconsin and hold the Senate: **2024 Looking 'Bleak' for Senate Democrats**
_— Newsmax_ Republicans were already dead set on unseating Tammy Baldwin and flipping Wisconsin red to take back the Senate, but the stakes are _even higher_ after Democratic Senator Joe Manchin announced he’s not running for reelection in deep-red West Virginia. Now, the GOP only needs to flip ONE SEAT to win the majority — **making Tammy a critical target on their list.** That’s why we’ve been doing everything we can to collect the resources necessary to defend this seat, _especially after the Senate Republicans’ campaign arm recently announced a five-figure digital ad buy attacking Tammy._ But the odds are stacked against us in our fight to keep the Senate blue, and the fate of our majority could all come down to what happens here in Wisconsin. **[Peter, if you knew that pitching in as little as $5 today could give our campaign a significant advantage in the fight to keep the Senate majority out of the GOP’s hands, wouldn’t you chip in immediately? clean_body: | Peter, remember in September, when we created the first-ever Office of Gun Violence Prevention? Just last week, GOP leaders tried to get rid of it. Yes, you read that right, they intentionally tried to remove an office dedicated to reducing gun violence. To saving lives. They failed , but that won’t stop the gun lobby. WE have to do that. The Congressional GOP and the gun lobby have proven they’re more interested in keeping their weapons of war than saving lives. Why? Guns make them more money than safety does. It’s sickening, Peter. So here’s where you come in: I need your help to take on the millions in gun lobby money intended to stop us from making progress on gun violence prevention. ~~ Let’s be honest about why all these attacks keep coming, Peter. It’s because Congressional Republicans are in the pocket of the NRA. These extremist GOP leaders will do whatever it takes to keep the NRA happy, even if it means making our communities less safe. But I refuse to stand back and let them endanger my neighbors for an extra buck. I’m ready to keep fighting for gun safety laws, but I need your help. We are up against millions in pro-gun special interest, which means your grassroots support is even more important. ~~ | | | ~~ ~~ | ~~ ~ | ~ In this fight together, Rep. Maxwell Frost ~~ ~ | PAID FOR BY MAXWELL FROST FOR CONGRESS Maxwell Frost for Congress PO Box 772671 Orlando, FL 32877-2671 United States | Maxwell is an organizer representing Florida's 10th Congressional District in Congress. Friend,
How would you like to close out the year with your favorite President and celebrate the coming 2024 year, in which we win back the White House and Make America Great Again?

name: Team Schiff
subject: There’s still time to catch up
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| With less than 4 months until the primary election, it is no exaggeration to say that Adam’s potential to win this race depends on grassroots supporters like you chipping in to help us get ahead of our fundraising goals and reach the voters we need for Adam to win.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=4487%2E5257348%2EqN3vGG)
We have an important fundraising update, Derek:
We’re pacing behind our goal for the month: at this point, we should be around 65% of the way to our online fundraising total, **but we’re only 51% of the way there.**
**[Can you add a contribution of $3 or any amount to help us get back on track to hit Adam’s fundraising goal?](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=nov2023_abs_em.uaqk5d&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20231119_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=3&t=4&akid=4487%2E5257348%2EqN3vGG)**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
| [EXPRESS DONATE $3](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=nov2023_abs_em.5RW9ow&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20231119_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=3&t=5&akid=4487%2E5257348%2EqN3vGG)

---

---
| [EXPRESS DONATE $100](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=nov2023_abs_em.5RW9ow&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20231119_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=100&t=9&akid=4487%2E5257348%2EqN3vGG)
---
[ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=nov2023_abs_em.uaqk5d&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20231119_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=10&akid=4487%2E5257348%2EqN3vGG)
---
This is not the news we wanted to share — especially now. We only have a month and a half until our final FEC deadline of the year, and less than four months until the California primary on March 5.
Donald Trump and his MAGA cronies have been using every dirty trick in the book to undermine Adam’s campaign.
If they see our momentum has declined in our next FEC report, they’ll think their attacks are working and won’t hesitate to throw even more Adam’s way.
**_We can’t let that happen._** But the good news is, there’s still time to catch up.
With less than 4 months until the primary election, it is no exaggeration to say that Adam’s potential to win this race depends on grassroots supporters like you chipping in to help us get ahead of our fundraising goals and reach the voters we need for Adam to win.
If 20% of the people reading this email chipped in a donation today, we would get back on track in no time. So we’re asking:
**[Can you help us catch up by chipping in $3? Adam doesn’t take a dime from corporate PACs, so we’re counting on you to step up today.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=nov2023_abs_em.uaqk5d&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20231119_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=3&t=11&akid=4487%2E5257348%2EqN3vGG)**

Thank you,
Team Schiff

---
| []() | [Listen, Jamie Raskin just made an AMAZING call to action to ABOLISH the Electoral College — and he needs 10,000 Democrats to stand with him RIGHT NOW and sign our urgent petition. Sign on now to abolish the Electoral College »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/POLL20230608_EC?source=FFR_20231119_EMPET_E4_T0_AC_RS&t=7&akid=20430%2E4449941%2ELT722s)
---
Look, Jamie Raskin is 100% right — the Electoral College is eroding our Democracy election by election!

_**Donald Trump would NEVER have been President if it wasn’t for the Electoral College.**_

Republicans have only won the popular vote ONCE since 1988.

_But they’ve won the Presidency three times during that period thanks to the Electoral College – it’s SO UNFAIR and COMPLETELY undemocratic!!_

**[_So we’re launching a MASSIVE petition to stand with Jamie Raskin & demand Congress to pass a Constitutional Amendment to ABOLISH the Electoral College IMMEDIATELY! Add your name right away!_](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/POLL20230608_EC?source=FFR_20231119_EMPET_E4_T0_AC_RS&t=8&akid=20430%2E4449941%2ELT722s)**

name: Martin Heinrich
subject: Become a citizen co-sponsor of the Puerto Rico Status Act
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate
body:
Puerto Ricans deserve the same fundamental rights the rest of us enjoy, and the ability to determine their future. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73656226/439240170/-272948131?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20231119_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNzZkY2NjYy00ODg3LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jOYa7u1TTvdSUy4bMT1TI_14zUq3ZfM2Wt5yQkr4Sr0=&emci=b46dcccc-4887-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=b76dcccc-4887-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=252045)
---
For over 100 years, Puerto Ricans have been American citizens without the full benefits of American citizenship. They deserve the same fundamental rights the rest of us enjoy, and the ability to determine their future. **[That’s why I recently introduced the _Puerto Rico Status Act_ to establish a process for Puerto Ricans to determine their own political status. Will you add your name next to mine as a citizen co-sponsor?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73656227/439240171/579915883?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20231119_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNzZkY2NjYy00ODg3LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jOYa7u1TTvdSUy4bMT1TI_14zUq3ZfM2Wt5yQkr4Sr0=&emci=b46dcccc-4887-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=b76dcccc-4887-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=252045)** | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73656228/439240172/579915883?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20231119_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNzZkY2NjYy00ODg3LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jOYa7u1TTvdSUy4bMT1TI_14zUq3ZfM2Wt5yQkr4Sr0=&emci=b46dcccc-4887-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=b76dcccc-4887-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=252045)
---
Despite being citizens, Puerto Rico’s status as a territory means the more than 3 million residents cannot vote for the president of the United States, have voting power in Congress, or have access to federal resources like the Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program.
The _Puerto Rico Status Act_ would authorize a federally sponsored referendum to resolve Puerto Rico’s current political status and ensure Puerto Ricans can decide whether they would like independence, sovereignty in free association with the United States, or statehood.
**[If you agree that Puerto Ricans deserve the right to self-determination, please sign on as a citizen co-sponsor of the _Puerto Rico Status Act_ today >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73656229/439240173/579915883?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20231119_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNzZkY2NjYy00ODg3LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jOYa7u1TTvdSUy4bMT1TI_14zUq3ZfM2Wt5yQkr4Sr0=&emci=b46dcccc-4887-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=b76dcccc-4887-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=252045)**

clean_body: Puerto Ricans deserve the same fundamental rights the rest of us enjoy, and the ability to determine their future. For over 100 years, Puerto Ricans have been American citizens without the full benefits of American citizenship. They deserve the same fundamental rights the rest of us enjoy, and the ability to determine their future. | Despite being citizens, Puerto Rico’s status as a territory means the more than 3 million residents cannot vote for the president of the United States, have voting power in Congress, or have access to federal resources like the Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program. The Puerto Rico Status Act would authorize a federally sponsored referendum to resolve Puerto Rico’s current political status and ensure Puerto Ricans can decide whether they would like independence, sovereignty in free association with the United States, or statehood. Thank you for making your voice heard. — Martin | Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate Senator Martin Heinrich is committed to helping New Mexico become a leader in defense, tech, and energy with opportunities in every corner. body:
A year ago, the House passed an assault weapons ban, but Republicans in the Senate stopped its passage.

| Peter,

It’s David Hogg. A year ago, the House passed an assault weapons ban, but Republicans in the Senate stopped its passage.

I’m all too familiar with the deadly effects of assault-style weapons. It’s the same type of weapon that a former classmate used when he entered my school, Marjory Stoneman Douglas, and killed my classmates.

_No one, especially not teenagers, should be able to access assault weapons._

**These weapons of war don’t belong in our schools or on our streets.

[_That’s why I’m joining Stop Gun Violence PAC and Leaders We Deserve in calling for Congress to immediately pass an assault weapons ban. Will you add your name to our petition and join us?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73656316/439240550/-418349734?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQ0NTkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDU2Y2FkMTQtNGU4Ny1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ozJKNyilw9psF8JcKxEPNdIK--DMbPMPIN4q5-J08yI=&emci=ac0c537b-7585-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=056cad14-4e87-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=7937656)**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Shawnna=20Bolick?=
subject: Freedom of Speech Under Attack
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTE BOLICK
body:
| | |
---
| | Dear Freedom Fighters,

We all know free speech is under attack-- even more so on our college campuses. As a mother of two college-aged students, I continue to take a pulse of what is taking place. When my kids discuss their college experience, their day at their university is becoming much different than the one I had. When I was appointed to the Senate earlier this summer, leadership asked me to serve as a member on the Senate Education Committee. During the interim, I have been getting caught up to speed on what some of my colleagues are [**discussing**](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=14d51444e4&e=a7ab36849c) when it comes to our higher education institutions and what it means for freedom of expression on our college campuses. Their next committee will take place on November 27th. Stay tuned.

As you may recall, in early February of this year several of ASU's Barrett Honors College (BHC) professors were quite upset over a [**T.W. Lewis Center for Personal Development event**](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=a5e8701c68&e=a7ab36849c) focused on health, wealth and happiness because they didn't get to provide input ahead of the event. After 30 of ASU's BHC professors circulated a [**letter**](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=ac09c28d9d&e=a7ab36849c) [**to push back against this event**](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=3962da9cb0&e=a7ab36849c) , many BHC students have shared they don't want to speak up in class because they are worried these professors will not give them decent grades or they feel like they will be singled out for not agreeing with their professor's ideology. I had a chance to read some of the students' feedback about their BHC professors surrounding this event and some of these same college students said they feel less inclined to fully participate in their in-class discussions due to their professor's bias and potential retribution. What happened to civil discourse?

As a taxpayer I was appalled reading how certain BHC professors misused their classroom instruction time not teaching their approved curriculum for their classes, but using their classrooms as their personal pulpit to inflict their ideology onto college students caught in the crossfire of hurt feelings. To graduate with a degree from the BHC, these students are required to take required human event classes to graduate so there is no escaping these classes. If the behavior of these professors continue, it will ultimately devalue these student’s BHC degrees. My son attended the February event and helped bring some of his colleagues to this event. Later, he said it wasn’t a politically oriented event. After all, I have brought my kids to tea party meetings and rallies since 2009 across our state and country so he knows the difference. My son told me the speakers offered ways to unplug from social media to further their well-being while staying connected with their family. Not sure why the professors who co-signed this letter threw such a hissy fit.

University professors espouse democracy and the need for free speech, but when they don’t agree with certain types of speech, they lean on the hallmarks of cancel culture to close the door on expanding different viewpoints. Nowadays it is more important than ever to speak up and defend free speech. Today’s college campus is nothing like the ones from even the 90s. I remember civil protests while I attended both Syracuse University and American University. Even former U.S. Senator Daniel Patrick Moynihan would roll in his grave if he witnessed the decline taking place on his Alma Mater’s campus today.

Our liberties, such as free speech are on the line. Safe spaces are nothing more than an oxymoron. Will our university presidents take a stand for freedom of speech, or will they continue to cave to the woke mob infiltrating college student’s young minds? Speech is constitutionally protected. Yet, today’s assault on free speech leads our future on an uncertain path. Instead of focusing on growing Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion initiatives in our higher education institutions, maybe it should be replaced with Discussion, Excellence, and Integrity? I look forward to working towards expanding our first amendment rights as we battle for our American values. I returned to public life earlier this year because I wanted to protect our God-given constitutional rights and our educational freedom. Please join me as I was recruited back to be a check on Hobbs' radical agenda. I can't protect this Republic without your continued support!

For Arizona,
---
|
---
| Shawnna LM Bolick
---

body:
Just let me know by 11:59 P.M. TONIGHT. | | | If you’re up for it, I’d certainly love to meet you!

---

I’ll even fly you out for _FREE! _

_**All you have to do is enter to win before the submission deadline _TONIGHT at 11:59 P.M._**_

It's important for us to deliver results for the American people. Would you take a moment to complete my today? Your input is important to making sure we move America forward. I appreciate you taking the time to send me your input. | SPEAKER MIKE JOHNSON Speaker Johnson is a dedicated husband and father of four, as well as a constitutional law attorney who has devoted his life and career to fighting for the fundamental freedoms and traditional values that have always been a priority to the people of Louisiana. | PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

# ****
****This Silent Evil Force Is Eating Away at Your Retirement**** We are teetering on the brink of an economic meltdown that’s threatening to devour your savings and retirement. Inflation has surged to terrifying levels not seen in 40 years and the effects have been devastating. **Over** **two-thirds of Americans are grappling with financial hardship.** **You see it and feel it every day.** Prices have spiraled out of control, our money buys less and less, yet our monthly bills keep escalating. **And what’s worse is that our income can’t keep pace**. We have to tap into our savings and retirement which inflation has eroded. _[Request your free guide now to inflation-proof your IRA, 401(k) and pension savings.](http://mgmail.americanpatriotdaily.com/c/eJx00TuSpSoAANDVeEOLn3wCg9fV3ftAAQFFERDF1b-aySc_2VEjV4JB_tEjZAAQzsUgPnYUBGrDJZrMQCBVciCKTgNHmiKJJNcfNyKAMIQIQAIQAD3sB_EDuPj6Ij_0i4kBdQTIoJOb5R5lSe4oSrqt9fMRPttoS4kd_q9Dvx36LUnOa_8v_cfg36dsHf6Gp33gtdjbOJrbROtgUDCupDZn1x4djLQZQ7QePKi2XmE7t3gW409cQ21p5aA995TrI6lzAvKy1nqfVUsqD-Vmo5rbXmX1kB56pLycysMUX7CG1Ci5ODDu4Btg_pwVjeC0pzyuRPhLwr6CoOL-LnSbEz0Ar0IBl4hWk-RxfZUxOxnMHFxjFq35TPyKc724ZU4_ZU-vbSWqqgCsVIgiPAuZwUvO63I_Cko4DF57q89ISmvoQOyy2TZ5WsbUEacgkBfAT_gRtkNUO9vh7_UNfM_F05iCZ5N9Wfa17i2fDE9ysZ8w0gEBjDn4pFHF222by5R1BCxBuu3vVxmfPhMtD9BDLGJ_7372d38HOBjZ2z1yMPV82y_fG0YU7qG_8P8BAAD__1j2zbA)_ Now, with central bankers indicating more interest rate hikes in 2023 and 2024, **our traditional investments in stocks and bonds are in jeopardy of plummeting even further.** **It’s so bad that renowned investors are jumping ship.** _Paul Tudor Jones_ , the renowned billionaire hedge-fund manager who accurately predicted the 1987 stock market crash, predicts a 12% stock market decline. _Jeremy Grantham_ , the chief investment strategist who predicted the dotcom crash in 2001, the Global Financial Crisis in 2008, and the tech bubble in 2021, predicts a recession lasting well into 2024 and “an accompanying decline in stock prices.” Even _Warren Buffet_ has sold off $33b of his stocks, piling up cash in advance of the predicted recession. **Whether you’re aged 45, 55, near retirement, or in retirement, doing nothing to _[protect your wealth](http://mgmail.americanpatriotdaily.com/c/eJx00TmSpioAAODT-IcW-xIYvK7uvgeICiKLggue_tVMPvmXfWYQRnIoPtMAOQBECEnlxw4UGq0RZ6PiEhrJmUKMQEolnJCikH_cgADCECIACUAA9LCn8gcI-fVFftgXlxR1BKgwHW5UMat6uFSNclvrxxQ-22BrzR3-r0O_Hfqthxp9_y_9x-Dfp24d_oa7feC52Ht2rDTNLjqjMLt6tLG49vh713siKrZqdH6qOvfEak6ktoQO-ebmnX8vHeN5czZHyze9hpGJQ0_-gAm9sm7vaSG2l1jiuEsRXnhf5ZJ2gW5ahYxjys7r2cuMAPInb4segSfLm_AIHh8mQvZmaDbmOtes4eaiFWG-bX7cXhQqFIfNlH3cZJE00Tvhirc2EZCoAICW2RZuGHw8WCKfZmL4Ox5OLkqh7Kfgn8y5C60mfRlxNcuAoOHa71NjzNQKbNyp7xCbnO3wt3-DiKWuLB9h5dq-vKzXFVvZOdZqsZ8wMIoAxgJ8jsHk222bK4x3BCxBue3vVx2evpBJJdBDLHN_x3Vc7_4OkM6qtzELoHuxxXPtZ04M7uF64v8DAAD__8Xvy9c)_ is not an option.** It’s a fool’s gambit. _[Protect what you have now. name: David Horowitz
subject: Barack Obama radically transformed our country
body:
I don’t say this to shock or scare you – I say it because it’s true.

| |
---
| | Fellow Patriot, America is on the brink of destruction. I don’t say this to shock or scare you – I say it because it’s true. _What we see today didn’t happen overnight. It’s the result of a movement that began with the Communist revolution in Russia and has been 100 years in the making..._ **...and Barack Obama hit the accelerator button, fast tracking their agenda.** I’d know better than most. When I was a young man, I was one of the leaders of the movement destroying America today. 50 years ago, I was a Marxist revolutionary bent on bringing America as we know it to an end. I stood side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited _Ramparts_ – radical Left's largest magazine. I marched, wrote manifestos, and attacked America whenever and however I could. Then the Panthers murdered my friend, and the Left helped the Communists win the war in Vietnam. My eyes opened to the incredible destruction and evil my “comrades” made possible. So I left and never looked back. I cast my 1984 ballot for Ronald Reagan – then I started the David Horowitz Freedom Center to fight the Left and I’ve dedicated the last 40 years to exposing them. Why? Because I knew first-hand the threat our country was facing. I knew what was at stake and I knew if I didn’t tell the American people what I knew, we would lose our country forever. That’s why I spent 6 months writing** _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_** – and I want you to have your very own copy of it. **[So I’m asking you to stand with me and make a generous, tax-deductible donation of $35 or more to my Freedom Center. As a thank you, I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zed5ltv4ql1vqgame2rrq4qnrbsd5v5o69d6p7lg_rp22sh2s8i6eo30c5jm1o30cjh2bs)** When you think of “the enemy within” you may think of Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi or even Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez...and you wouldn’t be wrong. But make no mistake: **The real mastermind is Barack Obama.** Barack Obama laid the groundwork for everything we’ve seen since 2020 back in 2008. Barack Obama led the destruction of our cities, cozying up to Black Lives Matter radicals and siding with criminals over police upholding the rule of law. Barack Obama championed the castration of our military, making us a laughingstock on the world stage. And Barack Obama was the true architect behind the bogus Russian collusion witch hunt. The devastation and destruction we see today has been over a decade in the making – but most of the American people have no clue what we’re up against. **That’s why I wrote _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_ to explain how communist and fascist Leftists infiltrated and overtook the Democrat Party...** ...how it has become a party of racism and hatred attacking the very foundations of our country... ... and how their ultimate goal is to create a one-party state – and cancel, deplatform and silence every last one of their political opponents by slandering them as “white supremacists” and worse. The reviews speak for themselves... “A Great Book” – Dinesh D’Souza “ _The Enemy Within_ is a book for all patriots who understand that our country is in a fight for its life.” – Mark Levin “David Horowitz does it again in a must-read for any American concerned about where we are headed as a nation.” Laura Ingraham I wrote _The Enemy Within_ because... I know if our country stands a chance, Americans must understand exactly how sinister and dangerous the new Democrat Party actually is. I was the enemy within — and I know in my bones what it will take to defeat them. We’ve reached the point in our history that will decide our future – and we either win these political battles or lose everything that makes us prosperous and free. **[That’s why I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within when you donate $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and give us the ammunition we need to expose the Left’s evil agenda to every American patriot.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zd719b3vrlkn2e4lnhrr8ds3dr74l09nc5e5io00_rp22sh2s8i6eo30c5jm1o30cjh2bs)** The Left is at war with America. They don’t simply disagree with us about how to make our country better – they want to destroy it to make way for their Marxist dystopia. Or in Obama’s own words “radically transform” America. **And they don’t care how much they have to lie, cheat or steal to achieve it.** So it’s up to patriots like you and me to expose the truth about the Left to our fellow Americans while we still can.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
---
David Horowitz
---
P.S. I know how we got to this point in our country, and I know how we get out. But the clock is ticking and our country is hanging by a thread. **[Please make a generous donation of $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and as a thank you, I’ll rush a complimentary copy of my book The Enemy Within to you.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zgreffb2mak3a1lulsr98jdu2q9lqskpinu4jklo_rp22sh2s8i6eo30c5jm1o30cjh2bs)**
---

---

Inflation has surged to terrifying levels not seen in 40 years and the effects have been devastating. Over two-thirds of Americans are grappling with financial hardship. You see it and feel it every day. Prices have spiraled out of control, our money buys less and less, yet our monthly bills keep escalating. And what 's worse is that our income can't keep pace. We have to tap into our savings and retirement which inflation has eroded. Now, with central bankers indicating more interest rate hikes in 2023 and 2024, our traditional investments in stocks and bonds are in jeopardy of plummeting even further. It 's so bad that renowned investors are jumping ship. Paul Tudor Jones , the renowned billionaire hedge-fund manager who accurately predicted the 1987 stock market crash, predicts a 12% stock market decline. Jeremy Grantham , the chief investment strategist who predicted the dotcom crash in 2001, the Global Financial Crisis in 2008, and the tech bubble in 2021, predicts a recession lasting well into 2024 and "an accompanying decline in stock prices." Even Warren Buffet has sold off $33b of his stocks, piling up cash in advance of the predicted recession. Whether you 're aged 45, 55, near retirement, or in retirement, doing nothing to is not an option. It's a fool's gambit. While we can't stop inflation or prevent interest rates from rising, we can protect our savings and retirement from the whims of the Fed and market volatility. Seize control of your financial future. subject: 2 DAYS LEFT - HELP GET VOTER ID on the BALLOT
body:
There's Still Time
| | | | THERE IS STILL TIME !
---
---
| | [Visit the VOTER ID Website to Download, Print and Sign the Petition](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001P6Pv7JL1oBbCRvHPGZLYKYlQx2hodSAy0WtMHYiwi-s0LxFSOLeFOIriV63Rdjr2NY4Z__-dK2eupZYXsf_cDu0n3Gz_MlJpcweXEhvQ0XRh2elcCXIfTsix9s23d506rVKmkuP8bs7OsT4X2GIXNRUE3Ni6sQCrYkqE15JS1PQnRJJmS84-1Rweqvwr5TKIxVfbreJ28CA=&c=66zUvAcOWHsPjgX6yp92VgNZe7K4A_Pl1K_7CnvukkZ6WAjeVpzHHA==&ch=1dsEeRtj2uBuna9JnUOenIdG7gupaNxeUQW4rBBAPNoIgfmAEyfq-g==)
---
|

Friends, We are down to the last TWO DAYS before all the signature sheets for the VOTER ID Petition are due.
If you believe Massachusetts Voters deserve the chance to decide whether a photo ID should be required when voting, won't you help get it on the ballot by signing the Petition? Please click on the website link above to [VISIT VOTER ID WEBSITE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001P6Pv7JL1oBbCRvHPGZLYKYlQx2hodSAy0WtMHYiwi-s0LxFSOLeFOIriV63Rdjr2NY4Z__-dK2eupZYXsf_cDu0n3Gz_MlJpcweXEhvQ0XRh2elcCXIfTsix9s23d506rVKmkuP8bs7OsT4X2GIXNRUE3Ni6sQCrYkqE15JS1PQnRJJmS84-1Rweqvwr5TKIxVfbreJ28CA=&c=66zUvAcOWHsPjgX6yp92VgNZe7K4A_Pl1K_7CnvukkZ6WAjeVpzHHA==&ch=1dsEeRtj2uBuna9JnUOenIdG7gupaNxeUQW4rBBAPNoIgfmAEyfq-g==)[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001P6Pv7JL1oBbCRvHPGZLYKYlQx2hodSAy0WtMHYiwi-s0LxFSOLeFOIriV63Rdjr2NY4Z__-dK2eupZYXsf_cDu0n3Gz_MlJpcweXEhvQ0XRh2elcCXIfTsix9s23d506rVKmkuP8bs7OsT4X2GIXNRUE3Ni6sQCrYkqE15JS1PQnRJJmS84-1Rweqvwr5TKIxVfbreJ28CA=&c=66zUvAcOWHsPjgX6yp92VgNZe7K4A_Pl1K_7CnvukkZ6WAjeVpzHHA==&ch=1dsEeRtj2uBuna9JnUOenIdG7gupaNxeUQW4rBBAPNoIgfmAEyfq-g==)to download, sign and print the petition instructions and the two-sided Petition. Follow the instructions and sign your name and print your street address. If you have family, friends & neighbors who are registered voters in your town encourage them to sign as well. Just one town per sheet please. Then just drop off the Petitions directly to your town or city clerks by noon on Wednesday Nov 22. Check with the town to make sure they're not closing early for the holiday, and make sure the clerk timestamps the Petition on receipt. Once the clerks certify the signatures on the Petitions, an authorized member of our team will pick them up. The proposed law would ask citizens to show a photo ID, or sign an affidavit attesting to identity, residence, and citizenship prior to voting. No one would be disenfranchised, and similar laws are already in 35 other states. Let's join them and increase confidence in our elections for everyone! Please help get this question on the ballot so the voters of Massachusetts can decide. Thank you for all you are doing to help!
Thank you, Caroline Colarusso All information can be found on the VOTER ID [Website to Download and Sign Petition](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001P6Pv7JL1oBbCRvHPGZLYKYlQx2hodSAy0WtMHYiwi-s0LxFSOLeFOIriV63Rdjr2NY4Z__-dK2eupZYXsf_cDu0n3Gz_MlJpcweXEhvQ0XRh2elcCXIfTsix9s23d506rVKmkuP8bs7OsT4X2GIXNRUE3Ni6sQCrYkqE15JS1PQnRJJmS84-1Rweqvwr5TKIxVfbreJ28CA=&c=66zUvAcOWHsPjgX6yp92VgNZe7K4A_Pl1K_7CnvukkZ6WAjeVpzHHA==&ch=1dsEeRtj2uBuna9JnUOenIdG7gupaNxeUQW4rBBAPNoIgfmAEyfq-g==)

name: Robertson For Congress
subject: Happy Thanksgiving!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Robertson for Congress](https://r20
body:
| | | |
---
# A Time To Be Grateful
by Mark Robertson, Candidate for Nevada's First Congressional District
---
This time of year prompts us to think of all we are thankful for. I'm grateful for freedom, family, and prosperity.
Freedom, granted by God, our creator, is a gift to us all. The government does not provide freedom. However, it can protect it. I'm grateful for the 30 years I served in the military, protecting freedom around the world. We must be vigilant against the government's encroaching on our freedom. I'm running for Congress to defend freedom by limiting the size and scope of government.
My greatest joy comes from my family. Lesly and I are grateful that each of our four children bought a home in our neighborhood. Our grandchildren can walk to our house. These four (and a half) grandchildren are my world! I'm motivated to run for Congress to make things better for them.
I'm so thankful that I'm an American. We live in the land of opportunity and prosperity - the greatest country in the world. Though we go through ups and downs, we still enjoy blessings of freedom and prosperity rarely experienced in the history of mankind. I will work hard to preserve and grow this prosperity.
Whatever you're grateful for, I hope this Thanksgiving is a special day for you and your family. As for me and my house, we are thankful for freedom, family, and prosperity.
---

---

clean_body: | | | | A Time To Be Grateful by Mark Robertson, Candidate for Nevada's First Congressional District This time of year prompts us to think of all we are thankful for. I'm grateful for freedom, family, and prosperity. Freedom, granted by God, our creator, is a gift to us all. The government does not provide freedom. However, it can protect it. I'm grateful for the 30 years I served in the military, protecting freedom around the world. We must be vigilant against the government's encroaching on our freedom. I'm running for Congress to defend freedom by limiting the size and scope of government. My greatest joy comes from my family. Lesly and I are grateful that each of our four children bought a home in our neighborhood. Our grandchildren can walk to our house. These four (and a half) grandchildren are my world! I'm motivated to run for Congress to make things better for them. I'm so thankful that I'm an American. We live in the land of opportunity and prosperity - the greatest country in the world. Though we go through ups and downs, we still enjoy blessings of freedom and prosperity rarely experienced in the history of mankind. I will work hard to preserve and grow this prosperity. Whatever you're grateful for, I hope this Thanksgiving is a special day for you and your family. As for me and my house, we are thankful for freedom, family, and prosperity. | == | == *Mark Robertson retired from the Army. Use of his rank does not imply endorsement by the U.S. Military.* | | | | | | | Robertson For Congress | PO Box 750433, Las Vegas, NV 89136 | | Sent by mailto:mark@robertsonforcongress.com

name: Ron DeSantis
subject: This is poison

body:
To view this email as a web page, go to the link below, or copy and paste it into your browser's address window.
https://view.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=a9ba318335373330fcf2ecfb50404d213a972e4057a365a1a4c318e9b44340176dc4a1f0489dd067b86c60f2eed2afa32a63fac8796f41278d9f0dc04ddb888857256fac7641a920d0ce79cc91673cc9

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=957407f00f72d00a7c489a43f8de165a3761f4c172fa4a14c6142fc35c581f54312dea6e95bea93bb9e2215663760e0b1381e2ab6586c7154544983e82625a20

Friend,

I never thought I'd have to make a statement on this.

I caught wind that our nation's youth are sympathizing with Osama Bin Laden's "Letter to America." In case you haven't heard about it, this letter essentially condemns our nation and tries to justify the 9/11 terrorist attack.

Let me be clear: there is NO justification for the American deaths suffered on September 11th, 2001.

Our youth are being brainwashed, and I wish that were a hyperbole. You're seeing it in real-time with the protests siding with Hamas around the country, and now you're seeing step #2 with bin Laden's letter.

Right now, our youth are being taught to sympathize with Osama bin Laden.

Please read that last sentence again.

We see a woke mind virus infecting the streets we walk on, the news we watch, the books we read, and the schools we send our children to. From Disney cartoons to corporations funneling money into ESG mandates, to now terrorist propaganda... I cannot believe this is where our country is at right now.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=957407f00f72d00a7c489a43f8de165a3761f4c172fa4a14c6142fc35c581f54312dea6e95bea93bb9e2215663760e0b1381e2ab6586c7154544983e82625a20
I am disgusted. And I am fighting back with everything I have. Are you?

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=957407f00f72d00a7c489a43f8de165a3761f4c172fa4a14c6142fc35c581f54312dea6e95bea93bb9e2215663760e0b1381e2ab6586c7154544983e82625a20
RUSH IN A DONATION TO FIGHT BACK

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=957407f00f72d00ac649719b6bc96ffb06248e69924c12356da95211283c20f8fd63fbf775338ec59febc83830532867383780a252a2c0c9410d3a4ea70736f5

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=957407f00f72d00a80650b8f992d07fc036b834e02bec7f85c946b62f566e3728ea289ed85e68fbec5fe25f085452655bc51464f3140076ea29f381a6c37d4ae
Donate $45

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=957407f00f72d00ace5f24784a3139320915375e3843a685bf31676c0a55f1840cca9df48ef30807a5c03abe5f40c3db8a75d1b5b32f6501803c7bb93a640667
Donate $65

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=957407f00f72d00adf04ea6d5195d3c3c35844692745ba9cd56cb6bc85592537ac44aa7c1af2787def0cbf5d3ecdf91b67de9a0bb7d667810b19508245ef414a
Donate $100

Next year's election is becoming more important every day. It's not just our economy, international sovereignty, or border that's the problem. It's the poison they're teaching our youth. It's our very existence.

I volunteered to serve in our US military to fight for freedom after 9/11 because freedom hung in the balance. I'd be scared to hear the answer if you asked our youth who they would fight for.

Choose today to fight back. I need you; the children and future of America need you. I refuse to watch everything we have fought for go up in flames because of the destructive, infecting cries of the Left.

Please donate anything you can today. You will be making a difference.

Thank you,

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=957407f00f72d00a9adc0d5a8fcfc62ae339751ffd8ba7c2da2417b8abfc3000dcabaae58967d428c612235feed75f6a2b53c6984754c312f70876f6a1f03e8e

Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=957407f00f72d00a4ef1d435cf2ec104a49ed927dc50d2276c72216c711e486ff9dd65b87cc3392f28c7d15523cca33e26cffbc3d63679f0eb5a3d49fa07810c

🚨 ATTENTION 🚨

Our grassroots team drives our every success, and we know we ask a lot of you to help us win this critical election. As this race continues to heat up, we will be relying on our supporters to help us go the distance, and we want to make sure we respect your preferences when we reach out to you. here.

Volunteer!

We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for.

Help us lead our Great American Comeback by getting involved today!

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=957407f00f72d00a2f3e50d165eccd0fcc41ca07fb60bdf1601d496a9779017ebdf8cd1f28d8d886c7b69b89be8ca846a1328d533fc438bad1f28c72da18ca18
Sign up here!

Get to Know Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=957407f00f72d00a7c489a43f8de165a3761f4c172fa4a14c6142fc35c581f54312dea6e95bea93bb9e2215663760e0b1381e2ab6586c7154544983e82625a20

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=957407f00f72d00a7c489a43f8de165a3761f4c172fa4a14c6142fc35c581f54312dea6e95bea93bb9e2215663760e0b1381e2ab6586c7154544983e82625a20

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon.

That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now.

The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general).

Contribution rules

- I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
- This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
- I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
- I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

name: Maria Montero
subject: Reminder: Campaign Updates November 17!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MARIA MONTERO
body:
ICYMI
| | | |
---
---
| Maria's Community Champions
---
| | |
---|---
Earning the confidence and support of community members, leaders, and business people is what distinguishes Maria Montero--she reflects the people, values, and work ethic of the 7th Congressional District in Pennsylvania.

This week, we are pleased to share the support of Ty Poole, a trusted community leader and a small business owner in Carbon County. As the proprietor of Boatyard, a bar and restaurant in Lehighton, Ty is intricately involved in the community and connects with hundreds of customers and voters daily gaining insight on important community issues. With this grassroots knowledge, Ty is supporting Maria and is a strong advocate because it is clear she is the only option Republicans have in winning against Susan Wild in November 2024. Ty knows a strong candidate when he sees one. Maria will deliver votes in Allentown, Bethlehem, and Easton and bring us to victory. Maria is a conservative, a successful businesswoman, Spanish speaker, and reflects our district's values. Maria is a native of Carbon County in Summit Hill (her Irish roots go back generations) which makes her the hometown candidate. Carbon County is the only county in PA-7 that swept the courthouse and for the first time in modern history, has a full slate of Republican elected officials. Who better to motivate Carbon County voters to get out to the polls than their hometown girl!
---
| |
---
| Quantum Communications Roundtable
---
| On Wednesday, November 8th, the day after the general elections, conservative thought leaders regrouped at [Quantum Communications](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001rQUg9z4Zc66qFBpPEbVeQ_MqXHgTxmyuWvxvr3KnkAsbluDEMwtnNjuTvgtXaySw6CfbAmjSpiRR7GgFD_sPOx9w8sqLiYWpkdVxfVgrvnXTKSsQB8w76q-TCM8SG5K_0NtfKYk-xLR5uKT8ECrGjHSIemchcbeEXU-Wa-eWSmzVF8PJT9KP9RWfMiVt6FEEt4lxl52HvuFyGrpqCQtbskv3Ie4GJS7G5x3991bNlxitbZn84H797kHhq9cGNrR7dGJA5h-XrVTsXD7IOWrbKdXKISXHaGeOfeBIUHi8BzG1AS477yX1w4z0a7vuDk8PL62jQRyUouZV8A8n4dIvn_V1rjqk749h8zcQq_sjBitbn5YsN4A0OBn2df2NynjqflNdgW_nCSPQrMdmE39iMqX7gV55QoQ7vXIHqUDzEzo9YFA2nmq08PBDCsUtKECqaD8zUigNwaev_O-znKsD6clm2FJHkMS4&c=av7C-nokx-iaHYJRs_fllMPzkW5u3NcyZVn3NT965b1tno9Jb9l_fg==&ch=dEyFUkREbyLbgjUuvBaJweZZQ85WzyfuV8G7WPt-byEr7D93XyU-cA==)' monthly policy briefing. Charlie Gerow, the CEO of Quantum Comms, shared with the crowd his endorsement of Maria for U.S. Congress and she shared her path to victory in beating Susan Wild. Voters in PA-7 are laser focused on issues like making fuel and energy more affordable, strengthening the U.S. economy, safeguarding election integrity, securing our border, and supporting law enforcement. Maria knows Pennsylvania is the key to America's energy independence and vital in reducing the cost of energy for every American. Equally important, reducing taxes, demanding fair trade, and increasing U.S. manufacturing is the formula needed to jump start our economy. Further, election integrity is the hallmark of democracy and elected officials must be held accountable for voting issues like those occurring in Northampton County. Maria, as well, is committed to the safety of our community through securing our border and supporting our veterans and law enforcement. (Pictured below, Maria with Anne B. Anstine sisters at the policy briefing and Charlie Gerow and Maria out on the campaign trail.)
---
|
---
|
---
---
| |
---
| Around the District
---
|
---
|
---
| God Bless our veterans for their selfless service and love for our great country. Maria honored Veterans Day together with the many great women and men who selflessly served to protect our God-given rights. FREEDOM ISN'T FREE, and every generation must fight for it, like Mr. Schimmel who is 101 years young and a Pearl Harbor veteran.
---
|
---
|
---
---
| |
---
| Maria and local business leaders met in downtown Bethlehem with Dave McCormick who is running for U.S. Senate. They discussed border security, the fentanyl epidemic, and policies that protect our families, communities, and country. Dave is a West Point graduate, an Army Captain who served during the First Gulf War, and an entrepreneur.
---
|
---
|
---
---
| |
---
| A vital part of Maria's life is her faith which has sustained her through the hills and valleys of the journey of life. Starting the day at the Lehigh Valley Prayer Breakfast in thanksgiving with community leaders was quite a blessing.
---
|
---
|
---
| |
---
As always, your support is crucial to winning this race. To make contributions online please click the link below or mail checks payable to:
Friends of Maria Montero P.O. Box 1494 Easton, PA 18044
Sincerely,
Maria Montero Republican Congressional Candidate PA-7

clean_body: ICYMI | | | | | Maria's Community Champions | | | ---|--- Earning the confidence and support of community members, leaders, and business people is what distinguishes Maria Montero--she reflects the people, values, and work ethic of the 7th Congressional District in Pennsylvania. This week, we are pleased to share the support of Ty Poole, a trusted community leader and a small business owner in Carbon County. As the proprietor of Boatyard, a bar and restaurant in Lehighton, Ty is intricately involved in the community and connects with hundreds of customers and voters daily gaining insight on important community issues. With this grassroots knowledge, Ty is supporting Maria and is a strong advocate because it is clear she is the only option Republicans have in winning against Susan Wild in November 2024. Ty knows a strong candidate when he sees one. Maria will deliver votes in Allentown, Bethlehem, and Easton and bring us to victory. Maria is a conservative, a successful businesswoman, Spanish speaker, and reflects our district's values. Maria is a native of Carbon County in Summit Hill (her Irish roots go back generations) which makes her the hometown candidate. Carbon County is the only county in PA-7 that swept the courthouse and for the first time in modern history, has a full slate of Republican elected officials. Who better to motivate Carbon County voters to get out to the polls than their hometown girl! | | | Quantum Communications Roundtable | On Wednesday, November 8th, the day after the general elections, conservative thought leaders regrouped at ==' monthly policy briefing. Charlie Gerow, the CEO of Quantum Comms, shared with the crowd his endorsement of Maria for U.S. Congress and she shared her path to victory in beating Susan Wild. Voters in PA-7 are laser focused on issues like making fuel and energy more affordable, strengthening the U.S. economy, safeguarding election integrity, securing our border, and supporting law enforcement. Maria knows Pennsylvania is the key to America's energy independence and vital in reducing the cost of energy for every American. Equally important, reducing taxes, demanding fair trade, and increasing U.S. manufacturing is the formula needed to jump start our economy. Further, election integrity is the hallmark of democracy and elected officials must be held accountable for voting issues like those occurring in Northampton County. Maria, as well, is committed to the safety of our community through securing our border and supporting our veterans and law enforcement. (Pictured below, Maria with Anne B. Anstine sisters at the policy briefing and Charlie Gerow and Maria out on the campaign trail.) | | | | | Around the District | | | God Bless our veterans for their selfless service and love for our great country. Maria honored Veterans Day together with the many great women and men who selflessly served to protect our God-given rights. FREEDOM ISN'T FREE, and every generation must fight for it, like Mr. Schimmel who is 101 years young and a Pearl Harbor veteran. | | | | | Maria and local business leaders met in downtown Bethlehem with Dave McCormick who is running for U.S. Senate. They discussed border security, the fentanyl epidemic, and policies that protect our families, communities, and country. Dave is a West Point graduate, an Army Captain who served during the First Gulf War, and an entrepreneur. | | | | | A vital part of Maria's life is her faith which has sustained her through the hills and valleys of the journey of life. Starting the day at the Lehigh Valley Prayer Breakfast in thanksgiving with community leaders was quite a blessing. | | | | As always, your support is crucial to winning this race. To make contributions online please click the link below or mail checks payable to: Friends of Maria Montero P.O. Box 1494 Easton, PA 18044 Sincerely, Maria Montero Republican Congressional Candidate PA-7 | | == | == == | PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MARIA MONTERO | | | | | | | Friends of Maria Montero | PO Box 1494, Easton, PA 18044 | | Sent by mailto:info@mariamontero.org powered by

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: We’re running out of time to save polar bears and the arctic from the greedy fossil fuel industry
body:
| | | | | [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e_s17_main_cobrandedemail_c3)
---|---|---

| | **Dear Friend,** | **The Arctic is warming 2X as fast as the rest of the world. Take a stand and donate $27 today to help us reach our $5,020 goal for wildlife and the planet!** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [Donate $27 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2131254?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $50 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2131255?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $100 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2131256?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2131257?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
When you think of the Arctic, you probably envision snowy, wintry landscapes. Polar bears lumber along the ice shelf. Their cubs play together in their icy dens.
But the truth is more sinister: __polar bear habitat is shrinking rapidly.__ And these precious arctic animals are struggling to survive. They are suffering some of the worst impacts of the human-driven climate crisis. **Each day, polar bears are being pushed closer to the brink of EXTINCTION and Big Oil doesn't show signs of stopping its destruction. [Without urgent action, we could lose polar bears forever and our planet will be in serious peril. Donate $27 today to help us reach our $5,020 goal for the Arctic, the wildlife that calls it home, and our planet. ](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2131258?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)**
The Arctic is melting away before our very eyes. One of the main culprits of this disaster is the fossil fuel industry. Greedy corporations and Big Oil are exploiting our Earth. They charge through, bringing _**toxic chemicals and waste.**_ Not only does the pollution put Arctic wildlife in danger, but it _hurts local communities too._
Big Oil’s contaminants are harming the entire Arctic landscape. And its actions are contributing to climate change -- all for the sake of profit. I’m reaching out to you today because I know you won’t stand for this. Will you take action today to help protect our precious Arctic landscapes and the planet before it’s too late?
[](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2131259?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
**Help save the Arctic, its wildlife and communities, and the planet from greedy interests like Big Oil. Donate $27 or more now to help us reach our $5,020 goal!**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[Donate $27 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2131254?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $50 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2131255?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $100 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2131256?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2131257?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
The Arctic’s landscape is one of nature’s most majestic places. High snowy mountain peaks that reach clouds, to glaciers and icebergs that cover the sparkling blue icy waters. Arctic species and the ecosystem rely on the cold, rigid climate to eat, reproduce, and survive. But the Arctic is warming _**TWICE as FAST**_ as the rest of the world. This wonderous place, the creatures that call it home, and the communities that rely on it could soon reach a point of no return.
But the danger doesn’t end with wildlife, Friend. Because of the weather and fragile ice, oil spills are even more likely in the Arctic. In a review of Shell’s plans to drill in the Alaskan Arctic Ocean, the U.S. Department of the Interior found that there’s a _**75 percent chance of a major oil spill**_ if an oil company finds oil and produces it. And because of its remote locations, it’s practically impossible to clean a spill in the Arctic. To make matters worse, oil spills could also damage fisheries and tourism -- impacting local economies and communities.
Even on the off chance a spill doesn’t occur, Big Oil’s practices impact the entire landscape and nearby communities. With more drilling comes noise pollution and toxic greenhouse gas emissions. And local residents, including tribes like the Gwich’in people, are left to suffer the consequences. Imagine having to constantly endure endless noise and toxic, polluted air in your everyday life!
If Big Oil gets away with drilling in the Arctic, there could be dire consequences for arctic wildlife, people, and the planet. Enough is enough: we need accountability and protection of our planet and its inhabitants. Will you sit by while the federal government gives _**dirty energy handouts**_ to the fossil fuel industry? Or will you speak up today and fight back to stand with local communities and defend our planet from corporate greed?
**Help protect the Arctic from catastrophic oil drilling. Rush your $27 donation now and help us reach our $5,020 goal!**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[Donate $27 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2131254?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $50 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2131255?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $100 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2131256?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2131257?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Aside from its beauty, the Arctic is a vital landscape that helps keep our planet healthy. Ice in the Arctic reflects some of the sun’s energy back into space, helping to keep the Earth cool. The more ice melts, the more rays from the sun are absorbed into the planet. And that causes even more warming! The cycle has to stop before our Arctic landscapes are lost forever.
But we have bad news: the Biden administration has caved to pressure from Big Oil by signing a new rule **permitting increased oil and gas activity in the Arctic.** When Big Oil charges through, it brings toxic pollutants into the region and releases harmful greenhouse gas emissions that speed up the ice melting even more. That further threatens the Arctic and the wildlife that lives there.
Friends of the Earth is fighting tooth and nail against Big Oil and polluters that are threatening to destroy the Arctic and our planet. We’re pushing for stronger federal protections for the Arctic. At the same time, we’re fighting against attacks on bedrock laws like the National Environmental Policy Act that helps keep the Arctic and its communities safe from the fossil fuel industry.
But we’re facing intense pushback, and _**we need your help**_ if we’re going to win this fight. Your membership contribution today will help us fight back against Big Polluters and protect the future of the Arctic, local communities, and the rest of the planet that relies on it. **If just 7 more activists from your area make a membership contribution of $27 today, we can reach our $5,020 goal** and give the Arctic and our planet a fighting chance. Friend, I wouldn’t be asking if it wasn’t important: will you stand with Friends of the Earth today and fight to keep the Arctic cold, communities safe, and the planet healthy?
**Stop dangerous oil and gas drilling from harming our precious Arctic landscapes, the people that rely on them, and our planet. Donate $27 before the clock strikes midnight! **
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[Donate $27 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2131254?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $50 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2131255?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $100 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2131256?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2131257?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Standing with you,
Raena Garcia
Senior fossil fuel and lands campaigner,
Friends of the Earth**

name: Blake Dellinger
subject: You're Invited: Laura's Birthday Celebration/Signature Signing
body:
Friends,

I hope you all had a great weekend and are ready to spend time with your
loved ones over the holiday this week.

You may not know this, but Laura has a birthday coming up! On Sunday,
December 3rd, we will be celebrating Laura's birthday by collecting
signatures to get her on the ballot. Can you join us?

In order for Laura to get on the ballot, we will need to have registered
voters who live in the 30th Congressional District to sign her nomination
papers to qualify for the ballot.

To make it easy - we are having a birthday party/signature signing event in
Burbank. We hope you can make it there!

[image: LF Signature Signing (2).png]

Use the link below to RSVP and you will be sent the address prior to the
event. All are welcome to come and support Laura, but you must be a
registered voter in the 30th District to sign Laura's papers.

*Click here to RSVP*.
<https://www.lauraforcongress.org/event-details/signature-signing-party>

We hope to see you there!

Thank you,
Blake Dellinger
Laura Friedman for Congress.

## Israel, Hamas Near Deal to Free 50 Hostages
Negotiations to [free 50 of the hostages](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0DtynjAQAODTiG4ZPfgtKCjS0DltSmaRFrSxHkSSzfj2mUmdG3zz_Xrf35Ej5-snJlr7WXZ0nb9oVwq0BG32afDrSaTJDLQqK-U0z9bqIayG5IKvecYJF_n2wsPOxrzQ0bx4mrQfeNVSG6W0VEpKacfJGu2MVicR2kUeYpLkuZc6_i6ce6AzfpcvqqMraYhr6P1uwvwQehN6e55nvEvkzq6M9Cn0hrWziyT0VnL8hsS5VChH6-giNThicR-cL-BWkSIETNjAE0YIpXW8qMEf7FjhTtAC8UeAVAKmRB4OzoCH_4wVQ8IMGKEHzEJvQ139_XCM3N6smOSVkOM_cf9_4N8AAAD__-bZdZc) held by Hamas in Gaza were down to solving "minor" practical issues, the Qatari prime minister said Sunday. Qatar is brokering the talks between Israel, the U.S., and Hamas. The deal would call for a swap of hostages in return for a multi-day ceasefire. This weekend, the Israeli military released [videos of what it said were hostages](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxszzGPtCAQgOFfA51mGFjBguJr7PZrrzQog84eilGy5v795a6--k3e5Pl4js_Amfflf9jI11TGMFd-06hUg9CgHo2MPhEhaUleWQDjnLUoVx9603ePhwOF4LqYYp9cp2iK6EKc9EOyR0CtFIJSAGBbYzXOGlUiCraHSRigyLWc7avwXldK-au86Wznssns11qPS-h_AgeBw33f7esoV_2pAofppPDJ-9LsdF8Ch3BWnjM11hqwTp4-HjfnzFdnhYFlC5x_v_Vv5ncAAAD__xteUqE) being taken into the Al Shifa hospital. The U.S. is anxious to tamp down the fighting as American public opinion swings against the war. President Biden's [approval ratings hit their lowest level](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFu7CAQQNGvwR3WMLAPb0HxGnebNqUFeLyeCINl0KL8fZSkTX2aq_v-WB6eE-fnmz_Ita0sPjZ-0aKURJCoFzOsbiNC0gM5ZQHMNFmLw-4AJ0S46ThZpEBqtbipsGkTkMId7MAOAbVSCEoBgB2N1Rg1qo3I2zsEYYBWbuUaPwrnttOWPsuLrjGWY0hub-2sQv8XOAuce-9jDjFTr98ucD5L4saxCpwR0EhKFBuX_EtJBl4pV1mbzyvnp9y5VZmpy1R6lVwvT0nu_vBVdn_JK2av8IY3NVxuPTunxPWfFQaeh-f0E9X-fvQVAAD__9u0aJs) as more than 70% of Democrats expressed disapproval about his handling of the war.
## House Releases Suppressed Jan. 6 Footage
House Speaker Mike Johnson approved the [release of thousands of hours of suppressed video](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFu7CAQQNGvgY4VM2CzLihe425fm9ICe7BnhcGyya7y91FSp77SLc7HY3oEzlzW_2En31Kdwtz4RROAQq3QTFYuPhEhGUkenNb2fncO5eaHbui6mEI3QxwixQQIM6alt0bTEkGyR40GADWA1trdrDM4G4REFNygo7CaFm71vD0rl7ZRyl_1RedtrrvMfmvtuIT5J3AUOLaNNs75pwkct7pTofclcLQGug5RnXR8xsxzKJeKtHJRR70al1U9Q1G9SrW2sJKqJXMhgaM8_XK8OWe-eiesXvfAv3_Z_qb4DgAA__9dbGAQ) from inside the Capitol on Jan. 6, 2021 that had never been seen publicly. One of the [first videos posted this weekend](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskbmO3DAMhp9G7nZAUZdduAiycbdpUxo6qBkFPgYyZ419-8CeSbeVBP4_j4_88zF--DKV5frbz9RzXkcfuXzSKOUbwhuqUTepz0RIqqFeOgDdts5hc-sh5piSCQacVUnpIGOSndKBcuqkbZvSI6CSEkFKAHAX7RRGhTITeddBEBooFV7r5e9aFr5Rnr7WT6qXuM7N1N-Y75tQPwQOAgfeC_NTEzjMXH2kL4HDxp4fm8BBOjStkqitBdUCWANCDZXyuNUo1Dvvx4vG_OK8CzTuJ-_Rz_dnaCdimgOll8JU51M5ynYIYKRG11kFBl6Waz0NgWTonG8tUvDoKTgrM1myttMdmGxC0FpH_N9yXc60TY0C7THeo05CvT9p0Ry85iA2OJRlY39_LKnwk9vgYKVrwZ7fpvbpvpdpKpt1QsN19mU6l8ff3_JfAAAA___AhpP-) showed Capitol police peacefully leading protestors into the building. Many of those arrested on Jan. 6 have long clamored for the release of the full footage. Democrats fought the release, arguing it could [expose security measures](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFuwyAQQL_G3oiOO2LMwNAlW7p2tC74nBARsIAm6t9X6dzx6S1P7-u8nDmmmK-f_BDft7Jw6PEpi9YKQSEtZlz9JoJCo3htAcw8W4vjzZPDGS8GJzgyOGcdBeMuM2-wrrxZGaNHQNIaQWsAsAdjCQOh3kTYOrgMBmSNvdTDvcTcb7Kln_KUegjlMSZ_631vA30MeBrwxHuWV3urN9QeQ5IBT3fOalKdd2kqlHyt0poKvMdekoq5fdcqoceSVbBk-WgokHVGE6-TAB45TEAcSGisft1fMaXYJjsYuD44pr-U_v-Z3wAAAP__aD5jXw) used by Capitol police and endanger people shown in the film. Johnson said faces would be blurred, and some sensitive security footage wouldn't be released.
## Black Friday Discounts Higher than 2022
Early Black Friday discounts were [far higher this October than in past years](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFuhDAQRL_GdEbrXXLmChdp6C5tSmTs5djE4JNxDt3fR6ROM81o5knv8zbevCTZ7h9-ZVfnPPpQ5cmjMRpBI41dE93MjEwNO2MBur63FpvF0ZudLFG80qUH8j0Y6nFCJMJrBJ4acQhIxiAYAwC27SxhIDQzs7dXmFQHHKXm0n5l2erCc3rlJ5c25LVJbqn1sSt6VzgoHI7jaMM2hbNUOJzXCgdjzrAKB_YlvfSUfPjWc5HoXzrKHvLPVne9yH3hos9Ru9Q1NcXFxyEpyX6xqoP76iX9Yev_Fn4DAAD__2ZmWvI), signaling concerns by retailers about holiday demand. Email inboxes have been filling for weeks with Black Friday deals. The real test will come on the actual Black Friday, the day after Thanksgiving, [when 130 million people](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0DGPozAQBeBfY7pB9phgUlBcQ5drr0RjGMLcGoxsJyj_fsXWW7_3pE_v32N8kATZn39p474scaSpyJtHYwA1oB2bau4XZmRbcW-c1k3XOYfV2rubxfne0mTbm5-b-2Ssd9S1xvnWN9hV0qNGawxqY7TWrm6cxcmiWZjJ3bVXjeZZSkz1_yh7WXkJn_jmVE9xq0K_lnJkZf8oHBQO53nWiV-FU75yhYN_Zdk5Z4VD4kISYIp7fm2crvpKBSSDDzR9wZJkpg-cEgLkNR4HpwyL7DN4Sk-SPUNZJcOHKcGlBmPAtAqHKvXzce0kt041-rmRhB9g-f2v7wAAAP__N_JsuQ) are expected to go shopping. Thanksgiving weekend is typically the busiest shopping period of the year in the U.S. However, a study by WalletHub says that consumers should proceed with caution. The analysis shows that up to a third of so-called "discounts" [offer no savings](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskDFvwyAUhH-NvWHBgwRnYOjiLV07WoAf9muwsYDazb-v0q1StxvuTp--j_t4txRpm9_tiqaGNFpf6cBRCAacgRxVO5mACChbNEJzrvpea2gXg6K_KnlT1vYXDCDACnT84oRzzksxtWSAgxQCuBCcc90pLcFLEAHR6ht3jeI4UU25-0y01QVDfKYDc-fT2kaz1LqXRr41MDQwnOfZhfTtvgptWMqr08AQKWCpz4gNDC5a_2Ah02SfrCxp32mbX8E_MDN5YVRxLeykGFkKATPbEiv2oG0u7Chsz8j-fOyZPJY2m2l_jahcdaP4vFqKv4j1f2M_AQAA__9RknCM) compared to pre-Black Friday prices.

Former First Lady Rosalynn Carter Dies At Age 96

Former First Lady Rosalynn Carter, the wife of former President Jimmy
Carter, has died at age 96, according to an announcement by The Carter
Center. Carter, who served as first lady during her husband’s
presidential term from 1977 to 1981, had entered hospice care on
Friday following a diagnosis of Alzheimer’s disease.

subject: BREAKING: U.S. Marine illegally arrested by FBI gets 8 months in prison
body:
On January 6, 2021, Jesus Rivera, a Marine combat veteran, peacefully recorded the events at the Capitol building in Washington, D.C. He shot video on his smart phone and a digital camera for a local news station back home in Florida.

| | | [ ](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c36647%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=oroSWkLjfy9%2bHccmF0HCrg&sysid=1)
