| | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c36648%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=8rC9gjkTWH5urrgpo9UvxQ&sysid=1) Hi, Friend

**[Please give a critical $25, $50, $100 or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my two crucial class action lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c36649%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=unUvb0g4ELSrCRZ959F8nA&sysid=1)**

(Because you’re a valued supporter of Freedom Watch, I had to rush you this urgent update about my client, Jesus Rivera. Please bear with me if you’ve seen some of this information before...it will be shocking to new supporters.)

On January 6, 2021, Jesus Rivera, a Marine combat veteran, peacefully recorded the events at the Capitol building in Washington, D.C. He shot video on his smart phone and a digital camera for a local news station back home in Florida.

He didn’t protest (when I first heard his story, I thought he did).

Jesus didn’t attack police or use harsh language. He only shot video to provide for his wife and kids and entered the Capitol peacefully like many other patriots that day.

**But around 7:30 AM on January 20, 2021, between 12 to 20 heavily armed FBI agents raided his home with guns drawn. There was no probable cause, and the search warrant was obtained through lies and even outright fraud.
**
Jesus was forcefully handcuffed, then moved to the FBI building.

His wife asked for the warrant several times but didn’t receive it until after the FBI agents finished searching their home.

Jesus survived rocket attacks and exploding roadside bombs trying to bring freedom to Iraq and Afghanistan. But his freedom gets trampled on right here at home by Biden’s Gestapo DOJ and its FBI!

**What’s more, Jesus recently appeared before District Judge Colleen Kollar-Kotelly in Washington, D.C. and was unjustly sentenced to 8 months in federal prison.
**
Let me tell you, I’ve locked horns several times with Judge Kollar-Kotelly.

She’s a hardcore leftist whose nomination was opposed by every conservative group in the country. She’s the absolute worst judge I’ve appeared before in 45 years.

And now she’s throwing a true patriot and innocent man to the wolves.

**friend, I’ve filed a critically important class action lawsuit on behalf of Jesus Rivera - and on behalf of each and every January 6 Peaceful Protester who is getting brutally abused by the justice system as I write you this urgent email.
**
I’m suing everyone responsible for this outrage: the lead agents, each agent who searched Jesus’ home, even FBI Director Christopher Wray.

The shocking, un-American conduct as alleged in my lawsuit can’t be allowed to go on.

**If the FBI can push around a peaceful, church-going Marine veteran for simply recording the events at the Capitol building on January 6th, they can push you and me, our families, friends, and fellow Americans around, too.
**
That’s why I beg you to stand with me at this crucial time.

**I’m Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.
**
I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years.

You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

**I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.
**
I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents - AND WIN!
**
And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten criminal regime in court.

[**friend, PLEASE help me double down in my fight to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE with your absolutely vital gift of $25, $50, $100 or even more RIGHT NOW.
**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c36640%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=yQoy8Yjcu%2b2lSFlJBXsnNg&sysid=1)
I’m using two powerful class action lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to do this.

[**Please give what you can right away.**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c36641%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=q2Oy929%2bI%2boQFLj4bR%2b7VQ&sysid=1)

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

**P.S. Friend, you can read more about my urgent class action lawsuit on behalf of Jesus Rivera and all January 6 peaceful protesters by just[clicking on this link](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c36642%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=jAs8gXmxWm%2bkTTwUhsDCKw&sysid=1) and selecting the view button. After, simply scroll down to read the legal document.

[**Then think of U.S. Marine combat veteran Jesus Rivera and each of the January 6 Peaceful Protesters I’m fighting for ...and dig deep and give a vital $25, $50, $100 or more right away.**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c36643%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=OcTcvC8f4BM9L8BgV%2bNYUA&sysid=1)

name: Attorney Larry Klayman
subject: BREAKING: U.S. Marine illegally arrested by FBI gets 8 months in prison
body:
On January 6, 2021, Jesus Rivera, a Marine combat veteran, peacefully recorded the events at the Capitol building in Washington, D.C. He shot video on his smart phone and a digital camera for a local news station back home in Florida.

| | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zhoj02l9s8inivpcse48vii1nigcso7qkj55n8r8_rp22sh2s8i6eo30c5ieeo71cjh2bs)
---
| | |
---
| | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zn050e299nhouk3ot4ijbgh8a6aer26dstse8rd0_rp22sh2s8i6eo30c5ieeo71cjh2bs) Hi, Friend

**[Please give a critical $25, $50, $100 or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my two crucial class action lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zsb0quhpod3bsjtaa197uc00bcpk2dhvvu1ler3g_rp22sh2s8i6eo30c5ieeo71cjh2bs)**

(Because you’re a valued supporter of Freedom Watch, I had to rush you this urgent update about my client, Jesus Rivera. Please bear with me if you’ve seen some of this information before...it will be shocking to new supporters.)

On January 6, 2021, Jesus Rivera, a Marine combat veteran, peacefully recorded the events at the Capitol building in Washington, D.C. He shot video on his smart phone and a digital camera for a local news station back home in Florida.

He didn’t protest (when I first heard his story, I thought he did).

Jesus didn’t attack police or use harsh language. He only shot video to provide for his wife and kids and entered the Capitol peacefully like many other patriots that day.

**But around 7:30 AM on January 20, 2021, between 12 to 20 heavily armed FBI agents raided his home with guns drawn. There was no probable cause, and the search warrant was obtained through lies and even outright fraud.
**
Jesus was forcefully handcuffed, then moved to the FBI building.

His wife asked for the warrant several times but didn’t receive it until after the FBI agents finished searching their home.

Jesus survived rocket attacks and exploding roadside bombs trying to bring freedom to Iraq and Afghanistan. But his freedom gets trampled on right here at home by Biden’s Gestapo DOJ and its FBI!

**What’s more, Jesus recently appeared before District Judge Colleen Kollar-Kotelly in Washington, D.C. and was unjustly sentenced to 8 months in federal prison.
**
Let me tell you, I’ve locked horns several times with Judge Kollar-Kotelly.

She’s a hardcore leftist whose nomination was opposed by every conservative group in the country. She’s the absolute worst judge I’ve appeared before in 45 years.

And now she’s throwing a true patriot and innocent man to the wolves.

**friend, I’ve filed a critically important class action lawsuit on behalf of Jesus Rivera – and on behalf of each and every January 6 Peaceful Protester who is getting brutally abused by the justice system as I write you this urgent email.
**
I’m suing everyone responsible for this outrage: the lead agents, each agent who searched Jesus’ home, even FBI Director Christopher Wray.

The shocking, un-American conduct as alleged in my lawsuit can’t be allowed to go on.

**If the FBI can push around a peaceful, church-going Marine veteran for simply recording the events at the Capitol building on January 6th, they can push you and me, our families, friends, and fellow Americans around, too.
**
That’s why I beg you to stand with me at this crucial time.

**I’m Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.
**
I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years.

You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

**I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.
**
I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents – AND WIN!
**
And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten criminal regime in court.

[**friend, PLEASE help me double down in my fight to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE with your absolutely vital gift of $25, $50, $100 or even more RIGHT NOW.
**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zee1h3451t6msm76ehjvrjg88lk68b1fpjtlo8q0_rp22sh2s8i6eo30c5ieeo71cjh2bs)
I’m using two powerful class action lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to do this.

[**Please give what you can right away.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zmek43of1bqntdvstmtsijgagvkjsmvg6pg6lhb8_rp22sh2s8i6eo30c5ieeo71cjh2bs)

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

**P.S. Friend, you can read more about my urgent class action lawsuit on behalf of Jesus Rivera and all January 6 peaceful protesters by just[clicking on this link](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zg4ceavfp13pr60lha6ct2a4nd5l8mf8m2sk4utg_rp22sh2s8i6eo30c5ieeo71cjh2bs) and selecting the view button. After, simply scroll down to read the legal document.

[**Then think of U.S. Marine combat veteran Jesus Rivera and each of the January 6 Peaceful Protesters I’m fighting for...and dig deep and give a vital $25, $50, $100 or more right away.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zlol2n9bth7i29rbi1bk1o0o5p2vg4dp6ai03vb0_rp22sh2s8i6eo30c5ieeo71cjh2bs)

Dear Fellow Conservative

I’ll bet you’ve heard this one before: voter fraud doesn’t exist—it’s just a ploy.

That’s the baseless narrative constantly pushed by Leftists politicians, liberal fanatics, and their mainstream media mouthpiece.

Apparently, election fraud only exists when the Left loses elections. The preposterous hypocrisy of the radical Left simply knows no bounds.

The reality is that voter fraud does exist and it is on the rise, despite the radical Left’s attempts to minimize this issue.

And to ensure that this urgent matter is addressed through aggressive reform and oversight, today I’m asking you to join other concerned citizens by completing our [National Survey on Election Fraud >>](http://trk.libertyledger.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MjE2Mjk1NiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMzI0LWMzZTFkMGJlNmFkMTRmNDQ5OTE0MDVhMzliMGIxYTkxIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjEiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3NlY3VyZWQuaGVyaXRhZ2Uub3JnL3ZvdGVyLWZyYXVkLXN1cnZleS8_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXZvdGVyZnJhdWQmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFfQUVfTExPNDQzOTUifQ/1tf1FE-5U25X6LqtrpRowg)

Your answers will help us pressure lawmakers to pursue aggressive reforms and hold those who enable fraud legally accountable.

The survey should only take a minute or so to complete, but your input is invaluable to this work. You can get started right now using the secure link below:

[https://secured.heritage.org/voter-fraud-survey/](http://trk.libertyledger.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MjE2Mjk1NiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMzI0LWMzZTFkMGJlNmFkMTRmNDQ5OTE0MDVhMzliMGIxYTkxIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjIiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3NlY3VyZWQuaGVyaXRhZ2Uub3JnL3ZvdGVyLWZyYXVkLXN1cnZleS8_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXZvdGVyZnJhdWQmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFfQUVfTExPNDQzOTUifQ/PGx0XaqtZuXZipELaHUAeA)

Thank you so much. I look forward to seeing your response.

Regards,

Alexander Hyatt

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: BREAKING - SkyTree Book Fairs challenges Scholastic’s monopoly
body:
Here’s what we’re up against.

[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zjeumjhj9nshseg1kgltaqrr1aujommlsfo2iuko_rp22sh2s8i6eo30clg68ob4c3h2bs "SkyTree Book Fairs")

Friend,

SkyTree Book Fair and I did a deep dive and discovered the cause of why sexually explicit and disgusting books get into our children's schools, classrooms, and libraries.

Here's what we're up against.

These are books Scholastic promotes at book fairs in schools. Here are pages from "Welcome to St. Hell," a 2022 Scholastic book glamorizing gender transitioning to middle schoolers. (We've censored these pages as the original content could violate social media policies against adult material):

[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zjjj5pns371ss1kght4f1dsqv6fn5cs3873fopi0_rp22sh2s8i6eo30clg68ob4c3h2bs)[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zdbg233rlg6pudb1f330nt23podp0u89kn0l4u68_rp22sh2s8i6eo30clg68ob4c3h2bs)

Scholastic holds a virtual monopoly on school book fairs. Like many of our cultural institutions in the last decade, Scholastic has fallen prey to the woke mob and radical LGBT political agenda.

Scholastic promotes this agenda over the well-being of our children.

**Here is the solution:**

SkyTree Book Fair offers schools a different option for book fairs. SkyTree Book Fairs is providing schools, parents, and children with an empowering alternative with literature rooted in truth and family values that matches the quality and ease of Scholastic while countering their harmful agenda.

Here's how you can help.

[I am asking for your urgent support to help SkyTree replace Scholastic in schools. Can you donate $35, $50, or even $100 today toward Sky Tree? We are kicking off with a goal to raise $100,000 this month.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z7budo7ianvol2e006uhl0ko7mfvpdfcdbo2ujko_rp22sh2s8i6eo30clg68ob4c3h2bs)

[Donate](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z5v65mtncvodr2ak99487v8f13cc3dj83upepi5g_rp22sh2s8i6eo30clg68ob4c3h2bs)

SkyTree was inspired by my first children's book, As You Grow. Now, I am helping them spread to schools across the country as an alternative to Scholastic. And here's the thing: SkyTree will not only promote age-appropriate books, but they will do so more efficiently to make it easier for schools to choose SkyTree over Scholastic.

And it's working!

SkyTree has already secured its first public school book fair in Spotsylvania, VA!

No more race-infused storylines. No more confusing gender content. Only age-appropriate content that will nurture childhood innocence and character.

SkyTree needs your support today. American children need your support today!!

We are quickly lining up hundreds of new book fairs in the Spring semester. It costs roughly $7,500 to host a book fair. Please help sponsor SkyTree book fairs in schools across the country.

[Donate $10 >>](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2znqgi50n2rhvf6makbbasqe69f4dsve1s08mcgu8_rp22sh2s8i6eo30clg68ob4c3h2bs)

[Donate $35 >>](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zjsmmfcdtaed4r9g7osi9qeofsnkgeljlpphfaag_rp22sh2s8i6eo30clg68ob4c3h2bs)

[Donate $50 >>](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z291tvopfripkrpa0meo0bk2ndfp2jsgga4o4hjo_rp22sh2s8i6eo30clg68ob4c3h2bs)

[Donate $100 >>](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zj53v89j5scqk1toef3mcbsd7tip9ttt0ngnsqqo_rp22sh2s8i6eo30clg68ob4c3h2bs)

[Donate $250 >>](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z3qctq8m7kpkr6omgnl23c452vk0lv10vkokie1g_rp22sh2s8i6eo30clg68ob4c3h2bs)

[Donate $500 >>](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zqvhgsen8lehasj8qs2eiqm52thgpolgjmrbncrg_rp22sh2s8i6eo30clg68ob4c3h2bs)

[Donate $1,000 >>](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z37schn1c5iggqeqbgkal0hr6c5efbea1tbbmj90_rp22sh2s8i6eo30clg68ob4c3h2bs)

[Donate Any Amount >>](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z2aagl5pk4h9qkjli1llh1r9t9cg10jnmaae6hto_rp22sh2s8i6eo30clg68ob4c3h2bs)

Let's bring back wholesome content to kids, like what we had growing up. Kids should remain innocent and have content to encourage their moral character while fostering their imagination.

It's not complicated! It's what you and I grew up with.

Thank you for helping us offer schools an alternative to Scholastic!

God bless,

Kirk Cameron

P.S. Scholastic's monopoly on school book fairs has ushered in woke and inappropriate books to kids across the nation.

I've partnered with SkyTree Book Fairs to give schools a positive alternative to scholastic.

[Help us raise $100,000 to fund book fairs this spring semester at schools. Click here to donate >>](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zf8jk38n4dro5dpvtto8pa2knh61gbn6b5boskkg_rp22sh2s8i6eo30clg68ob4c3h2bs)

A reminder of what we're up against:

[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zg54v94h9uuso061e3ikvfndsmprr2j8idfrt8bo_rp22sh2s8i6eo30clg68ob4c3h2bs)

It's time to fight back.

You and I cannot afford to do nothing and let the woke mob indoctrinate millions of children.

(We've censored these pages as the original content could violate social media policies against adult material): Scholastic holds a virtual monopoly on school book fairs. body:
The pressing matter of LGBTQ+ rights is of paramount importance, with the well-being and equal treatment of our communities at stake... | | | | | [](https://laura4tx.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=65529f44b849c16925ad85a66&id=f667c7ed00&e=a2a46ff12c)
---
# Championing LGBTQ+ Equality

Peter - The pressing matter of LGBTQ+ rights is of paramount importance, with the well-being and equal treatment of our communities at stake.
To ensure justice and equality for all, we must advance LGBTQ+ rights through thoughtful and inclusive legislation.

By choosing representatives who advocate for these causes, we pave the way for a more just and equitable society, where the voices of marginalized communities are not only heard but also respected and uplifted.

The people across this great nation and those in the 8th District of Texas deserve someone who will fight for their right to lead fulfilling, authentic lives free from discrimination and inequality.

[**Peter,**](https://laura4tx.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=65529f44b849c16925ad85a66&id=4af482708e&e=a2a46ff12c)[**if you are ready to see that representation in our state is changed, then please chip in today. Every dollar counts and impacts our ability to see that we can make a real difference in the lives of those in our** **community.**](https://laura4tx.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=65529f44b849c16925ad85a66&id=72211f4c95&e=a2a46ff12c)
| [Support Laura’s Campaign!](https://laura4tx.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=65529f44b849c16925ad85a66&id=4a829a94e5&e=a2a46ff12c)
---
Thank you so much.

\- Laura

Roger Williams is a Christian, conservative, pro-life, and second amendment supporter taking Texas values to Washington, D.C. He is a small business owner with over 45 years of experience and is running for Congress to create economic growth, jobs, and provide strong leadership. Roger worked alongside President Trump to fight against high taxes, rising energy prices, and soaring healthcare costs. His passion for conservative leadership led him to support Republican candidates from the White House to the county courthouse. Roger serves on the Board of Trustees for the Bush School of Government and Public Service at Texas A&M University, the Texas Christian University Board of Trustees, and the National Football Foundation and College Football Hall of Fame Board of Directors.

He is a small business owner with over 45 years of experience and is running for Congress to create economic growth, jobs, and provide strong leadership. Roger worked alongside President Trump to fight against high taxes, rising energy prices, and soaring healthcare costs. His passion for conservative leadership led him to support Republican candidates from the White House to the county courthouse. name: Ron DeSantis
subject: 2024 is the time to put up or shut up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWGZ-WAijN

I will never stop standing up for what I know is right-even when
it goes against the grain of public opinion.

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWGZ-WAijN

Friend,

The
time for chirping from the sidelines is over.

Talk is ineffective, and that's why my message has been simple:
2024 is the time to put up or shut up.

As
a leader, your job is to put the interests of the people you
serve above your own political gain. I've done that in Florida,
and I've watched the American people cry out for real leadership
nationwide. I am looking forward to rising to the occasion to
show the nation that leadership.

I
debate and defend what I KNOW is right-even when it goes against
the grain of the approved elite media narrative.

The
American people deserve a President with a track record of taking
action and standing for what's right. The lack of action from our
leaders across this country has gone on for far too long. Joe
Biden has done more to damage to our nation than anyone, and
Kamala Harris has done nothing at all.

I
am DONE listening to excuses, and I know you are too. If
Republicans want to ditch the culture of losing, then it's time
we try something new. In Florida, I showed the country the
playbook for defeating the woke mob:

Giving parents back their voice in the classroom by BANNING CRT
and pornographic content for young kids

STANDING UP against corporations who have tried to force
taxpayers to fund an ESG agenda

DEFEATING Faucism and giving back Floridians the freedom to
breathe and see their families after the elites in DC shut down
the country

I
promise you, with me as your nominee for President, Republicans
will forget this culture of losing once and for all. This is a
race to defeat Joe Biden. That is my focus. To get that done, I
am asking for your continued support. If you can, will you pitch
in $25 today?

PITCH IN
$25

PITCH IN
$47

PITCH IN
$75

PITCH IN
$100

PITCH IN
$150

PITCH IN
$200

The
time to act is now. The time for leadership is now.

2024 is going to be the year that our Great American Comeback
takes shape. Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And
freedom is worth fighting for. We will fight back and WIN.

I
am humbly asking for your support today, Friend. Join me, and we
will put an end to the culture of losing that has surrounded the
Republican party. We will keep the woke indoctrination away from
kids, the way we live our lives, the curriculum taught in
schools, and the consumer choices we make.

Stand with me on the debate stage: Donate
HERE

Our
Great American Comeback is attainable as long as we're willing to
fight for it.

In
Freedom,

Ron
DeSantis

Meet Ron DeSantis

A native Floridian with
blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a
nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin
High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he
was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated
with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission
in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service,
Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah,
Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military
decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service
and the Iraq Campaign Medal.

Ron
also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child
predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a
platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits
and a balanced budget amendment.

In
Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the
weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to
hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in
manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a
veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our
country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans
and expand support for mental health.

In
2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As
governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for
the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when
the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media
united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis
stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding
principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to
transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival.
Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative
priorities:

Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine
mandates,

Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border
crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against
illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured
professors accountable,

Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital
currency,

Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

Protecting the unborn,

Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a
constitutional carry state,

Expanding education freedom,

Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and
entities,

Lowering prescription drug costs,

Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

Creating a universal school choice program,

Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme
Court,

...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout
his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of
nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the
largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than
1.5 million votes.

But
history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the
majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional
wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently
as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30
points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red,
including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties
overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor
DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics,
and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with
battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing
down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his
inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense
suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of
sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even
for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we
choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than
cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe
place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership,
Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education
opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden
Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that
seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to
the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered
the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's
history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:

Record tax relief

ESG prohibitions

Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering
transparency

Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

Improvements to our state's infrastructure

Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death
penalty for child rapists

The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border
crisis

Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward
school unions

Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No
leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor
DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country,
leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron
is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television
anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters,
Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.

Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as
charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes.
Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without
"green cards"), federal government contractors, and national
banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best
efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address,
occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose
aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The
maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600
($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple
using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary &
$6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute
$10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general).

Contribution rules

I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident
(i.e., green card holder).

This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not
being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose
of making this contribution.

I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card
and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued
to another person.

I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this
contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization,
national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal
contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Ron
DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his
military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not
imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department
of Defense.

Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President

This email was sent by: Ron DeSantis for President

PO Box 3696

Tallahassee, FL 32315

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system April 25, 2023.
For more information please follow the URL below:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/iWGZ-WAijN

Follow the URL below to update your preferences or opt-out:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWGZ-WAijN

To unsubscribe from future mailings, send an email to mailto:unsub-73402128305-echo3-0AD69EB901AE3CDDC64CC0EEC095CBFF@emailsendr.net?Subject=Unsubscribe&body=Please%20remove%20me%20from%20further%20mailings
with "Unsubscribe" as the subject line.

groups between 2019 and 2021.

name: Jon Tester
subject: We just launched our first TV ad but I need your help to get it running across Montana
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
Team,
I wanted to make sure you saw our new TV ad, but we need YOUR help to get it running across Montana.
Can you pitch in a split donation between my campaign and Seth Moulton to help us keep it on the air? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester]
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester]
Generations of my family have farmed the land I work on today just outside of Big Sandy.
I know the Montana that’s worth protecting because I’ve lived it every day.
Where we look out for each other, and our word is our bond.
But like so much of our state, things are changing. Things are too expensive, some folks are forced to sell their family farms, and we’re losing access to our public lands. Hell, even some of our favorite bars are closing.
The truth is folks back in Washington don’t care what’s happening out here, but I’m defending our way of life with everything I’ve got.
A big chunk of our advertising budget comes from emails like the one you’re reading–so we’re counting on you to chip in today and help us get our message out.
Click here split a donation between my campaign and Seth Moulton to help us spread our message across Montana and win this thing >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester]
– Jon
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester]
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester]

name: Victor Riches
subject: Children’s book socialists teachers are afraid of
body:
[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zmrga4d6d1svf1js1chlqgkbmmehf0ltj708ntkg_rp22sh2s8i6eo30clg6ao34c1h2bs)
We are facing a crisis in our education system.

Friend,

We are facing a crisis in our education system.

According to a recent study, most Americans lack a basic understanding of their constitutional rights. Many cannot even name the three branches of government.

That's why the Goldwater Institute created a new type of children's book, A Is for the American Dream -- to instill a renewed appreciation for the pillars of our constitutional republic. We are now working on distributing this fun book to children and families nationwide.
_[You can support the Goldwater Institute's work to teach kids about
the American Dream, by donating here >](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z4un7v2g6kpuk1jbufpabhl1vmq2fv7qg2upg37g_rp22sh2s8i6eo30clg6ao34c1h2bs)[>](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z8q7q9nfrbtvlmfbk23ilbet82aulhd2ff35ne6g_rp22sh2s8i6eo30clg6ao34c1h2bs)_

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zc9tl0up4h16h4sjmabu06jsr9hoia7lc7qg4ql8_rp22sh2s8i6eo30clg6ao34c1h2bs)

I'm Victor Riches, President and CEO of the Goldwater Institute, the nation's preeminent liberty organization fighting for your constitutional liberties in legislatures and courtrooms across the country.

_**A Is for the American Dream**_ teaches kids that everyone can achieve success and prosperity through hard work and perseverance, no matter their background or social status.

[My goal is to raise $30,000 to continue creating and distributing great resources like _A Is for the American Dream_ to schools and libraries. Please click here to donate >>](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zbicjebgimbtm12hqh4v7pv25qoh0vr5g9spmolg_rp22sh2s8i6eo30clg6ao34c1h2bs)

[Donate](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zbin6v274ao9d3hqq36n25q20rt0krm3uq3bi7c8_rp22sh2s8i6eo30clg6ao34c1h2bs)

The book comes at a time when public schools are exposing our children to radical leftist agendas that teach toxic ideologies like Critical Race Theory, all while they cut parents out of important conversations about what's happening to their kids.

**These narratives push a slanted view of America, one that is overwhelmingly negative, divisive, and simply false!**

Goldwater designed _**A Is for the American Dream**_ to help the next generation develop an appreciation for the freedoms and responsibilities that come with living in the United States.

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zs8ip4n5u5vnfcbg4r4c2g4kqjaes2opckdjandg_rp22sh2s8i6eo30clg6ao34c1h2bs)

The book exposes kids to everything that makes our nation exceptional -- the Constitution, the Declaration of Independence, voting rights, prosperity, bravery, and more!

It teaches kids that whether they want to be a painter, an astronaut, a mom or a dad, an inventor, a gymnast, a teacher, or a business owner, the American Dream is within their grasp.

[Your support helps the Goldwater Institute give a freedom-focused education to more children. Please click here to donate $10, $35, or even $50 today >>>](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z8gpvumn5eqltt0579r4v9ab5urq3qbuelmjdj40_rp22sh2s8i6eo30clg6ao34c1h2bs)

The Goldwater Institute has stood on the front lines in the fight to protect children from radical leftist indoctrination. We passed the first universal school choice program in the country and have passed reforms to yank DEI practices out of colleges.

But it's not enough to defeat bad ideas. _We must also replace them with good ideas_.

_**A is for the American Dream**_ teaches children about important American principles like bravery, hard work, liberty, and opportunity.

You can play a major role in getting this book in front of more children by supporting the Goldwater Institute. **Click below to show your support today.**

[Donate $10 >>>](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zhfcu1grmlq0h6v0iouaha1fo4sinhgr4iatbmhg_rp22sh2s8i6eo30clg6ao34c1h2bs)

[Donate $35 >>>](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zeft8een5agd7smmplktofft8q93m8r8cf94jo4o_rp22sh2s8i6eo30clg6ao34c1h2bs)

[Donate $50 >>>](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zmfom6cpidt386qr8jv6jeas2a0okve1ig4fkomg_rp22sh2s8i6eo30clg6ao34c1h2bs)

[Donate $100 >>>](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zddcu54vlm7ctd67o3li6cujbv8hm24a14qi1he0_rp22sh2s8i6eo30clg6ao34c1h2bs)

name: Rep. Joe Sweeney
subject: Say Goodbye to Educational Freedom if Democrats Take Control
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Granite Solutions, Joe Sweeney Chairman
body:
We can't go back to their one-size fits all system that fails our students.
| | |
---
| | Derek, **Democrats will end our wildly successful Educational Freedom Accounts program if they ever take back control in Concord.**
---
| [ ](https://link.emails.granitesolutions.)
---
We need ALL HANDS on deck in order to protect our Educational Freedom Accounts from Democrat efforts seeking to END our successful program. EFAs have opened up opportunity for over a thousand Granite State students and families, but Democrats controlled by Union Bosses want to force everyone in a one-size fits all model. **That won't happen as long as Republicans remain in the drivers' seat in Concord.** [You can help us expand our Republican majorities today with a generous donation of $10, $25, $50, or even $100 today.](https://link.emails.granitesolutions.) _If you've already donated to Granite Solutions, please share this message with your network and ask them to chip in too._ We can only be successful next November by organizing and getting ready this November.

name: Jon Tester via Blue Amp Action
subject: hullabaloo
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T25326da5-ef28-4609-9309-d09fffd564e1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, Sherrod Brown and I aren’t winning any best dressed awards, let’s be honest. I’m known for my dirt-stained farming t-shirts and you’re much more likely to find Sherrod in a wrinkled sweatshirt than a suit and tie. We might not look, sound, or act like your typical senators, but that’s because we’re too busy fighting for our constituents to worry about all that hullabaloo. Here’s another thing we have in common: We’re the only Democratic incumbents running in states that Trump won in 2020. Montana and Ohio are considered to be the most competitive and important seats on the map. Polls are virtually tied, and if either of us loses—it’s game-over. [That’s why I’m teaming up with Sherrod to launch our Big Sky Buckeye Fund to raise $500,000 in 48 hours. Will you step up with a split contribution to help Sherrod and me win our critically important elections? ](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta8cde6aa-8df4-4f5a-882a-fe3f8078a0ea/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Sen. Sherrod Brown, Sen. Tester and Blue Amp Action will go through immediately:_ **[Express Donate: $5](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0245665a-dcca-4eda-8871-d0e8cd065596/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** **[Express Donate: $10](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te736c9b3-c5a2-432a-83df-eaafdc02b812/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** **[Express Donate: $25](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4460e851-9b66-432c-bb67-cab1e466da23/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** **[Or, donate another amount](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tca1bae2a-f409-4577-af59-22a540ab9ed2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**
|
---
| | | | | We’ve got a steep hill to climb if we want to win on Election Day. Mitch McConnell has personally named us as his top targets, and CNN ranks us the top two most vulnerable Democratic senators in the country. Don’t get me wrong. We both know how to win tough fights—we each won our last election because we built the strongest grassroots teams the country has ever seen. But the stakes are even higher now. Races are more expensive, and we’ll need to overcome the mountains of money that Mitch McConnell and his cronies are already throwing at us. Simply put: We can’t win without you, Peter. That’s why Sherrod and I are launching a critical fundraising push today to defend Montana and Ohio’s Senate seats. [We set a must-hit goal of raising $500,000 in 48 hours. Can we count on you to split $10 today between our campaigns? It’ll go a long way to help us keep fighting for the hardworking people of Montana and Ohio in the Senate. ](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6e797520-732d-435d-bbba-eae4ee0d76ea/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [DONATE](https://default.salsalabs.org/T16707377-92da-4496-b83f-d8256126e199/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| When Sherrod and I win our races, it will be because of folks like you stepping up in moments like these. Thank you, Jon
---
|
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | [DONATE NOW](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tdf69c8f7-9bc4-4814-94d9-d66b3bc43a26/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---

---|---
| **Blue Amp Action PAC**
PO Box 8384, Cincinnati, OH 45208
---
| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/yyz_op_testerbrown_231120-n?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf1397e32-c48b-4047-aa00-f3147f5fb2d5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---

name: Andrew Lorinser
subject: Spring chicken
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE FRIENDS OF DR
body:
I call him the Bernie Sanders of Michigan.
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92793/images/TOP.png]
Friend,
I am writing to you today to request your support in my father's campaign for the US Congress.
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92793/images/Bob%20Lorinser_2.png]
As a family member, it's natural that I would support my father. However, I left my career in marketing to join Bob Lorinser's campaign not because it was about him, but because his vision is about us, you and me. I believe in his character, principles, and the causes for which he stands.
If you agree, please contribute today and help me give thanks to a great candidate and a great father. He needs you. [actblue.com/donate/andrewforbob]
CONTRIBUTE [actblue.com/donate/andrewforbob]
Friend,
My father is no spring chicken. I'm a millennial, and we're generations apart. Nevertheless, Bob Lorinser is the best advocate for my generation regarding healthcare, a fair economy, and a sustainable climate.
I sometimes get caught up in negative identity politics. It's refreshing to have a candidate who rejects that entirely, because he looks beyond his own identity and is concerned for all of us.
My wife and I — and countless other progressive feminists — passionately support Bob Lorinser because we know he'll fight for women's rights. He understands what it's like to be in a doctor's office with a patient in the most vulnerable situation of her life.
He has provided healthcare with empathy for the past 40 years, and he will legislate from empathy for the generations that follow us.
In 2020, I wrote this about Bernie Sanders, and it's how it's how I feel about my dad today:
"I had a few internal hurdles to leap to "feel the burn", hurdles of ageism, and a clutch to the establishment. The great women in my life showed me a vote for Bernie isn't just a vote for a revolutionary man, it's a political uprising. It's an entire movement."
We're on a different scale in Bob's run for Congress, but that same sense of "It's not me, it's us" is what keeps me committed to my father's campaign. He's an issues candidate.
My father is the only practicing doctor in the nation running for Congress to pass Medicare for All , a cause deeply important to me. I'm comforted to know he's also an experienced diplomat and there's no one better to fight for universal healthcare or save Social Security than my father, Bob Lorinser.
Electable viability in our district? No problem. Bernie won Michigan. Bernie won my district. We need a progressive fighter, and we have it in Bob Lorinser.
My dad needs your help getting to Washington to stand up to the radical Right. Friend, if you're able, please join me giving thanks [actblue.com/donate/andrewforbob] to Bob Lorinser for running with a generous contribution today. We must keep the momentum strong!
Thank you.
Sincerely,
Andrew Lorinser
CONTRIBUTE [actblue.com/donate/andrewforbob]
Or send a check to:
"Friends of Dr. Bob"
PO Box 936
Marquette, MI 49855

He has provided healthcare with empathy for the past 40 years, and he will legislate from empathy for the generations that follow us. In 2020, I wrote this about Bernie Sanders, and it's how it's how I feel about my dad today: "I had a few internal hurdles to leap to "feel the burn", hurdles of ageism, and a clutch to the establishment. The great women in my life showed me a vote for Bernie isn't just a vote for a revolutionary man, it's a political uprising. It's an entire movement." We're on a different scale in Bob's run for Congress, but that same sense of "It's not me, it's us" is what keeps me committed to my father's campaign. He's an issues candidate. My father is the only practicing doctor in the nation running for Congress to pass Medicare for All , a cause deeply important to me. I'm comforted to know he's also an experienced diplomat and there's no one better to fight for universal healthcare or save Social Security than my father, Bob Lorinser. Electable viability in our district? No problem. Bernie won Michigan. Bernie won my district. We need a progressive fighter, and we have it in Bob Lorinser. My dad needs your help getting to Washington to stand up to the radical Right. Friend, if you're able, please join me giving thanks [actblue.com/donate/andrewforbob] to Bob Lorinser for running with a generous contribution today. We must keep the momentum strong! Thank you. Sincerely, Andrew Lorinser CONTRIBUTE [actblue.com/donate/andrewforbob] Or send a check to: "Friends of Dr. Bob" PO Box 936 Marquette, MI 49855

We're in the fight of our lives to save America, and it's a fight we can't win without YOU! Turning Point Action is leading the Right with CHASE THE VOTE, our innovative ballot-chasing strategy to ensure EVERY Conservative in a battleground state VOTES.

But we learned -- and now, with YOUR support, Turning Point Action is determined to make a difference and get out the vote to WIN BIG in 2024. name: =?utf-8?Q?Suzanne=20Crouch?=
subject: A View From The Campaign Trail
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Suzanne Crouch
body:
Taking a brief pause on the campaign trail to connect with you all and share the exciting happenings from the past week!

https://www.crouchforindiana.com/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=3266f85ed4-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_11_18_09_55&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-3266f85ed4-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Friends and fellow Hoosiers,

Taking a brief pause on the campaign trail to connect with you all and share the exciting happenings from the past week. It's been an incredible journey, and I am grateful for the support and enthusiasm I witness every day.

Read on for last week's highlights!

** Meeting with the Professional Fire Fighters Union of Indiana
------------------------------------------------------------
https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=3266f85ed4-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_11_18_09_55&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-3266f85ed4-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

It was an honor to meet with members of the Professional Fire Fighters Union of Indiana to discuss ways to support and ensure our brave firefighters have the necessary resources to keep Hoosiers safe.

Their commitment to public safety is unparalleled, and I am committed to working together to prioritize their needs and the well-being of our communities.

** Cheering on the Screaming Eagles
------------------------------------------------------------

https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=3266f85ed4-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_11_18_09_55&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-3266f85ed4-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Last week, I had the pleasure of cheering on the University of Southern Indiana Screaming Eagles courtside, joined by Rep. Tim O'Brien.

Being there to witness the prowess of the Screaming Eagles made me even more proud of my hometown and the incredible talent it fosters!

** Last Week's Endorsements
------------------------------------------------------------
https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=3266f85ed4-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_11_18_09_55&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-3266f85ed4-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

"Suzanne has played a pivotal role in advancing the interests of Hartford City, collaborating closely with our community ... I️ take pride in our collaborative relationship and am confident in Suzanne's ability to continue to champion our city's interest at the state level."

https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=3266f85ed4-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_11_18_09_55&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-3266f85ed4-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

“Suzanne’s record of strong conservative leadership is unmatched. She travels the state and listens to Hoosiers more than anyone I know. She will make a wonderful Governor, and has my full support.”
https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=3266f85ed4-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_11_18_09_55&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-3266f85ed4-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

"Suzanne is a strong conservative with a clear vision of how to help Hoosiers thorughout this great state. Suzanne has experience in local and state government and will use this knowledge to bring her vision to reality. I️ am happy to endorse Suzanne Crouch as the next Governor of Indiana."

https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=3266f85ed4-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_11_18_09_55&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-3266f85ed4-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

"Suzanne has a sincere passion for Indiana. Her leadership has been on display in our small community through her solution-oriented approach, and through an unwavering dedication to citizens. She will help strengthen our great state. It is my honor to support Suzanne Crouch for Governor of Indiana.”

** Last but not least...
------------------------------------------------------------

As we navigate the campaign trail, your support continues to fuel our commitment to building a stronger, more vibrant Indiana. Together, we are shaping a future where our communities thrive, and our Hoosier values endure.

I look forward to the road ahead and the opportunities to connect with even more Hoosiers!

Onward and upward,

Let's keep the conversation going! Follow me on social to keep up with the campaign. Have questions, comments or concerns? Send me an email!

clean_body: Taking a brief pause on the campaign trail to connect with you all and share the exciting happenings from the past week! Friends and fellow Hoosiers, Taking a brief pause on the campaign trail to connect with you all and share the exciting happenings from the past week. It's been an incredible journey, and I am grateful for the support and enthusiasm I witness every day. Read on for last week's highlights! Meeting with the Professional Fire Fighters Union of Indiana It was an honor to meet with members of the Professional Fire Fighters Union of Indiana to discuss ways to support and ensure our brave firefighters have the necessary resources to keep Hoosiers safe. Their commitment to public safety is unparalleled, and I am committed to working together to prioritize their needs and the well-being of our communities. Cheering on the Screaming Eagles Last week, I had the pleasure of cheering on the University of Southern Indiana Screaming Eagles courtside, joined by Rep. Tim O'Brien. Being there to witness the prowess of the Screaming Eagles made me even more proud of my hometown and the incredible talent it fosters! Last Week's Endorsements "Suzanne has played a pivotal role in advancing the interests of Hartford City, collaborating closely with our community ... I️ take pride in our collaborative relationship and am confident in Suzanne's ability to continue to champion our city's interest at the state level." “Suzanne’s record of strong conservative leadership is unmatched. She travels the state and listens to Hoosiers more than anyone I know. She will make a wonderful Governor, and has my full support.” "Suzanne is a strong conservative with a clear vision of how to help Hoosiers thorughout this great state. Suzanne has experience in local and state government and will use this knowledge to bring her vision to reality. I️ am happy to endorse Suzanne Crouch as the next Governor of Indiana." "Suzanne has a sincere passion for Indiana. Her leadership has been on display in our small community through her solution-oriented approach, and through an unwavering dedication to citizens. She will help strengthen our great state. It is my honor to support Suzanne Crouch for Governor of Indiana.” Last but not least... As we navigate the campaign trail, your support continues to fuel our commitment to building a stronger, more vibrant Indiana. Together, we are shaping a future where our communities thrive, and our Hoosier values endure. I look forward to the road ahead and the opportunities to connect with even more Hoosiers! Onward and upward, Let's keep the conversation going! Follow me on social to keep up with the campaign. Have questions, comments or concerns? Send me an email! Facebook () Twitter () Instagram () Website () mailto:info@crouchforindiana.com Email (mailto:info@crouchforindiana.com) Get Involved! Ready to make an impact? By joining my campaign, there are several ways that YOU can be a catalyst for change! Tap the "Get Involved" button below to get hands-on with the campaign, request yard signs, host an event and more. GET INVOLVED () Attend one of my upcoming fundraisers! Your support plays a pivotal role in our mission to connect with Hoosiers across the state and convey our vision for Indiana's future. If you'd like to be a part of our journey and attend one of our upcoming fundraisers, here's the list of events: For more information or to RSVP, contact Heather at: heather@crouchforindiana.com (mailto:heather@crouchforindiana.com) or 615-438-3531 (tel:6154383531) . Show Your Support - Get Suzanne Crouch Merchandise! As our campaign gains momentum, I'm excited to introduce a way for you to show your support and wear your pride for Indiana on your sleeve (literally)! body:
IT’S OFFICIAL: I *WILL* APPEAR ON THE BALLOT IN 2024!| | | [](https://link.donaldjtrump.com/u/click?_t=c26d591425684a3289b90149d613a03c&_m=349c1d51022a4571b4beb68ee0565222&_e=VnXB5OkjP5TDtE61FtSp0QxTpJI5Se_DscOD0vceyTYllMQ4Q0EcdRhPQr3YNa95vHTTMKaS35YbnQfYZylcizVKrKQEaRQ9qYNweFjF_DRAjlWaQ3DsjWSa6jKgNoVfwhHytIUTJ00w02D4VA88aPRRj_lP7myrI09zzeqpZPmz55MQJf6dX1AhjVh398sEfjkO5gGeTKw-uWxmWYkcoCbVAFxvIncKfQwIGEsnd8JNROgpuP_EAoltp-Wc9dKacbXKF9wDwl2KkXM7xXBZC2MsbCeNxeLA5MD1Munb43QptB7bd4iFCmCkGFIF97qsJCRJt8U4takpm_HHKgiQPxg07Fdpema7biIo-h8sugaQhE6kzC0pdeJgeHfWj7EWtMOec9k3S7oJS18FHrQYKmO1R2L7mr_H1pjSNkF1l6WeVV-t-mNWvoHmJAC49KSkSVQf9ugYPCUNWUOzdFUGW5FJpF_lxVVowLNplVZhVOw4AUak5WOs1pqj9JdlAh-5)
---
| | Patriot,

---
As I write you this email, Crooked Joe is trembling in fear.
---
A judge in Colorado has officially _**DISMISSED**_ the fourth attempt to REMOVE my name from the ballot.
---
Your favorite President _(me)_WILL__ appear on the ballot in the 2024 election!
---
Joe Biden hoped he could find a Democrat judge to do his dirty work and illegally remove my name from the ballot... But his tyrannical dream turned out to be a failure just like his disastrous presidency.
---
He can no longer hide. _The verdict is in: Biden will be forced to face “DONALD J. TRUMP” in the 2024 election._
---
But he won’t just be facing me...
---
**...He will be facing the millions and millions of Americans who will _NEVER_ _FORGET_ when tyrannical Soros-funded Democrats attempted to ROB HALF OF THE COUNTRY OF YOUR RIGHT TO VOTE and STEAL the 2024 ELECTION.**
---
_On the heels of this victory, let’s show Crooked Joe just how determined we are to win back the White House and MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN with a goal of 100,000 grassroots contributions._
---
(If you’re doing poorly due to the very sinister people in control of Washington right now who not only want to rob you of your vote, but also your economic livelihood, then please do not worry about donating at this time! I only wanted to update you on this major victory.)
---

Fellow Patriot,
In Washington, Conservative women are loathed by the left – and we must stick together.
That’s why I’ve been so grateful to work with my friend, fellow Florida Congressman Maria Salazar.
Not only is she a conservative voice of reason in the House, but she’s also agreed to reach out to supporters on my behalf to help me as I fight for reelection.

Fellow Patriot,
As a former journalist, I’ve heard every story imaginable, and I’ve talked to every type of person imaginable – so it can be pretty tough to impress me.
But Rep. Kat Cammack is as impressive as it gets.
She grew up homeless – yet in 2020, **she was the youngest conservative woman elected to Congress****.**
In her first two years, the Democrats held the majority in the House, so needless to say she was at battle every day for the American people.
But she’s been so effective as a conservative, that now she has a target on her back.
I’m going to do everything in my power to help her, and I’m writing to you today to ask you to do the same.
Kat Cammack’s reelection campaign depends on the support of patriots like you, Fellow Patriot. Can she count on you to step up?

---

Kat Cammack is serving her second term representing the people of Northeastern Florida in Congress. She won the seat on a conservative platform of growing jobs, securing our southern border, standing up for law enforcement, defending our Second Amendment, promoting fiscal responsibility, and defending life.
Congresswoman Cammack sits on the House Committee on Energy and Commerce and House Committee on Agriculture, where she is the only Florida Republican serving the Sunshine State's farmers, ranchers, and producers. She was also appointed to the Select Subcommittee on the Weaponization of the Federal Government.
Kat and her husband Matt, who is a firefighter, paramedic, and SWAT medic, proudly call Gainesville, Florida home.

clean_body: | | | | Fellow Patriot, In Washington, Conservative women are loathed by the left – and we must stick together. That’s why I’ve been so grateful to work with my friend, fellow Florida Congressman Maria Salazar. Not only is she a conservative voice of reason in the House, but she’s also agreed to reach out to supporters on my behalf to help me as I fight for reelection. If you have the time, I’ve attached her email below for you to read for yourself. Thank you for your time, | | Rep. Kat Cammack Congressman FL-3 \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Maria Salazar <info@katcammack.com> Date: Sat, Nov 18, 2023 at 11:00 AM Subject: re: An ally for REAL people Fellow Patriot, As a former journalist, I’ve heard every story imaginable, and I’ve talked to every type of person imaginable – so it can be pretty tough to impress me. But Rep. Kat Cammack is as impressive as it gets. She grew up homeless – yet in 2020, she was the youngest conservative woman elected to Congress. In her first two years, the Democrats held the majority in the House, so needless to say she was at battle every day for the American people. But she’s been so effective as a conservative, that now she has a target on her back. I’m going to do everything in my power to help her, and I’m writing to you today to ask you to do the same. Kat Cammack’s reelection campaign depends on the support of patriots like you, Fellow Patriot. Can she count on you to step up? | | | | | | So many politicians in Washington are only looking out for themselves – so Kat’s relentless selflessness is both refreshing and much-needed. And trust me – it isn’t just her constituents that benefit from her presence in Washington... It’s any American who values life, liberty, and freedom. 2024 is going to be an uphill battle – Kat is going to need every penny she can get. That’s why it’s so important that you give your absolute best contribution TODAY – so that she’s prepared for what comes next. Thank you, | | Rep. Maria Salazar Congresswoman FL-27 | | "Facebook" | "Twitter" | "Instagram" ---|---|--- | Kat Cammack is serving her second term representing the people of Northeastern Florida in Congress. She won the seat on a conservative platform of growing jobs, securing our southern border, standing up for law enforcement, defending our Second Amendment, promoting fiscal responsibility, and defending life. Congresswoman Cammack sits on the House Committee on Energy and Commerce and House Committee on Agriculture, where she is the only Florida Republican serving the Sunshine State's farmers, ranchers, and producers. She was also appointed to the Select Subcommittee on the Weaponization of the Federal Government. Kat and her husband Matt, who is a firefighter, paramedic, and SWAT medic, proudly call Gainesville, Florida home. | | FOLLOW KAT ONLINE | "Facebook" | "Twitter" | "Instagram" ---|---|--- Donate by Mail Kat For Congress 5200 NW 43rd Street SUITE 102-180 Gainesville, FL, 32606 | | [PAID FOR BY KAT FOR CONGRESS]() Kat Cammack 5200 NW 43rd st, suite 102-180, Gainesville, FL 32606 = \- =

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Alternative to pro-trans Scholastic book fairs
body:
Here’s what we’re up against.

[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c36759%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=vztNtKDlXgR3jZjzRdMWEg&sysid=1 "SkyTree Book Fairs")

Friend,

SkyTree Book Fair and I did a deep dive and discovered the cause of why sexually explicit and disgusting books get into our children’s schools, classrooms, and libraries.

Here’s what we’re up against.

These are books Scholastic promotes at book fairs in schools. Here are pages from “Welcome to St. Hell,” a 2022 Scholastic book glamorizing gender transitioning to middle schoolers. (We’ve censored these pages as the original content could violate social media policies against adult material):

[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c36750%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=AcMRQePPFHJXVl4BcGyAFw&sysid=1)[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c36750%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=AcMRQePPFHJXVl4BcGyAFw&sysid=1)

Scholastic holds a virtual monopoly on school book fairs. Like many of our cultural institutions in the last decade, Scholastic has fallen prey to the woke mob and radical LGBT political agenda.

Scholastic promotes this agenda over the well-being of our children.

**Here is the solution:**

SkyTree Book Fair offers schools a different option for book fairs. SkyTree Book Fairs is providing schools, parents, and children with an empowering alternative with literature rooted in truth and family values that matches the quality and ease of Scholastic while countering their harmful agenda.

Here’s how you can help.

[I am asking for your urgent support to help SkyTree replace Scholastic in schools. Can you donate $35, $50, or even $100 today toward Sky Tree? We are kicking off with a goal to raise $100,000 this month.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c36751%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Ac33bmDPAaUM84jxQb7vpg&sysid=1)

[Donate](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c36752%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=kPJzfwwuC%2flJyo%2fAC326JQ&sysid=1)

SkyTree was inspired by my first children’s book, As You Grow. Now, I am helping them spread to schools across the country as an alternative to Scholastic. And here’s the thing: SkyTree will not only promote age-appropriate books, but they will do so more efficiently to make it easier for schools to choose SkyTree over Scholastic.

And it’s working!

SkyTree has already secured its first public school book fair in Spotsylvania, VA!

No more race-infused storylines. No more confusing gender content. Only age-appropriate content that will nurture childhood innocence and character.

SkyTree needs your support today. American children need your support today!!

We are quickly lining up hundreds of new book fairs in the Spring semester. It costs roughly $7,500 to host a book fair. Please help sponsor SkyTree book fairs in schools across the country.

[Donate $10 >>](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c36753%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=o%2fV%2fd%2ffqt1GTEnBg0oGHAg&sysid=1)

[Donate $35 >>](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c36754%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=qWq9Rq1HwdOAL63%2btc%2fNKg&sysid=1)

[Donate $50 >>](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c36765%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=6aZJFts6RMAk87WgYBh7BQ&sysid=1)

[Donate $100 >>](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c36766%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2b%2fCsiYjWRei8fPHRPX6aBg&sysid=1)

[Donate $250 >>](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c36767%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=jOLpMKT3LtUKzaTr4GuNiw&sysid=1)

[Donate $500 >>](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c36768%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2bgJeNEz0sOziDTQvGA3qMQ&sysid=1)

[Donate $1,000 >>](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c36769%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=e7MRgFmMUgx1q5HTwOwXYg&sysid=1)

[Donate Any Amount >>](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c36760%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=fbzblrGdL4dtkebZ9ZNBkQ&sysid=1)

Let’s bring back wholesome content to kids, like what we had growing up. Kids should remain innocent and have content to encourage their moral character while fostering their imagination.

It’s not complicated! It’s what you and I grew up with.

Thank you for helping us offer schools an alternative to Scholastic!

God bless,

Kirk Cameron

P.S. Scholastic’s monopoly on school book fairs has ushered in woke and inappropriate books to kids across the nation.

I’ve partnered with SkyTree Book Fairs to give schools a positive alternative to scholastic.

[Help us raise $100,000 to fund book fairs this spring semester at schools. Click here to donate >>](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c36761%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=92z08pNPThEnoaAfsxSUsQ&sysid=1)

A reminder of what we’re up against:

[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c36762%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ci4OfFofkpuYSrS25MqZUA&sysid=1)

It's time to fight back.

You and I cannot afford to do nothing and let the woke mob indoctrinate millions of children.

[Click here to donate and help SkyTree change the world.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c36763%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=msFXi7LF3LJbbujNKVDy%2bA&sysid=1)

SkyTree Book Fairs is a 501(c)(3) not-for-profit organization. Copyright SkyTree Book Fairs, 2023.

name: Congresswoman Miller-Meeks
subject: We need to know...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Miller-Meeks for Congress
body:
| [](http://links.drmillermeeks.com/u/click?_t=a0459abfcdbb4d8889670e005e3f851c&_m=ff36a293e977494d92fe37ee9da99a40&_e=FOig2aySdF0YgvAY9N92oRFC98c9Ok071obaz6O6XMrt9D68TQaE6O2S4aLwLMZCda9DdwEFCCpHPHgV3uFZzaGlShKDUdYGTtepOqmfiyCnRiP4S__o3kPEZezLOtKOJUE6mbqjKAIfYgYueO8YEhsDPU50XJnV5UTSyI_Z8UF_9HUW7dK_d95x4FDrmn57PMD6Wm50ObbgWJ_o6dIwi3yVnzzwjiaL-N8zhkjyA190j4Hti-irrWA-dHcshDWNtA3XwjhEcgbCi2y0fNDySE4L9jqygCXOP-O0eAjziyfV7S4fNY2RAopisSW57mzXZaw0o0lJ2KfJ3-Pf5Ew2RqNofDou8f8u3CstYbMkPjOfCu61jRE5bVTDa2YXWY95OqP9zAKxObNinbQb04kr7ge2eamfRB1N6GOj3u6wDpUCScSsmTjrQ7crAGgxfe6gbs1suqzmR5RyjOXwK07LN2q3HlTpydK3Zlj3TlvHigQ%3D)
---

Friend,

The reason I ran for office in the first place was to represent the people of Iowa and to try and solve issues to the best of my ability.

We’ve got more issues than you can shake a stick at going on in our country right now. I don’t want to take up too much of your time, but I would love to know which is most important to you.

So, if you could, would you mind taking the one question survey below to let me know what issue is most important to you, and what issue I should focus my efforts on **IMMEDIATELY?**
| [TAKE THE SURVEY](http://links.drmillermeeks.com/u/click?_t=a0459abfcdbb4d8889670e005e3f851c&_m=ff36a293e977494d92fe37ee9da99a40&_e=FOig2aySdF0YgvAY9N92oRFC98c9Ok071obaz6O6XMrt9D68TQaE6O2S4aLwLMZCda9DdwEFCCpHPHgV3uFZzaGlShKDUdYGTtepOqmfiyCnRiP4S__o3kPEZezLOtKOJUE6mbqjKAIfYgYueO8YEhsDPU50XJnV5UTSyI_Z8UF_9HUW7dK_d95x4FDrmn57PMD6Wm50ObbgWJ_o6dIwi3yVnzzwjiaL-N8zhkjyA190j4Hti-irrWA-dHcshDWNtA3XwjhEcgbCi2y0fNDySE4L9jqygCXOP-O0eAjziyfV7S4fNY2RAopisSW57mzXZaw0o0lJ2KfJ3-Pf5Ew2RiNhA9dGH6QQnHIhJRcvsfJNkB5c2ltaBHbHULkc89XxDtVYzg7PZCUMR7pUYShFKVHg5xSGEdBUrmC_h374TiDZ8HajrFMp-IFKrIwDNtyNNtlOJafBH8vJQflg4VHLPH3N1p3YFhGg9S82Ha1blyo%3D)
---

I’m going to fight for you and for solutions to all these issues, but I just want to know where to focus my energy the most right now.

Thank you for letting me serve you.

God Bless,

[](http://links.drmillermeeks.com/u/click?_t=a0459abfcdbb4d8889670e005e3f851c&_m=ff36a293e977494d92fe37ee9da99a40&_e=FOig2aySdF0YgvAY9N92oRFC98c9Ok071obaz6O6XMrt9D68TQaE6O2S4aLwLMZCda9DdwEFCCpHPHgV3uFZzaGlShKDUdYGTtepOqmfiyCnRiP4S__o3kPEZezLOtKOJUE6mbqjKAIfYgYueO8YEhsDPU50XJnV5UTSyI_Z8UF_9HUW7dK_d95x4FDrmn57PMD6Wm50ObbgWJ_o6dIwi3yVnzzwjiaL-N8zhkjyA190j4Hti-irrWA-dHcshDWNtA3XwjhEcgbCi2y0fNDySE4L9jqygCXOP-O0eAjziyfV7S4fNY2RAopisSW57mzXZaw0o0lJ2KfJ3-Pf5Ew2Rm_gESa27_fnkluIMLy49VCli9yl5nGUNoAaOMkkQ1Y9IKnTqOt-YPU66xbBpIFWTM71-LegdbPUC4icytJPBt3ULNb55sMpRX1B7oN8wRXtKkEYebnqHTT7x3mjo2MHUhx_x8mpaQ3ZvnVW1ZUQUvk%3D)

I'm thinking about whether we're going to wake up the day after Election Day full of pride and hope for our country — or if we're going to wake up with a sinking pit in our stomach, full of regret that we didn't do more. **Five years ago, we let Rick Scott buy a Senate seat. There's no way I'm letting that happen again next year — _especially with our Senate majority on the line in Florida._**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mark=20Ronchetti?=
subject: 🤯 Trump: Too Harsh or Too Soft?
body:
PLUS, an HGTV Nightmare Scandal! A new No Doubt About It Podcast is ready for dpwillis67@gmail.com to stream right now. | | | | | |
---
[](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=a71c931abb&e=567664f14c)

We're thrilled to bring you the [latest episode](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=6bdba6d86d&e=567664f14c) of the No Doubt About It podcast with Mark and Krysty Ronchetti, and this one is a Thanksgiving treat you won't want to miss!
[](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=ab233b59f4&e=567664f14c)
In this episode, Mark and Krysty set the stage for Thanksgiving week with a mix of TV entertainment suggestions, a lively debate on the worst Thanksgiving foods, and a dive into listener emails.

**Some listeners express frustration that Mark isn't always "nice enough" to President Trump, while others argue he's "too nice."** It's a balancing act that Mark is used to walking.
| [STREAM EPISODE 54 NOW](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=995d5cd1cc&e=567664f14c)
---
We then turn their attention to a troubling article in the Albuquerque Journal that printed anti-Semitic views without challenging them. We dissect this alarming combination of bias and incompetence that led to the article.
The episode continues with a candid look at Joe Biden's declining popularity and the growing speculation that **Democrats may need to consider another candidate.**
| [STREAM EPISODE 54 NOW](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=eb63c2549d&e=567664f14c)
---
Wrapping up the episode, Krysty offers valuable insights for designers and clients in the wake of an **HGTV scandal** , where the network is accused of causing harm to homes featured on their shows. It's a compelling discussion about ethics and responsibility in the design industry.
[](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=6d0e8b53ef&e=567664f14c)
We invite you to [listen, like, and subscribe](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=02ac7310bd&e=567664f14c) to the No Doubt About It podcast on your favorite platform to stay updated with our latest episodes. Additionally, don't forget to [subscribe to our YouTube channel](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=94c3b207e2&e=567664f14c) for exclusive content.

Support the podcast by visiting our website at [NoDoubtAboutItPodcast.com](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=6272021b6e&e=567664f14c), where you can purchase gear and make financial donations. Your support means the world to us!

Thank you for being part of the No Doubt About It community, and we look forward to sharing more entertaining and thought-provoking discussions with you in the future.

Best regards,
Mark and Krysty Ronchetti
|
---
|
---
| | | _© 2023 Choose Adventure Media. All rights reserved._

Our mailing address is:
8100 Wyoming Blvd NESTE M4, #171Albuquerque, NM 87113

You can [update your preferences](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/profile?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=bfca9dc257&e=567664f14c&c=c9a1d70bf0) or [unsubscribe](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=bfca9dc257&e=567664f14c&c=c9a1d70bf0)

If we're going to save our Senate majority and block the GOP from undoing all the progress Kirsten has fought so hard to secure for our families, we must close this final gap by midnight.
**So please, this is the last call, friend:[Will you rush $5 or more right now so Kirsten can reach this crucial goal, keep the Senate blue and continue fighting for the issues that matter most?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73669090/439276519/-2054302023?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4514-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMmVjMTIyNi1iNDg3LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NKz5JXxiJIcdmp3JeD8kby0ukgfEXhZbVCdB-RioeTQ=)**
