From: **Defend the Senate**
Date: Sun, Nov 19, 2023
Subject: coming up short tonight
| | |
---
Friend, this is urgent: **Kirsten is falling short of her LAST $20,000 weekly goal before our end-of-month deadline.** This is the worst time to be falling behind our projections!
Election experts are warning that Republicans have a "clear path" to retaking the Senate in November. If that happens, we can say goodbye to all the critical progress that Kirsten is fighting for!

Just look at the chaos and extremism running rampant in the House since the GOP took control. They nearly shutdown our government. They schemed to cut Social Security benefits. They've launched a totally baseless impeachment inquiry against President Biden. And now, they can't even elect a speaker of the House!
If we let the Senate fall into GOP hands, President Biden's agenda will be DOOMED.

name: Jim Gaughran
subject: Please Join Us for an Event in NYC (Details Inside)
body:
https://jimgaughran.com/ [https://jimgaughran.com/]
Dear Peter,
I am reaching out to invite you to an event my friends in NYC are hosting for my campaign for US Congress. I hope you can join us! You can RSVP HERE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/120423nyc] .
The event will take place in Manhattan on Monday, December 4th from 6PM to 8PM . The address will be provided to all who RSVP [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/120423nyc] at least 48 hours in advance of the event.
I am running in New York’s First Congressional District in Suffolk County, which combines Suffolks’ North Shore communities with the Hamptons. The DCCC has called NY-1 a 2024 District In Play, which means that it has potential to be won by either party. NY-1 is one of the 18 districts that President Biden won in 2020 that is currently represented by a Republican in Congress. It is one of the most competitive districts in the country.
Having represented this community for many years at the state and local level, I know what it takes to flip NY-1 Blue. My Republican opponent, Nick Lalota, is pro-Trump, pro-gun lobby and ready to ban abortion nationally. I have protected reproductive rights, passed gun safety measures, and safeguarded Long Island’s environment. As a Long Island native and former State Senator, I am ready to put in the work to win this race.
Please RSVP to the event at this link! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/120423nyc]
You can reach out to Emily Sherron at emily@bhstrategiesllc.com [emily@bhstrategiesllc.com] or 713-213-1922 with any questions.
I hope to see you on December 4th!
Best,
Jim
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/120423nyc [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/120423nyc]
https://www.facebook.com/ [https://www.facebook.com/] https://twitter.com/ [https://twitter.com/] https://instagram.com/ [https://instagram.com/] https://www.linkedin.com/ [https://www.linkedin.com/]

Gaughran 2020
P.O. BOX 20574
HUNTINGTON STATION, NY 11746
United States

name: Linda Beigel Schulman
subject: A Gun Safety Champion in New York
body:
https://jimgaughran.com/ [https://jimgaughran.com/]
Dear Peter,
I know you believe, as I do, that America desperately needs reasonable gun safety reform . After my son Scott died saving 31 students in the Parkland High School massacre, I devoted my life to advancing the cause of gun safety in every way I could. I started here at home because I live in New York.
Jim Gaughran took up the cause of reasonable gun safety immediately . From his first day as State Senator, Jim was a champion for passing major reforms in our state’s gun laws. Without hesitation, Jim fought hard to make the people of New York safer, and he succeeded.
Jim’s gun safety accomplishments include:
*
Passing
a
“Red
Flag
Law”
to
prevent
high-risk
individuals
from
purchasing
firearms
*
Banning
the
sale
of
untraceable
“ghost
guns”
*
Prohibiting
rapid-fire
gun
modifications
or
“bump
stocks”
*
Requiring
firearms
to
be
stored
in
a
locked
container
when
children
are
in
a
home
*
Authorizing
law
enforcement
to
confiscate
gun
from
convicted
domestic
abusers
Now Jim is running for Congress on Long Island against a vulnerable one-term incumbent who opposes common sense gun safety laws [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jim-gaughran-4-congress] like those he has passed. I am the Chairperson of Jim’s campaign because I know what a difference he can make, and what an improvement he will be over his opponent.
I hope you will consider making a donation to his campaign - the link to do so is right here [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jim-gaughran-4-congress] .
With gratitude,
Linda Beigel Schulman
Linda, Jim, and Linda’s husband Michael have been partners in battling gun violence [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP05/1/71985/images/Linda%2C%20Jim%2C%20and%20Linda%E2%80%99s%20husband%20Michael%20have%20been%20partners%20in%20battling%20gun%20violence.jpg]

name: TeamCori
subject: Tell Biden: Demand the Israeli government ban the use of white phosphorus
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
body:
it’s illegal under international law when it’s used close to civilians | |
---
Peter, Team Cori is pro-peace, and pro-humanity. That’s why we’re taking a stand against white phosphorus being used as a weapon of war. **White phosphorus is a devastating weapon**. When the chemical comes in contact with people, it causes horrendous burns, excruciating pain, and death. White phosphorus burns on just 10 percent of the human body are often fatal. The aftermath of its use is also more than physical; survivors endure lifelong psychological trauma due to these injuries. And**it’s illegal under international law when it’s used close to civilians** Yet Human Rights Watch and Amnesty International have verified the Israeli military used white phosphorus last month, exposing innocent people in Gaza and southern Lebanon, including children, to unimaginable suffering. **The United States, as one of Israel’s key allies, should do all it can to continue to push for an immediate ceasefire and end the indiscriminate suffering of millions of Palestinians — including ending the use of white phosphorus in Gaza.** White phosphorus is just one of the many weapons currently being used by the Israeli government that disproportionately harm innocent people. How do we know? Because the Pentagon used this weapon in Iraq in 2004. That’s why, for this demand to be taken seriously, the Biden administration needs to lead by example. And we need to pressure them to make the right choice. **** [**Can you call on President Biden to demand the Israeli government ban the use of white phosphorus in its military operations and commit the United States to the same life-saving standard?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnk4wHTn5vb2ybkfx5v80X3YOSkHsPNdOx5bm5FkJ67chfBgVjOEmf1I8Xk999LiIWUA9kGxWUydYFEWbnS8ySCcximmu9Vta8tX7HqmZ23HzHY_sViRNK_08_CBkLSHPl00Jj6WNFDwMT6DFaSyHnM3ET1x_igXwT2m7HuXwnkre0ORQpLMb-MM0G3eNWG3tD7LoW3Tc9YoMAfrrZ5v-fwz9UinG1xFKd0vkyjNMtg0mRBL42Q4SSeuqQqa0y8xJnm5m8V2tCu7CufQty1fQxgzigS_jjMtxWwC393NBfF9M5LFTv2z2Eri8tstu-Rz9zNnEnp2igNxkoprSE1dNWxIJrKyeI9OXcAMj8GExc6d0cFGsvGgSC16Qsk95KArhZuWoZs4wYhUUNpiqwrmj4fRH-ys3pDpqW9Qvjo-7JhRYDFmqQO6yIpKkyXDO8kGQU1DNTuNJi3QYyV3D8R3SnW-uKATJeG_uZtKcUmGac3G-g/41g/cU4S77a3SrO3xcUCUL6atg/h0/C6ufl5cdMptO2QR1Jjk4oi2nC4c59W_CqrbvFfUK55Q) **[ADD YOUR NAME TO BAN WHITE PHOSPHORUS >>](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnk4wHTn5vb2ybkfx5v80X3YOSkHsPNdOx5bm5FkJ67chfBgVjOEmf1I8Xk999LiIWUA9kGxWUydYFEWbnS8ySCcximmu9Vta8tX7HqmZ23HzHY_sViRNK_08_CBkLSHPl00Jj6WNFDwMT6DFaSyHnM3ET1x_igXwT2m7HuXwnkre0ORQpLMb-MM0G3eNWG3tD7LoW3Tc9YoMAfrrZ5v-fwz6H8tyEggrAWyBD4D_m27qRXb_kej-GtmJl-TbTMGoO0LwU9WQKX_Ft-RNxGHEqERDoBkWIxtx7YKm29EKl9u6c6FjXEGgavjNsNX9U3frYzALPYsVIgEtTIuPwZ9t7GWCj17GAgsO-PZvKa4y-3V3Xm2ylzAz4NRjwjFKnBELYKjmMKg6QwfHQ5w8s4mSbM-vc3oZFkcYBFPz0sByPIP5Tt1c4f-3lJ5A-0LfuZ7fz4hpoAG4ErCV-B7nw18TE3F936TtnmBUlOkmydJ7pgIVQ/41g/cU4S77a3SrO3xcUCUL6atg/h1/c5DEhL5RP3NIbHQW1zl_Ot3R9rumf1j1rcNjpQwXdFo) **

That’s why we’re taking a stand against white phosphorus being used as a weapon of war. White phosphorus is a devastating weapon. When the chemical comes in contact with people, it causes horrendous burns, excruciating pain, and death. White phosphorus burns on just 10 percent of the human body are often fatal. The aftermath of its use is also more than physical; survivors endure lifelong psychological trauma due to these injuries. Andit’s illegal under international law when it’s used close to civilians Yet Human Rights Watch and Amnesty International have verified the Israeli military used white phosphorus last month, exposing innocent people in Gaza and southern Lebanon, including children, to unimaginable suffering. The United States, as one of Israel’s key allies, should do all it can to continue to push for an immediate ceasefire and end the indiscriminate suffering of millions of Palestinians — including ending the use of white phosphorus in Gaza. body:

**Tell me before midnight:**
**Who would you support for president?**
| | | [Biden](https://go.dscc.org/go/16556?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20231120-JamesCarville-CarvilleStrawPoll-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20231120-JamesCarville-CarvilleStrawPoll-ETG-sl1&akid=12651%2E9716520%2E10-8G-)

Now that you know why I'm in your inbox, let me elaborate real quick: **2024 is gonna be one of the most important election years I can remember -- and I've been in this business for a long time.**

Between Donald Trump's indictment-palooza and Mike Johnson's chaos caucus, Republicans are behaving like a bunch of clowns right now. But if they win the House, the White House, and even the Senate in 2024, their act won't be funny -- it'll be TERRIFYING.

To stop 'em, I've got to know the lay of the land. **I launched this straw poll to confirm where things stand, but it looks like I'm missing your answer -- and you only have 'til midnight to answer!

Please, before the poll closes, don't let me down. Answer now:**

**Who would you support for president?**
| | [Biden](https://go.dscc.org/go/16556?ask=5&t=9&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20231120-JamesCarville-CarvilleStrawPoll-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20231120-JamesCarville-CarvilleStrawPoll-ETG-sl1&akid=12651%2E9716520%2E10-8G-)

name: Eve Schiff
subject: My Thanksgiving reflections
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| Our family shares the conviction that our country is filled with promise, and that our democracy is precious.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=4515%2E5257348%2EgwFLdO)
Hi Derek — It’s Eve, Adam’s wife.
Right now, we are all making final arrangements for Thanksgiving, but I wanted to check in with you before the holiday.
As families all across America prepare to gather around the table, I’ve been taking some time to reflect on the many many ways I am grateful this year.
[](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=nov2023_abs_em.uaqk5d&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20231120_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=4515%2E5257348%2EgwFLdO)
I am deeply grateful for our family. I am grateful for the times we have together, that my kids enjoy each other’s company (it wasn’t always that way), and that Adam has been such a good husband and father.
It’s holidays like these that remind me of the impact that family can have and how fortunate I have been.
And this Thanksgiving, I’m also grateful for the support you have given Adam and me throughout the last several trying years — through all of the hate and jeers, you have had our backs and I’m so appreciative. And I can’t thank you enough for helping Adam through all of the challenges he’s faced since launching his campaign.
We watched as he investigated Trump. And we watched as he led the impeachment trial against him. We watched his work holding people accountable on the January 6th Committee. And how mercilessly he was attacked.
Republicans weaponized their majority to censure Adam because they knew he was effective. They knew that he would stop at nothing to defend our country and uphold our democratic principles.
But Adam was successful in overcoming these attacks. And if he wins this Senate seat, it will also allow him to be an even more powerful defender of our democracy and its institutions.
Because this isn’t about any of the people attacking him. This is about the vision Adam has for the future of California and the vision that I know you share. Where truth, justice, and decency matter. And the oath of office means something.
Our family shares the conviction that our country is filled with promise, and that our democracy is precious. And fragile. Adam has been on the frontlines, protecting it. He always will be. And you have always been by his side. I am so grateful for that.
Before you log off to spend time with your family, I hope you will give him a huge show of support for his Senate campaign. It would mean so much to me. After all, we’re all in this fight together.
**[That’s why I’m asking: Can Adam and I count on you chipping in $3 right now?](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=nov2023_abs_em.uaqk5d&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20231120_AM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=3&t=5&akid=4515%2E5257348%2EgwFLdO)**

subject: GAG ORDER LIFTED
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J
body:
So, I will speak my mind...
| | | [ ](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kcGq2zAQRb9mvLORRorkLLx4qRoogVIotKWbIEtyMq-WbGy5If36opC87bmX4R7Gxnmk4d6BPgDilfwKiCDeAPEkD7--qtPPk6n7z_e32qidvJUUPwFivs_ho_q80oRoaSxUm8p36Fp0rgod14zJvZKsra4dBqdawbkdpNvvZW-1FRJ3rO-1kAJFRR0yFJwj44opqRscuO1ReY8OedszkOxGqfFTsqN_z8sW58ZNsRq7a87z-ph0BDyuwW1LaG6UluBLozD7N9Q2hoWcrd8nSrketuQXSyulS-2mGCnnEACPyY0oQqvQ8n2vEZnagThuOZ5j8LRFEObpqwpcp21xAYRxdLZP5mycLV0SCPNyeiVTyiFlEIYzxQo9p5E8CDNc9b09bN-__XjAx0uE-d2af19a-cdXS-fnG40jrUqDZJcyocj9DwAA___PSoxN)
---
Friend,
An appellate judge LIFTED the unconstitutional gag order that was disgracefully imposed upon me by the Trump-hating judge in New York City.
_**Since I am now 100% free to speak without being censored for the time being, I’m going to tell you exactly what’s on my mind.**_
This sham New York Trial is nothing but a political witch hunt incited by rabid anti-Trump Democrats – both the Judge AND the Attorney General – who want to impose the “corporate death penalty” upon me and even my family.
Not only are they trying to financially ruin me, they even tried to get away with censoring me and not allowing me to publicly defend myself from their vicious attacks.

As Christians, we know that what’s happening in Israel is not a human struggle; it is a spiritual struggle against the forces of darkness.

God has promised that His chosen people will endure forever. The Bible assures us that the enemies of Israel will not succeed. And when Jesus Christ returns, believe that Israel will receive the blessings God promised.

subject: Friend, I’m scared.

body:
It’s Speaker Mike Johnson, and I need your help.

|
---
| | |
I'm starting to worry, Friend.

**It 's Speaker Mike Johnson, and I need your help.**

This week, we have a chance to retain a critical seat for our conservative House Majority by winning the Special Election in Utah.

The Democrats are pulling out all the stops in an attempt to pull this election right out from under us. _**But I refuse to go down without a fight.**_
**HELP REPUBLICANS WIN**
---
| | | [CHIP IN NOW](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z5kc7tunbp1b6f12h99ue0bpjqo694htbrn61qoo_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cli62o36cdh2bs "Generic Button")
---

I need you on my side here, Friend.

The Democrats are raising massive amounts of money from their corporate overlords and the deep-pocketed radicals who bankroll their campaigns.

**[We need your help to make sure we keep UT-2 red! Chip in now](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zmcflsm1a9stet1chr60p41brr87b8svlnpvdu4o_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cli62o36cdh2bs "We need your help to make sure we keep UT-2 red! Chip in now")**

**Usually, I 'm not too concerned about these jokers, but this time it's different. **
**DEFEND AMERICA**
---
| | | [CHIP IN NOW](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zpmtm8nq68jscka3cjqe5hrdb1jpoahqd6oectdg_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cli62o36cdh2bs "Generic Button")
---

We can't count on Hollywood liberals and the George Soros's of the world to fund our movement, but we have something even better: **we have millions of patriots just like you who REFUSE to let the Radical Left have their way with our country.**

I know you've always put America first before, Friend, and I'm asking you to do it once again. **[Will you step up and join me to DEFEND our seat in Utah this Special Election? I can't do it alone.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zqee0qtjm2crc8nie3fsd3tcgmphboktp3oianjg_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cli62o36cdh2bs "Will you step up and join me to DEFEND our seat in Utah this Special Election? body:
Did you hear the news?

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/73678563/439310140/-635384404?refcode=EM_F_231120difference_N_KP_90DO_5_G_N_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImRhNWFjNDAxLWMwODctZWUxMS04OTI1LTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=bE0UMoLiD-UItMEcxBJ4JbuaWfoYTbundamftRtlUj0=)
| Hi there,

Did you hear the news? On Tuesday, November 28, 2023, people all around the world are coming together to tap into the power of human connection and strengthen communities to change our world for the better. The New Pennsylvania Project will be participating by hosting its **second annual virtual Give Day** to support year-round voter registration, civic education and mobilization centering Black, Indigenous, and other people of color, immigrant communities and the youth across Pennsylvania.

[**SAVE THE DATE: We have set the goal to raise $5,000 on Giving Tuesday to help fuel our voter registration and mobilization programs. Will you help us get a head start on reaching this goal by rushing a $5 donation today?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/73678564/439310143/-635384404?refcode=EM_F_231120difference_N_KP_90DO_5_G_N_L1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImRhNWFjNDAxLWMwODctZWUxMS04OTI1LTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=bE0UMoLiD-UItMEcxBJ4JbuaWfoYTbundamftRtlUj0=) **[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/73678566/439310144/-635384404?refcode=EM_F_231120difference_N_KP_90DO_5_G_N_P1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImRhNWFjNDAxLWMwODctZWUxMS04OTI1LTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=bE0UMoLiD-UItMEcxBJ4JbuaWfoYTbundamftRtlUj0=)** On Giving Tuesday, we invite you to join the New Pennsylvania Project on all social media platforms to hear stories from the ground, testimonials from registered voters, live updates from staff in all seven focused regions across Pennsylvania, and successes from this past election cycle!

We are just getting started: In just two years of operation, the New Pennsylvania Project, along with the affiliated New PA Project Education Fund, collected 30,000 voter registration forms and mobilized many of those first-time voters to the polls. We are making a difference in Pennsylvania, and we will feel that impact in 2024 and beyond.

[**Ahead of Giving Tuesday, please join us in supporting our mission of year-round voter registration, civic education and mobilization centering historically disenfranchised Black, Indigenous, and other people of color, immigrant communities and the youth across Pennsylvania by donating $5 today →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/73678567/439310145/-635384404?refcode=EM_F_231120difference_N_KP_90DO_5_G_N_L2&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImRhNWFjNDAxLWMwODctZWUxMS04OTI1LTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=bE0UMoLiD-UItMEcxBJ4JbuaWfoYTbundamftRtlUj0=)

Thank you,

Katy Personette
Director of Development and Policy [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/73678569/439310147/-635384404?refcode=EM_F_231120difference_N_KP_90DO_5_G_N_P2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImRhNWFjNDAxLWMwODctZWUxMS04OTI1LTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=bE0UMoLiD-UItMEcxBJ4JbuaWfoYTbundamftRtlUj0=) | _The New Pennsylvania Project (NPP) is a voting rights organization with a year-round primary focus on voter registration, civic education, and mobilization. NPP centers historically disenfranchised and often neglected Black, Indigenous and other people of color, immigrant communities and the youth in our work. clean_body: Did you hear the news? = | Hi there, Did you hear the news? On Tuesday, November 28, 2023, people all around the world are coming together to tap into the power of human connection and strengthen communities to change our world for the better. The New Pennsylvania Project will be participating by hosting its second annual virtual Give Day to support year-round voter registration, civic education and mobilization centering Black, Indigenous, and other people of color, immigrant communities and the youth across Pennsylvania. = = On Giving Tuesday, we invite you to join the New Pennsylvania Project on all social media platforms to hear stories from the ground, testimonials from registered voters, live updates from staff in all seven focused regions across Pennsylvania, and successes from this past election cycle! We are just getting started: In just two years of operation, the New Pennsylvania Project, along with the affiliated New PA Project Education Fund, collected 30,000 voter registration forms and mobilized many of those first-time voters to the polls. We are making a difference in Pennsylvania, and we will feel that impact in 2024 and beyond. = Thank you, Katy Personette Director of Development and Policy = | The New Pennsylvania Project (NPP) is a voting rights organization with a year-round primary focus on voter registration, civic education, and mobilization. NPP centers historically disenfranchised and often neglected Black, Indigenous and other people of color, immigrant communities and the youth in our work. Through civic engagement, we ensure all eligible voters feel compelled to exercise their freedom to vote in the Commonwealth. = || || || New Pennsylvania Project PO Box 443 West Chester, PA 19381 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please. to receive fewer emails from us. to stop receiving any fundraising emails from us. The New Pennsylvania Project is a 501(c)(4). Contributions are not for charitable purposes and are not tax deductible. | Paid for by the New Pennsylvania Project __

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: What’s happening in Texas
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE
body:
[1]Powered By People

Here are the issues Powered by People is working on this week:

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

Victory Against Vouchers

On Friday, the Texas House voted 84-63 to REJECT Greg Abbott’s private
school voucher scam — a billionaire-backed plan to defund public schools
in order to subsidize private education for the wealthy.

[1]CBS Texas: Texas Governor Greg Abbott's proposal for school vouchers
goes down in defeat

This is a major victory won at great odds. Billionaire mega-donors spent
millions campaigning for this bill. Abbott pulled out all the stops to try
to pass it, calling multiple legislative sessions and even holding school
funding and teacher pay raises hostage in an attempt to bribe legislators.

But because so many of us showed up and spoke out, we overcame their money
and influence. Now it’s time for Abbott to drop his voucher scam and stop
holding our kids’ school funding hostage.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/call/call-abbott/?source=ema20231120-235163&t=1001&akid=235163%2E444211%2EfsINAh ]Call the Governor’s Office today to demand that he fully fund our
schools and give our teachers the pay raise they deserve.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

Trump’s Texas Strategy

Governor Abbott formally endorsed Donald Trump yesterday, providing a boon
to Trump’s effort to make Texas a MAGA firewall in the 2024 elections.

[3]The Texas Tribune: Gov. Geg Abbott endorses Donald Trump during border
trip

Trump has visited Texas twice this month. He’s also ramped up his Texas
fundraising operation, pulling in major hauls from right-wing millionaires
and billionaires. He hopes that by making Texas a priority, he can not
only win back the White House, but also roll back the years of progress
we’ve made to win key down-ballot Democratic victories in Texas.

If Trump’s push in Texas goes unchecked, MAGA extremists will win races up
and down the ballot next year. And to make it even more challenging, the
DNC has yet to announce a strategy or invest the resources needed to
counter him in our state.

With no one coming to our rescue, the pressure is on us to reach,
register, and mobilize the voters we need to stop Trump’s agenda in Texas.
[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20231120.6REepn&refcode=ema20231120-235163&t=1002&akid=235163%2E444211%2EfsINAh ]Please chip in to Powered by People today to ensure we have the
resources to double down on this work.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20231120.6REepn&refcode=ema20231120-235163&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=235163%2E444211%2EfsINAh ]DONATE $3

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

Our New Campaign

Powered by People is launching an ambitious new program for the 2024
election cycle. [ https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/volunteer-kickoff-webinar/?source=ema20231120-235163&t=1022&akid=235163%2E444211%2EfsINAh ]Please join us on December 5th to help us kick off
this campaign and learn how you can get involved.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/volunteer-kickoff-webinar/?source=ema20231120-235163&t=1023&akid=235163%2E444211%2EfsINAh ]Volunteer Kickoff Webinar

Tuesday, December 5, 2023
6:00 PM CT

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/volunteer-kickoff-webinar/?source=ema20231120-235163&t=1024&akid=235163%2E444211%2EfsINAh ]RSVP →

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

I hope it’s a great week for you.

— Beto

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1025&akid=235163%2E444211%2EfsINAh

PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE

name: =?utf-8?Q?Bonnie?=
subject: Wallace for Congress - Thanksgiving in America🇺🇸
body:
We have been blessed to be Americans, let's not forget or lose it!

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/a348eb0e161f/wallace-for-congress-we-begin-12663677?e=b2fb6a3035)
https://wallaceforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a30b2c82c43821565573ac68b&id=b3aa832d63&e=b2fb6a3035

** Thankful We’re Not Communist, Yet!
------------------------------------------------------------

Hi Patriots,

For years we’ve had so much to be thankful for in America.

Our Capitalistic system, Constitutional Rights, American values and work ethic made our nation the envy of the world. Millions came from everywhere to take part in the American Dream. Now we see our country being torn apart and destroyed, and at its core, it’s because of Collectivism, aka Communism. Communism comes in different flavors, but the common core is about taking control, eliminating God and our God-given Rights, and exploiting us. The Communists love to say it’s the Capitalists that do the exploiting, but as usual they are projecting!

I have stepped onto the Candidate Stage to run as an Anti-Communist against Judy Chu and spread the word of Capitalism and the America First Agenda.

At the Cease Fire protest in front of Judy Chu’s office last week, I came face-to-face with a pro-communist neighbor. She was handing out Communist Newspapers and thinks the poor and down-trodden in America is due to Capitalists exploiting the workers. You can see our interchange in the video, although it’s hard to hear. She says Capitalism, and its goal of never ending profits, exploits the workers. The same old rhetoric! People should want to work and create and have a purpose. That’s not exploitation, its exaltation!

I am proud to be an America First Candidate and I love our Country and her founding fathers. Let’s give thanks to all of them and all of us who continue to fight for Freedom!

Here are some upcoming events, where I’ll be speaking:

Monday, November 27 - South Pasadena

Greater Pasadena Republican Assembly meeting,

Griffins of Kinsale, 7:00 - 8:30 pm

Saturday, December 2 - Glendora

Potluck Meeting 4:30 pm

Tuesday, December 5 - Rancho Cucamonga

CRA Meeting, 7:00 pm

Saturday, December 16 - Monrovia

Save the Date!

Let me know if you’re interested in attending any of these. More to come!

Please follow the campaign on Facebook and Instagram and if you want to get involved email (mailto:bonnie@wallaceforcongress.us?subject=I%20want%20to%20help!&body=) or text me (tel:16266444845) .

Thank you for your support and never give up!

Bonnie (https://wallaceforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a30b2c82c43821565573ac68b&id=d34c20878f&e=b2fb6a3035)

** Introducing Myself at the Chinese American Citizens Alliance.
------------------------------------------------------------

The Communist paper being handed out at the Cease Fire Protest. People are entitled to their opinions, but it’s too bad they think Communism is good, and Capitalism is bad. Can we change that?

https://wallaceforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a30b2c82c43821565573ac68b&id=ba2d7937d4&e=b2fb6a3035

** Join us for the GPRA Meeting
------------------------------------------------------------

Last meeting of the year!

Monday, November 27, 7:00 PM, Griffins of Kinsale

** REGISTER REPUBLICAN TODAY
------------------------------------------------------------

Click to register online - it just takes a few minutes!
https://wallaceforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a30b2c82c43821565573ac68b&id=c5dc378925&e=b2fb6a3035

name: Jon Tester & Sherrod Brown
subject: The Big Sky Buckeye Fund
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
Become a Founding Donor today
#
Hi Peter —
Jon Tester and Sherrod Brown here. We’re reaching out today because we’re in the middle of the two most competitive Senate campaigns, and we need your help to win.
We’re not the typical politicians you’d expect to see every day in the Senate. One of us is a seven-fingered dirt farmer. The other has been called disheveled, wrinkled, and rumpled. Neither of us are winning any best dressed awards anytime soon.
But the thing that _really_ sets us apart? We’ll work with anyone to get the job done for our constituents. And we’ll always stand up to the special interests in Washington to help folks back home.
But we’re facing the toughest reelection fight of our careers. Election experts are calling us the most vulnerable Democratic senators, and Mitch McConnell and his cronies are planning to unleash hundreds of millions of dollars to try and defeat us.
We’ve got a lot of work to do between now and Election Day. **So we’re launching the Big Sky Buckeye Fund with a goal of raising _$500,000_ in the next 48 hours** to build up our resources and fight back against the millions that’ll be thrown our way.
**[Ready to roll up your sleeves and get to work? Become a founding donor of our Big Sky Buckeye Fund by splitting a contribution between our campaigns today. Your support will help us meet our goal, build our resources, and keep fighting for the hardworking people of Montana and Ohio in the Senate.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73679985/439314067/1313657826?refcode=dd_em_231120_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NGI0MWYxZS1jMjg3LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2UgwnQOhIosSKIbRMz1hOuf3QOqgzQcCHThyMjcGxEY=)**

name: Team Gallego ALERT
subject: Ruben is under attack
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
The National Republican Senatorial Committee just dropped the first attack ads of the cycle against Ruben.
#

Peter: Most of the country is getting ready to celebrate what we’re most grateful for this week.
Some are traveling home, others making plans with friends and loved ones. It’s a happy time.
But not over at the NRSC.
The National Republican Senatorial Committee — the campaign arm of the Senate GOP — just released a baseless, deeply personal attack ad against Ruben. On Ruben’s birthday of all days, just three days before Thanksgiving.
It’s sad that they would stoop this low. But for us, for this campaign, it’s a dangerous moment, too.
An attack ad against Ruben this early means that the GOP is going all in to beat him. And with support from the NRSC and Mitch McConnell, Kari Lake just got a big boost from the Republican establishment in Washington.
If attacks like these go unanswered, Kari Lake could get the edge on us.
What happens next is up to you. We really need your help. So please, we’re humbly asking:
[**Can you rush $3 to Ruben’s campaign right away and help us fight back against these attacks? The Senate GOP is targeting Ruben’s campaign early. It’s clear they’ll do whatever they can to beat him.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-nov23.azuTO_&refcode=em231120-1-f&t=1&akid=1467%2E734936%2EO4Nt_2)

name: Kevin McCarthy
subject: Last Resort
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
This will be the MOST EXPENSIVE election cycle ever.

| |
---
| | | Friend, this is my last resort...

**Spending on political ads will exceed $10 billion this cycle.** My jaw DROPPED when I saw that figure.
**Hands down: This will be the MOST EXPENSIVE election cycle ever.**
We need a rapid response before our slim GOP Majority gets EVISCERATED by all that cash.
**This is our FINAL chance to turn the tide.**
I realize times are tough right now. If you can give, even if it's just $1, I promise you, **it will make all the difference in the world to our candidates who are out there fighting day in and day out.**

subject: ☀️To all Joe Biden supporters, please don't click away from this important message!☀️
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
As you read this, Republicans and outside spending groups are attacking Joe Biden relentlessly with negative campaign ads in key states across the country. | | |
---

☀️ Peter -- ☀️ To all Joe Biden and Kamala Harris supporters, please don't click away from this important message.

Think for a second about all the times you've been thankful Joe Biden beat Donald Trump in the last election. Now think for a second about how winning this next election is far from guaranteed.

As you read this, Republicans and outside spending groups are attacking Joe Biden relentlessly with negative campaign ads in key states across the country. We need your help to fight back.

If everyone reading this donated even just $5 to President Biden's reelection campaign, we'd have the resources we needed to win this election. But not everyone gives, that's why we people who understand that this race can be won or lost in the early stages chip in today.

Most of the donations we receive come from people giving smaller amounts of money. We're passionate about this model of fundraising because at its core it means this campaign is powered by people like you. The amount isn't as important as the donation itself. If you can give $5, we're asking you to give $5. If you can give $25 or more, we're asking you to give that.

If reelecting Joe Biden and keeping Trump or any other Republican out of the White House seems worth $5, $25, or whatever you can afford, we're asking you to act today:
[Please use this link to contribute directly to Joe Biden and Kamala Harris's reelection campaign today. Some people give $5, others give $25 or more. name: Kevin McCarthy
subject: Last Resort
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
This will be the MOST EXPENSIVE election cycle ever.

| |
---
| | | Friend, this is my last resort...

**Spending on political ads will exceed $10 billion this cycle.** My jaw DROPPED when I saw that figure.
**Hands down: This will be the MOST EXPENSIVE election cycle ever.**
We need a rapid response before our slim GOP Majority gets EVISCERATED by all that cash.

Stand up against gun violence

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73681150/439316852/1272516037?refcode=em_XX_XXXX.XX.XX_XX_XX_header_desk_of_andrei&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGEzOTUxY2ItYzM4Ny1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=MINS0gHXkv3VlKSKvkU36pQp2fjD3r4rTwjx6KilVAI=) **Peter – I’m so honored to be able to announce to you that I have earned the endorsement of Brady PAC, the oldest gun safety advocacy organization in the county.[Will you make a donation to join Brady PAC in supporting our people-powered campaign?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73681151/439316853/-1883818185?refcode=em_fr_2023.11.20_b1_ac_all&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGEzOTUxY2ItYzM4Ny1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=MINS0gHXkv3VlKSKvkU36pQp2fjD3r4rTwjx6KilVAI=)

This is not an endorsement they give lightly. I’m one of just four candidates for Congress they’ve endorsed this year anywhere in America.**

It’s also not an endorsement I take lightly. This endorsement is personal to me. I grew up in a neighborhood and apartment building where gun violence was a reality. And I’ll never forget the morning in 2011 when I was driving down to meet with Representative Gabby Giffords and got a call from Stephanie, who was already there in Tucson with our then-two-year-old and two-month-old kids telling me that a helicopter had just landed in the middle of the street.

That’s why I’ve not only been an unwavering advocate for stronger gun safety laws, but I’ve worked to do something about it. As the leader of Arizona Democrats, I took on Jan Brewer’s “guns in bars” and “guns at work” bills. I joined with CEOs For Gun Safety to lobby Congress to take action. And I helped millions of people get access to bank accounts that defunded gun manufacturers and the NRA.

David Schweikert has a record on guns, too. But it is very different. Throughout his career, he has not only opposed common sense gun safety legislation but worked to weaken and oppose the enforcement of the laws we have on the books. That’s why I need your help to replace him.

[**Can you chip in $25, $50, or even $500 today to help fuel our people-powered campaign and fight against gun violence? subject: BREAKING: U.S. Marine illegally arrested by FBI gets 8 months in prison
body:

| | | [ ](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ee15fbb276e64605b51f092b5aefc5f5&_e=D5MJVscnc1YfaRMu6ZWcCbXxYrYAWHLFilwldhOFbY3HghagtafnLGYpXgdE5o4pfl_1xq5FVold5qmj6puKXO5zCPZM240TO7iyPvJaWPnqnbsIgZcJQX9AFRLAQ1DPqcWmcn0RB9ZLy51Wm67hyMdNHfqOgMpgYJfabodLt1fsHaliX3vJbxnuFiKCZm2378AOSGpdZbFG8LOiw_gdAlRDk_FZcJpttKPF02gjiWYL_C-pidip3RMV_TV3laJ0bpjl_uo0SSzG-zn9kqBtiubESuGMnx2ITJ54VO1kV6I3gUtpP_yFTJjy3YsJqkvan2UveBxnur6Q3ksj3RNN2N7fThzTlG7bDKWOPdgkJ9I%3D)

**[Please give a critical $25, $50, $100 or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my two crucial class action lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ee15fbb276e64605b51f092b5aefc5f5&_e=D5MJVscnc1YfaRMu6ZWcCbXxYrYAWHLFilwldhOFbY3HghagtafnLGYpXgdE5o4pfl_1xq5FVold5qmj6puKXO5zCPZM240TO7iyPvJaWPnqnbsIgZcJQX9AFRLAQ1DPqcWmcn0RB9ZLy51Wm67hyMdNHfqOgMpgYJfabodLt1fsHaliX3vJbxnuFiKCZm23Pvz19nZotdMrENxo0EgcjJ5H3suBRCMwVMGJlKk6ageokAPnSE02hT4k8SAvdLAsBQMJnQUt3gUuQUQG8WKI5cY8fxI3oNF16URf1EIzN8Oq-Bp586jY-BeHcLyKGuYcb3ICSjOQcTuDBR537FN9lPN2_C7A986Uk7LvmiXlfz4%3D)**

(Because you're a valued supporter of Freedom Watch, I had to rush you this urgent update about my client, Jesus Rivera. Please bear with me if you've seen some of this information before...it will be shocking to new supporters.)

On January 6, 2021, Jesus Rivera, a Marine combat veteran, peacefully recorded the events at the Capitol building in Washington, D.C. He shot video on his smart phone and a digital camera for a local news station back home in Florida.

He didn't protest (when I first heard his story, I thought he did).

Jesus didn't attack police or use harsh language. He only shot video to provide for his wife and kids and entered the Capitol peacefully like many other patriots that day.

**But around 7:30 AM on January 20, 2021, between 12 to 20 heavily armed FBI agents raided his home with guns drawn. There was no probable cause, and the search warrant was obtained through lies and even outright fraud.
**
Jesus was forcefully handcuffed, then moved to the FBI building.

His wife asked for the warrant several times but didn't receive it until after the FBI agents finished searching their home.

Jesus survived rocket attacks and exploding roadside bombs trying to bring freedom to Iraq and Afghanistan. But his freedom gets trampled on right here at home by Biden's Gestapo DOJ and its FBI!

**What 's more, Jesus recently appeared before District Judge Colleen Kollar-Kotelly in Washington, D.C. and was unjustly sentenced to 8 months in federal prison.
**
Let me tell you, I've locked horns several times with Judge Kollar-Kotelly.

She's a hardcore leftist whose nomination was opposed by every conservative group in the country. She's the absolute worst judge I've appeared before in 45 years.

And now she's throwing a true patriot and innocent man to the wolves.

**friend, I 've filed a critically important class action lawsuit on behalf of Jesus Rivera - and on behalf of each and every January 6 Peaceful Protester who is getting brutally abused by the justice system as I write you this urgent email.
**
I'm suing everyone responsible for this outrage: the lead agents, each agent who searched Jesus' home, even FBI Director Christopher Wray.

The shocking, un-American conduct as alleged in my lawsuit can't be allowed to go on.

**If the FBI can push around a peaceful, church-going Marine veteran for simply recording the events at the Capitol building on January 6th, they can push you and me, our families, friends, and fellow Americans around, too.
**
That's why I beg you to stand with me at this crucial time.

Jesus didn't attack police or use harsh language. He only shot video to provide for his wife and kids and entered the Capitol peacefully like many other patriots that day. But around 7:30 AM on January 20, 2021, between 12 to 20 heavily armed FBI agents raided his home with guns drawn. There was no probable cause, and the search warrant was obtained through lies and even outright fraud. Jesus was forcefully handcuffed, then moved to the FBI building. His wife asked for the warrant several times but didn't receive it until after the FBI agents finished searching their home. Jesus survived rocket attacks and exploding roadside bombs trying to bring freedom to Iraq and Afghanistan. But his freedom gets trampled on right here at home by Biden's Gestapo DOJ and its FBI! What 's more, Jesus recently appeared before District Judge Colleen Kollar-Kotelly in Washington, D.C. and was unjustly sentenced to 8 months in federal prison. Let me tell you, I've locked horns several times with Judge Kollar-Kotelly. She's a hardcore leftist whose nomination was opposed by every conservative group in the country. name: Wes Moore
subject: I’m proud of these, friend
body:
Friend,

The team and I have been hard at work on behalf of everyone in Maryland.

I’m so proud to share these recent accomplishments we’ve been working on this year:

1️⃣ The White House recently named Baltimore one of its five workforce hubs, committing to train and hire thousands of local workers for major projects.
2️⃣ Our first-of-its-kind service year program for high school students launched last month, creating a pathway for students to learn and grow through service here in Maryland.
3️⃣ Through the Office of Statewide Broadband, we’re providing over 133,000 laptops to underserved families in need of technology.

Once again, Maryland is leading the way. If you’re proud of the direction our state is heading in, I am humbly asking for your support today. Your contribution today will help us achieve more great things together. You can make a contribution right here: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20231120-1?refcode=em20231120]

Contribute » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20231120-1?refcode=em20231120]

Thank you for your support!

Elevate,
Wes Moore

| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Qtom_GbzkvLItV8gMN-5qcFQe72tpAD9uuNp4SFdmRa5R2W6OP97HMDdYsW5GMehO3adC9migXmQgQmV3-KFs8RLZ_fbyBPsUWdGEqsbuzzKVHjSlbXnYnAwRMSdW8DT-8pt_OoCiSNiiRA61QJLnOHXbSIc5HrgxTsnA35MDLxzztaO3yGug4M5jm80eLkDXy1pFLH4y5dvpN-KiAo1Q0V741NJKxEjnezva64G7-mNd1exqHiLRC_4P9CaZFXZFX_dVg8tNIp0gwOWXlVU9h6dvkcDZqt7pYYnxyWP96XWAE5ceXhlTMq1V0XsO1DwA_bV6XAlxY7MgyjwbtMk8w==&c=S4NwngTWR9jCJt85S5xCqxgY8hWuXqK1KEbPn83nmLI3VkoDrtTJGA==&ch=_NDPzds8jnTzjY4NW6FEeMkKBytevdwj3nrWLLYDSkKSRq0jTXJpCw==)

| Peter -
As we've seen over the last several weeks, there are politicians who take advantage of your willingness to donate your hard-earned money to their campaigns.
They use gimmicks and tricks, and use the most emotional language in order to get clicks and in order to get you to give them money.
Frankly, it is part of the reason the incentive structure has become so polluted in American politics. Those who scream the loudest on television, those who post the most provocative messages on social media, and those who are willing to lie about "fighting" for you believe those are the best tactics to raise money and increase their notoriety.
That is why I try to offer something different in the messages that I send you.
---
| I inform you about the policies I am working on in Washington - combating the Mexican drug cartels, securing our southern border, and protecting American energy independence.
I tell you exactly how I use the money you generously contribute to my campaign - growing our conservative movement with events like my Crenshaw Youth Summit, highly-produced, persuasive messaging campaigns on key issues facing our country, and making sure the Republican Party is successful electorally.
I hope that this offers a respite from the constant barrage you receive in your inbox from politicians who will do and say anything for a donation.
---
| | | [HELP ME CONTINUE THE FIGHT IN CONGRESS](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Qtom_GbzkvLItV8gMN-5qcFQe72tpAD9uuNp4SFdmRa5R2W6OP97HMDdYsW5GMehO3adC9migXmQgQmV3-KFs8RLZ_fbyBPsUWdGEqsbuzzKVHjSlbXnYnAwRMSdW8DT-8pt_OoCiSNiiRA61QJLnOHXbSIc5HrgxTsnA35MDLxzztaO3yGug4M5jm80eLkDXy1pFLH4y5dvpN-KiAo1Q0V741NJKxEjnezva64G7-mNd1exqHiLRC_4P9CaZFXZFX_dVg8tNIp0gwOWXlVU9h6dvkcDZqt7pYYnxyWP96XWAE5ceXhlTMq1V0XsO1DwlnHzNwp3QyE=&c=S4NwngTWR9jCJt85S5xCqxgY8hWuXqK1KEbPn83nmLI3VkoDrtTJGA==&ch=_NDPzds8jnTzjY4NW6FEeMkKBytevdwj3nrWLLYDSkKSRq0jTXJpCw==)
---
| And I hope that you will continue to support me as I seek re-election to the House of Representatives, where I am working hard for you every single day.
I greatly appreciate your generosity.
God Bless,
---
|
---
| Dan Crenshaw

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: REVEALED: What school book fairs are teaching children
body:
Here's what we're up against.

[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=27a9e7c63c4748dd9191a1103b7a516b&_e=dhaDG4X_LsCYba0QyC12RWHSOX9wDRyLtQlQTvLHBlp7dtBtFhT1OcKRix6H00QmGYdZdVohpEYOvyGa4aWNMuNK6BLQGlAH_NWTuwTrzDZU5BHqjGUQDPZ7l0WXH875bV46bQ9eUWFxQaiiwB5-JSKdRZ3eHGKp45v2aKWNW8LxF8CqlG7wnFMbTVY0GjeUYWiVoWtZ8WvjK3ICV5ltyqGBMvZxvaeFFrEpf87y9OGKstP7tVJX_w8uOThGfJLD "SkyTree Book Fairs")

Friend,

SkyTree Book Fair and I did a deep dive and discovered the cause of why sexually explicit and disgusting books get into our children's schools, classrooms, and libraries.

Here's what we're up against.

These are books Scholastic promotes at book fairs in schools. Here are pages from "Welcome to St. Hell," a 2022 Scholastic book glamorizing gender transitioning to middle schoolers. (We've censored these pages as the original content could violate social media policies against adult material):

[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=27a9e7c63c4748dd9191a1103b7a516b&_e=dhaDG4X_LsCYba0QyC12RWHSOX9wDRyLtQlQTvLHBlp7dtBtFhT1OcKRix6H00QmGYdZdVohpEYOvyGa4aWNMuNK6BLQGlAH_NWTuwTrzDY_bB6efDDpgFSRfXuBw-3tjSJyvptuX3-S9hBB1MVeiP9KgJNah832QL8fWRwKGnifhz5RCECFW6BglQfIt-hjtuS2QkAlMYHtdZCC4naVDy9n1iMpsrZ9ZIK3p1fM4JkANfOeCuUvCpTF5d3VPG-0)[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=27a9e7c63c4748dd9191a1103b7a516b&_e=dhaDG4X_LsCYba0QyC12RWHSOX9wDRyLtQlQTvLHBlp7dtBtFhT1OcKRix6H00QmGYdZdVohpEYOvyGa4aWNMuNK6BLQGlAH_NWTuwTrzDZjmW2GRnEhHEMUTVMa3NhgfSgFJjZl51V5kfJCZL5BsZUzAAnrNkF5yxWOmQONOqTrnGI2egya5a-Y4gL8czQIoI0GrYM6IDqNA5wLLVtUYeUYRWQfyYrpPsUXqEY1lRM30QtUVXVRT7dxWOF52cEB)

Scholastic holds a virtual monopoly on school book fairs. Like many of our cultural institutions in the last decade, Scholastic has fallen prey to the woke mob and radical LGBT political agenda.

Scholastic promotes this agenda over the well-being of our children.

**Here is the solution:**

SkyTree Book Fair offers schools a different option for book fairs. SkyTree Book Fairs is providing schools, parents, and children with an empowering alternative with literature rooted in truth and family values that matches the quality and ease of Scholastic while countering their harmful agenda.

Here's how you can help.

[I am asking for your urgent support to help SkyTree replace Scholastic in schools. Can you donate $35, $50, or even $100 today toward Sky Tree? We are kicking off with a goal to raise $100,000 this month.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=27a9e7c63c4748dd9191a1103b7a516b&_e=dhaDG4X_LsCYba0QyC12RWHSOX9wDRyLtQlQTvLHBlp7dtBtFhT1OcKRix6H00QmGYdZdVohpEYOvyGa4aWNMuNK6BLQGlAH_NWTuwTrzDYtgMUfvLInAq-cn842sSnVCkkBtD0Y4JptSflCsyxWrVRXcn9DSJFcxkkIrSqQtwolCQvzydcB11-i8UVQ0C6LMDf2G06cr9msyBdD-aGA61BGR-sUqUblzTmxks0ZiSQGn8rQdGQhH2Up6xHGXEFd)

[Donate](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=27a9e7c63c4748dd9191a1103b7a516b&_e=dhaDG4X_LsCYba0QyC12RWHSOX9wDRyLtQlQTvLHBlp7dtBtFhT1OcKRix6H00QmGYdZdVohpEYOvyGa4aWNMuNK6BLQGlAH_NWTuwTrzDbMrX0daGaSHGveYSiBgi_vpgwhquR4REiTSKhMTvNpUgikQtfJiMYm_12Mp0u1tYxIvHWwvzJ6otHEnh4ZVXUNdl0hgqwaw6G2bqk5yzLWB7lkm-kXOXuGCDvD8JqW_StXd5jTsrwIuAAOK8n0Qe17)

SkyTree was inspired by my first children's book, As You Grow. Now, I am helping them spread to schools across the country as an alternative to Scholastic. And here's the thing: SkyTree will not only promote age-appropriate books, but they will do so more efficiently to make it easier for schools to choose SkyTree over Scholastic.

And it's working!

SkyTree has already secured its first public school book fair in Spotsylvania, VA!

No more race-infused storylines. No more confusing gender content. Only age-appropriate content that will nurture childhood innocence and character.

SkyTree needs your support today. American children need your support today!!

We are quickly lining up hundreds of new book fairs in the Spring semester. It costs roughly $7,500 to host a book fair. Please help sponsor SkyTree book fairs in schools across the country.

[Donate $10 >>](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=27a9e7c63c4748dd9191a1103b7a516b&_e=dhaDG4X_LsCYba0QyC12RWHSOX9wDRyLtQlQTvLHBlp7dtBtFhT1OcKRix6H00QmGYdZdVohpEYOvyGa4aWNMjV4oxuZagQ8HiLU4_HkxzdqTLjPds88zUAKNXm0YEDXg-Pn5AlqYgGWmNJCCc42akb_8mZ8YhHBTLesuHcD3vRwb9uDjyG0jptT4hvGLtuxweeFX2kalylT-RNZ3xN_ysY4qdGhT5uMJKqtT7891cu5ePhI5xqFXojPoJLT5rXena0KKwtULXUh29Wd7SrUig%3D%3D)

Let's bring back wholesome content to kids, like what we had growing up. Kids should remain innocent and have content to encourage their moral character while fostering their imagination.

It's not complicated! It's what you and I grew up with.

Thank you for helping us offer schools an alternative to Scholastic!

God bless,

Kirk Cameron

P.S. Scholastic's monopoly on school book fairs has ushered in woke and inappropriate books to kids across the nation.

I've partnered with SkyTree Book Fairs to give schools a positive alternative to scholastic.

[Help us raise $100,000 to fund book fairs this spring semester at schools. Click here to donate >>](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=27a9e7c63c4748dd9191a1103b7a516b&_e=dhaDG4X_LsCYba0QyC12RWHSOX9wDRyLtQlQTvLHBlp7dtBtFhT1OcKRix6H00QmGYdZdVohpEYOvyGa4aWNMuNK6BLQGlAH_NWTuwTrzDayqgi330toIve2hnnFC06KgPkv3l1eNMo5BxE5W4Ts6SvD-dy3oxYs0K-HgbfJurfyXm9pybfMBB1S56mEosVvN7qkNTjuRwRtlXh2IHh5kbsvhrt1bjsrDFk_JzsuFGmAZr8bfBjPqJPvQoHN6RHz)

[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=27a9e7c63c4748dd9191a1103b7a516b&_e=dhaDG4X_LsCYba0QyC12RWHSOX9wDRyLtQlQTvLHBlp7dtBtFhT1OcKRix6H00QmGYdZdVohpEYOvyGa4aWNMuNK6BLQGlAH_NWTuwTrzDYvlGGl4WiSeiqxKCZiMPs6O1kcw1-tCHHXhWulpyCLoJ_uhUt-gAMgKFPMnBGTIonloWCelFtNDyUGw1Ge1xXtADhXTSUWBa2DFxiNmsP6c9KPYvKsCo45E9F4awIsnymCVfNL8hSFOs2cYG_kFxzt)

clean_body: Here's what we're up against. "SkyTree Book Fairs" Friend, SkyTree Book Fair and I did a deep dive and discovered the cause of why sexually explicit and disgusting books get into our children's schools, classrooms, and libraries. Here's what we're up against. These are books Scholastic promotes at book fairs in schools. Here are pages from "Welcome to St. Hell," a 2022 Scholastic book glamorizing gender transitioning to middle schoolers. (We've censored these pages as the original content could violate social media policies against adult material): Scholastic holds a virtual monopoly on school book fairs. Like many of our cultural institutions in the last decade, Scholastic has fallen prey to the woke mob and radical LGBT political agenda. Scholastic promotes this agenda over the well-being of our children. Here is the solution: SkyTree Book Fair offers schools a different option for book fairs. SkyTree Book Fairs is providing schools, parents, and children with an empowering alternative with literature rooted in truth and family values that matches the quality and ease of Scholastic while countering their harmful agenda. Here's how you can help. SkyTree was inspired by my first children's book, As You Grow. Now, I am helping them spread to schools across the country as an alternative to Scholastic. And here's the thing: SkyTree will not only promote age-appropriate books, but they will do so more efficiently to make it easier for schools to choose SkyTree over Scholastic. And it's working! SkyTree has already secured its first public school book fair in Spotsylvania, VA! No more race-infused storylines. No more confusing gender content. Only age-appropriate content that will nurture childhood innocence and character. SkyTree needs your support today. American children need your support today!! We are quickly lining up hundreds of new book fairs in the Spring semester. It costs roughly $7,500 to host a book fair. Please help sponsor SkyTree book fairs in schools across the country. Let's bring back wholesome content to kids, like what we had growing up. Kids should remain innocent and have content to encourage their moral character while fostering their imagination. It's not complicated! It's what you and I grew up with. Thank you for helping us offer schools an alternative to Scholastic! God bless, Kirk Cameron P.S. Scholastic's monopoly on school book fairs has ushered in woke and inappropriate books to kids across the nation. I've partnered with SkyTree Book Fairs to give schools a positive alternative to scholastic. A reminder of what we're up against: It's time to fight back. You and I cannot afford to do nothing and let the woke mob indoctrinate millions of children. SkyTree Book Fairs is a 501(c)(3) not-for-profit organization. Copyright SkyTree Book Fairs, 2023. name: Dr. Wolf von Laer
subject: Breaking news: Javier Milei wins
body:
as a libertarian political outsider

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c674011%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=IsK1h3qy1Qcshx5K5OKQhQ&sysid=1)

Friend,

This is major news, and it shows a cultural revolution taking place. I’ll explain below the importance of this election.

_**Javier Milei won the Argentina presidential election!**_

If you’re not familiar with Milei, he skyrocketed to popularity in Argentina as a libertarian political outsider. You may recall his interview with Tucker Carlson.

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c674011%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=IsK1h3qy1Qcshx5K5OKQhQ&sysid=1)

**Here’s why this is important to YOU.**

Argentina was once a prosperous country. One of the most prosperous in South America... until socialism took hold of their cultural institutions and government. Argentina suffers from massive inflation, huge government bureaucracy and debt, and an economy on the brink of collapse.

Sound familiar?

The parallels to Argentina and the United States cannot be overlooked.

**_But here’s a secret behind Javier Milei’s success and how we can spare the United States a similar fate_.**

While it may seem like Javier Milei came out of nowhere, he is part of a broader liberty movement taking shape in the United States and across the world.

Over the past decade, Students For Liberty (SFL) has nurtured young Argentine leaders who share Milei's values of liberty and a desire to make a difference in their country. **Milei, a strong proponent of capitalism, free markets, and (extremely) limited government, is involved in SFL's events in Argentina as both a speaker and an attendee and is simply a natural consequence of SFL’s grassroots efforts.** The pro-liberty leaders SFL is empowering are reshaping politics in the United States.

Here’s my mission: _I want to have a leader like Javier Milei defeating socialism in every single country._

This isn’t a radical dream. As CEO of Students For Liberty, I have to plan to train the next generation of pro-liberty leaders in the United States and even globally. My goal is to raise $50,000 online to cultivate the next generation of pro-liberty leaders.

[Friend, can you send an urgent donation of $250, $50, or even $10 today? Select an amount below to rush your support.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c674012%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=8XwsABZI%2fpX8jsjfZ4KGkQ&sysid=1)

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c674011%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=IsK1h3qy1Qcshx5K5OKQhQ&sysid=1)
(Javier Milei sporting the Students For Liberty pin.)

Please let me explain how this works...

**STEP ONE:** Students For Liberty recruits pro-liberty students on college campuses. We identify students who can help build up an organization on their local campus.

**STEP TWO:** Student leaders help us host conferences in the regions. SFL is a student-led organization. We are bottom-up. That means students get hands-on leadership experience that they don’t receive anywhere else.

**STEP THREE:** From countries that have a Constitutional foundation of freedom protected to those in which our students and alumni are risking their lives for liberty, our students and alumni are making a difference. We are investing in the personal growth and specialization of our students in order to empower them to make the biggest impact for liberty in the future.

Since our founding in 2009, Students For Liberty has recruited and organized over 13,294 students!

[Please rush your donation of $10, $35, or any amount you can generously spare >>](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c674020%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=DrrELb3W1IyDX4x4QeDmEA&sysid=1)

I’ll be honest. This is not an immediate return. Our success comes years after students have graduated and become leaders. But it’s something that is unique to our organization. No other pro-liberty student organization is investing in the future like we are.

And do not worry... Students For Liberty is very active in the United States. I don’t want to lead you to believe we are focused only outside of the United States. Our largest presence is students right here in the U.S.

**_Students For Liberty leaders are the future leaders of our country. One of our alumni served on former President Trump’s council of economic advisors. We know how to build the leaders this country so desperately needs_!**

Support the next generation of leaders of liberty!

[Please help me raise $50,000 online today to recruit students and build up our future leaders.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c674021%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=jW%2boWJA8IIk3SLd%2f%2fl8Trw&sysid=1)

I hope to see your name on our list of new supporters. My team will be on standby to give you our thanks and keep you informed.

[Donate $10 >>](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c674013%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=d%2b8XhrSk8uhWkAM1uRzg5A&sysid=1)

clean_body: as a libertarian political outsider Friend, This is major news, and it shows a cultural revolution taking place. I’ll explain below the importance of this election. Javier Milei won the Argentina presidential election! If you’re not familiar with Milei, he skyrocketed to popularity in Argentina as a libertarian political outsider. You may recall his interview with Tucker Carlson. Here’s why this is important to YOU. Argentina was once a prosperous country. One of the most prosperous in South America... until socialism took hold of their cultural institutions and government. Argentina suffers from massive inflation, huge government bureaucracy and debt, and an economy on the brink of collapse. Sound familiar? The parallels to Argentina and the United States cannot be overlooked. But here’s a secret behind Javier Milei’s success and how we can spare the United States a similar fate. While it may seem like Javier Milei came out of nowhere, he is part of a broader liberty movement taking shape in the United States and across the world. Over the past decade, Students For Liberty (SFL) has nurtured young Argentine leaders who share Milei's values of liberty and a desire to make a difference in their country. Milei, a strong proponent of capitalism, free markets, and (extremely) limited government, is involved in SFL's events in Argentina as both a speaker and an attendee and is simply a natural consequence of SFL’s grassroots efforts. The pro-liberty leaders SFL is empowering are reshaping politics in the United States. Here’s my mission: I want to have a leader like Javier Milei defeating socialism in every single country. This isn’t a radical dream. As CEO of Students For Liberty, I have to plan to train the next generation of pro-liberty leaders in the United States and even globally. My goal is to raise $50,000 online to cultivate the next generation of pro-liberty leaders. (Javier Milei sporting the Students For Liberty pin.) Please let me explain how this works... STEP ONE: Students For Liberty recruits pro-liberty students on college campuses. We identify students who can help build up an organization on their local campus. STEP TWO: Student leaders help us host conferences in the regions. SFL is a student-led organization. We are bottom-up. That means students get hands-on leadership experience that they don’t receive anywhere else. Our largest presence is students right here in the U.S. Students For Liberty leaders are the future leaders of our country. name: Dr. Wolf von Laer
subject: Breaking news: Javier Milei wins
body:
as a libertarian political outsider

Friend,

This is major news, and it shows a cultural revolution taking place. I'll explain below the importance of this election.

_**Javier Milei won the Argentina presidential election!**_

If you're not familiar with Milei, he skyrocketed to popularity in Argentina as a libertarian political outsider. You may recall his interview with Tucker Carlson.

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zo7rsnrkroutgu5q0eqphp8jckl0jq75vbnkpd10_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cli6eor4cjh2bs)

**Here 's why this is important to YOU.**

Argentina was once a prosperous country. One of the most prosperous in South America... until socialism took hold of their cultural institutions and government. Argentina suffers from massive inflation, huge government bureaucracy and debt, and an economy on the brink of collapse.

Sound familiar?

The parallels to Argentina and the United States cannot be overlooked.

**_But here 's a secret behind Javier Milei's success and how we can spare the United States a similar fate_.**

While it may seem like Javier Milei came out of nowhere, he is part of a broader liberty movement taking shape in the United States and across the world.

Over the past decade, Students For Liberty (SFL) has nurtured young Argentine leaders who share Milei's values of liberty and a desire to make a difference in their country. **Milei, a strong proponent of capitalism, free markets, and (extremely) limited government, is involved in SFL 's events in Argentina as both a speaker and an attendee and is simply a natural consequence of SFL's grassroots efforts.** The pro-liberty leaders SFL is empowering are reshaping politics in the United States.

Here's my mission: _I want to have a leader like Javier Milei defeating socialism in every single country._

This isn't a radical dream. As CEO of Students For Liberty, I have to plan to train the next generation of pro-liberty leaders in the United States and even globally. My goal is to raise $50,000 online to cultivate the next generation of pro-liberty leaders.

[Friend, can you send an urgent donation of $250, $50, or even $10 today? Select an amount below to rush your support.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zo9pa48hao7b0uteoicbs4au2jhlc5mj6qnnm0og_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cli6eor4cjh2bs)

[Donate $10 >>](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2ztt3cmb8jn8vavpvrg44uk75f54pls7211uun800_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cli6eor4cjh2bs)

[Donate $35 >>](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zqdrn9gsif0tn3cpku61nq5otqij2b6nmrig2l0o_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cli6eor4cjh2bs)

[Donate $50 >>](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z9ii3060dpqrgvm1ejag4eoda9oo061aglauvs98_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cli6eor4cjh2bs)

[Donate $100 >>](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zr34hqbjfserjm0darvgi4pb8ndh8o02krgr8efo_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cli6eor4cjh2bs)

[Donate $250 >>](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z5r506p9iohg5it9l6d4ss0ibq8lb28962o6c5t8_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cli6eor4cjh2bs)

[Donate $500 >>](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z4gd7ohlsb44sij7h9hgo6kl6je8q1tplpatgd8o_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cli6eor4cjh2bs)

[Donate $1,000 >>](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zmesf51p51b9nu3ke6closvtjrbuqb802pssbi88_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cli6eor4cjh2bs)

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2znsciv4ihkcgf3j63hpksj3lflastsqhbaqf92kg_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cli6eor4cjh2bs)
(Javier Milei sporting the Students For Liberty pin.)

Please let me explain how this works...

**STEP ONE:** Students For Liberty recruits pro-liberty students on college campuses. We identify students who can help build up an organization on their local campus.

**STEP TWO:** Student leaders help us host conferences in the regions. SFL is a student-led organization. We are bottom-up. That means students get hands-on leadership experience that they don't receive anywhere else.

**STEP THREE:** From countries that have a Constitutional foundation of freedom protected to those in which our students and alumni are risking their lives for liberty, our students and alumni are making a difference. We are investing in the personal growth and specialization of our students in order to empower them to make the biggest impact for liberty in the future.

Since our founding in 2009, Students For Liberty has recruited and organized over 13,294 students!

[Please rush your donation of $10, $35, or any amount you can generously spare >>](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zuip3a41a43enr97o4e0ji29m8ab4it7s2ei1hag_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cli6eor4cjh2bs)

I'll be honest. This is not an immediate return. Our success comes years after students have graduated and become leaders. But it's something that is unique to our organization. No other pro-liberty student organization is investing in the future like we are.

And do not worry... Students For Liberty is very active in the United States. I don't want to lead you to believe we are focused only outside of the United States. Our largest presence is students right here in the U.S.

**_Students For Liberty leaders are the future leaders of our country. One of our alumni served on former President Trump 's council of economic advisors. We know how to build the leaders this country so desperately needs_!**

Support the next generation of leaders of liberty!

[Please help me raise $50,000 online today to recruit students and build up our future leaders.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z7bouf2mp66v994v3n6711oavefm5ej1m2kqltfo_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cli6eor4cjh2bs)

I hope to see your name on our list of new supporters. My team will be on standby to give you our thanks and keep you informed.

[Donate $1,000 >>](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zgg73fuhm1df63hb554btglvtneuakli9nn2ct90_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cli6eor4cjh2bs)

name: Mike Johnson
subject: But I’m not giving up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
It’s Speaker Mike Johnson, and I need your help.

|
---
| | |
I'm starting to worry, Friend.

**It 's Speaker Mike Johnson, and I need your help.**

This week, we have a chance to retain a critical seat for our conservative House Majority by winning the Special Election in Utah.

The Democrats are pulling out all the stops in an attempt to pull this election right out from under us. _**But I refuse to go down without a fight.**_
**HELP REPUBLICANS WIN**
---
| | | [CHIP IN NOW](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zj1gg8oftb2kdd06bh9gi5pj259hit8mr5l6aa4o_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cli6eor4cjh2bs "Generic Button")
---

I need you on my side here, Friend.

The Democrats are raising massive amounts of money from their corporate overlords and the deep-pocketed radicals who bankroll their campaigns.

**[We need your help to make sure we keep UT-2 red! Chip in now](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zea2ivgid5kvsv9l1ppl53o63ljb15grkb1mm0r0_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cli6eor4cjh2bs "We need your help to make sure we keep UT-2 red! Chip in now")**

**Usually, I 'm not too concerned about these jokers, but this time it's different. **
**DEFEND AMERICA**
---
| | | [CHIP IN NOW](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z547ru6o3n3dkr90hs0idjsbpvv0ch0pn3g78ak0_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cli6eor4cjh2bs "Generic Button")
---

We can't count on Hollywood liberals and the George Soros's of the world to fund our movement, but we have something even better: **we have millions of patriots just like you who REFUSE to let the Radical Left have their way with our country.**

I know you've always put America first before, Friend, and I'm asking you to do it once again. **[Will you step up and join me to DEFEND our seat in Utah this Special Election? I can't do it alone.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zko9rqke87ih0dt5p62g3mukt2dvf9q7c9b53sm0_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cli6eor4cjh2bs "Will you step up and join me to DEFEND our seat in Utah this Special Election? I can’t do it alone.")**

| | | [CHIP IN- $100](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zv0ksgpphc1h7r0kkah5kr1muve4tghuku6g87l0_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cli6eor4cjh2bs "Generic Button")

name: VoteVets.org
subject: Why VoteVets? Why today?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
If you’ve got a minute, let us take a stab:
#
Derek,
There are a lot of worthy organizations out there. A lot of teams are working hard. So why, you might ask, should you help VoteVets?
If you’ve got a minute, let us take a stab:
A few years back, Rachel Maddow said that VoteVets is an organization that regularly punches above its weight. That says a lot. We’re a small group — just a handful of us run this show. We don’t raise anywhere near as much money as the big committees. But year in, year out, we support strong candidates in competitive races and win.
We run targeted ads. We advocate for important issues. We get press attention. And we flip seats.
Look no further than Virginia earlier this month. VoteVets-backed candidates made the difference and won a Democratic majority in the House of Delegates and Senate. On the national level, VoteVets held our losses to a minimum in the House, and we expanded control in the Senate in 2022. We beat Trump like a drum back in 2020.
That’s the VoteVets difference.
We’re ready to do it again because we’re in this fight for the long haul. But we’ve got to build up our warchest again, because we’ve been covering a lot of ground and spending hard to get results over the last few months.
**[So please, if you can: Make your first donation to VoteVets today and help us drive forward to victories in 2024 and beyond.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-nov23.rp0I1d&refcode=em231120-1-30&t=1&akid=19856%2E3013755%2Ej47VL9)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_

name: Attorney Larry Klayman
subject: BREAKING: U.S. Marine illegally arrested by FBI gets 8 months in prison
body:
