name: Kerry McQuisten
subject: Honoring Oregon's Fallen, Fighting for our Freedoms...
body:
| | |
---
| | [](https://sptr.eocampaign1.com/f/a/LaKwS5gbZ5kRlzhQ_VbUDg~~/AAAHUQA~/RgRnPhtUP0UgZTMyMzhkNWEzZDhlZmNhZWFlMTFiYjM0ZTJjZDMzMzNEQmh0dHBzOi8vd3d3LmNvbnN0aXR1dGlvbmFsY2Fycnlmb3JvcmVnb24uY29tL2NhdGVnb3J5L2FsbC1wcm9kdWN0c1cFc3BjZXVCCmVVVJZbZSTtKXFSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAF9j)
---
| |
---
| |
---
| |
---
| |
---
| **THE SUMMIT.**

Last week, Republicans Overseas (RO) held our first annual Worldwide Freedom Initiative (WFI) in Paris, France. The WFI was co-founded this year by Solomon Yue, me, and Randy Yaloz, Republican Overseas France Chair. To say that the event was a success would be an understatement.

\- We networked together representatives from 20 nations in one room.
\- President Trump called in.
\- U.S. Speaker of the House Mike Johnson sent a statement.
\- South Dakota Governor Kristi Noem flew to Paris to deliver the keynote speech.

Our summit brought together right and center-right leaders to push back against the woke agenda that comes from Davos and the WEF each year - an agenda that the Democrat party here in the U.S. has certainly embraced in its persistent shift toward communism. Every nation is affected. Every U.S. state is impacted.

The reaction we received was very telling. Just 72 hours before our event began, Paris police informed us that they were cancelling our event by yanking the city hall venue we'd rented months before out from under us. We were a security threat, they said, though all we were doing was gathering and speaking.

As fate would have it, Randy was able to secure a private venue at the top of the Montparnasse Tower no less, which proved even better so we continued. We had a speaker or two pull out at the last minute after receiving intense political pressure. Those who cave to fear probably weren't a good fit for our summit to begin with, was my thought. Despite our Oregon roots and press releases, Oregon media gave our event not one second of airtime.

Does all that matter? In the end - no. We've started something that will grow and continue. In spite of political backgrounds, childhoods, and cultures that couldn't be more different, every speaker in that room spoke to the same concerns that included the loss of individual nations' sovereignty and the subsequent loss of individual citizens' rights under the weight of globalism. Whether from Romania, France, Hungary or The Netherlands, they all echoed the same sentiment: the world's freedoms hinge upon America's 2024 presidential election. The energy in the room was indescribable. Because the media has controlled the narrative for so long, so completely, people have begun to think the left, work ideology is universally embraced and unstoppable. It's not. I saw people in that room choke up out of love for their countries and a sense of duty. There are more likeminded fighters out there than you might think.

We had five panels. I was part of panel three, which discussed the need for support when it comes to truly principled grassroots candidates. Trump's former senior advisor and former campaign manager David Bossie and Corey Lewandoski spoke about what works and what doesn't when it comes to campaigning. I followed up on that panel with my own experiences on the campaign trail - including media blackouts. Devin Nunes from Truth Social spoke about the need for alternative media. Solomon was up in the next panel, and gave a half-hour interview that brought the house down. The topic? Illegal immigration. I'll put the link below.

After we finished, a few D.C.-based news sources immediately chose to attack our speakers. They claimed Speaker Johnson had shut down the government in order to fly off to Paris. Or something. We knew in advance that once he assumed the gavel, he'd only be able to do video for us. After putting in a 22-hour workday, his voice gave out, so the video didn't sound right and Jim Gosart, VP of RO, read his statement for him instead. These "journalists" - and I use the term loosely - hadn't reported on site, hadn't interviewed anyone there, hadn't verified a single sentence they reported ... As far as Governor Noem, they did what they do best where conservative females are concerned: name-calling and personal smear not worth repeating. Corrupt media and dirty politicians require malicious gossip to achieve their goals - and that means they need readers and viewers to buy what they say and repeat it. Stop helping them!

Here are a couple links that may be of interest:

[Epoch Times France Article with Video Inserts](https://sptr.eocampaign1.com/f/a/0NmolYDDIGNU2VF5wpONqg~~/AAAHUQA~/RgRnPhtUP0UgZTI0Y2Q0MTQzMGU1ZmE2ZWFmNTQ2ZDlkNjFkYzczZGJEemh0dHBzOi8vd3d3LmVwb2NodGltZXMuZnIvd29ybGR3aWRlLWZyZWVkb20taW5pdGlhdGl2ZS1sZXMtZHJvaXRlcy1hbWVyaWNhaW5lcy1ldC1ldXJvcGVlbm5lcy1yZXVuaWVzLWEtcGFyaXMtMjQ3MjQwNS5odG1sVwVzcGNldUIKZVVUlltlJO0pcVIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAX2M~)

[Solomon Yue's Segment on Illegal Immigration as a National Security Threat](https://sptr.eocampaign1.com/f/a/p9MfvnljIKN6OcVKUH4viw~~/AAAHUQA~/RgRnPhtUP0UgOWIwZWY1MWU5OGEzYmE4YmY1NmNmYWI3ZDIwOTdmNmNEHGh0dHBzOi8vZmIud2F0Y2gvb3Awd1JKVHBvQS9XBXNwY2V1QgplVVSWW2Uk7SlxUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAABfYw~~) (Facebook link.)

[NTD France TV Coverage](https://sptr.eocampaign1.com/f/a/05rhAy-v1QgbXf1_zp4-Yw~~/AAAHUQA~/RgRnPhtUP0UgZWU3MTY5OTRhMjMyYWFkYzM1M2ExZmY2OWFmNmFmYzZEHGh0dHBzOi8vZmIud2F0Y2gvb3JpSmxoakZFSS9XBXNwY2V1QgplVVSWW2Uk7SlxUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAABfYw~~) (Facebook link.)

**HONORING OUR FALLEN.**

The next day, a few of us remained behind in France and travelled to Normandy and Omaha Beach in observation of Veterans Day / Armistice Day. What a profound experience. Governor Noem was among our group. She was able to locate some of the graves of the fallen South Dakota soldiers who perished on D-Day. Solomon and I found the graves of several of the 84 Oregon soldiers buried in Normandy. We left WFI lapel pins on their grave markers and our guide was able to find some of their stories. They aren't forgotten.

Solomon said quietly to me afterward, "This really shows what kind of country we are. We liberated millions of people and all we asked for in return was a little land to bury our dead. This puts into perspective who we are as a nation."

France "leases" free of charge the cemetery space in an ongoing show of solidarity and friendship between our countries.

Governor Noem completed the day with a formal wreath ceremony, including our national anthem and "Taps." The day was "perspective-setting," she told me. She was right. I think we all came back to the States ready to keep fighting and more energized than ever. If those boys and young men who stormed the beach knowing they were going to die could give their very lives for our freedoms, we can certainly navigate a little corruption. We owe it to those who came before us, and to our children.

Back to Constitutional Carry for Oregon, the Baker County Republican Women's Patriot Kids Camp and more next time.

Over & out,
_Kerry_
---
| |
---
| |
---
|
---
|
---
| | |
---
---
| [KerryMcQuisten.com](https://sptr.eocampaign1.com/f/a/EDJHvld5eyd5s9dDpoLh1g~~/AAAHUQA~/RgRnPhtUP0UgY2ViZmFkNTY3ODk2NmE0ZmRhNTAwZTYxMDVmNGVjNGREH2h0dHBzOi8vd3d3LmtlcnJ5bWNxdWlzdGVuLmNvbS9XBXNwY2V1QgplVVSWW2Uk7SlxUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAABfYw~~ "KerryMcQuisten.com")
---
You received this email because you subscribed to our list. If a friend or family member subscribed for you and you don't wish to receive these newsletters, you can:
[Unsubscribe from this list](https://sptr.eocampaign1.com/f/a/glHbFOmGBbh3jI5_wkvM1w~~/AAAHUQA~~~) at any time.

Kerry McQuisten's Common Sense Sanctuary is a private newsletter blog not part of any PAC.
PO Box 567, Baker City, Oregon, 97814, United States of America
---

We owe it to those who came before us, and to our children. Back to Constitutional Carry for Oregon, the Baker County Republican Women's Patriot Kids Camp and more next time. Over & out, Kerry | | | | | | | | | | ~~ "KerryMcQuisten.com" You received this email because you subscribed to our list. If a friend or family member subscribed for you and you don't wish to receive these newsletters, you can: ~~ at any time. Kerry McQuisten's Common Sense Sanctuary is a private newsletter blog not part of any PAC. PO Box 567, Baker City, Oregon, 97814, United States of America

name: Jon Tester & Sherrod Brown
subject: We’ll work with anyone to get the job done for Montana and Ohio
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| Become a Founding Donor today
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=1565%2E35263%2EMUwnx0)
Hi Peter — Jon Tester and Sherrod Brown here. We’re reaching out today because we’re in the middle of two of the most competitive Senate campaigns, and we need your help to win. We’re not the typical politicians you’d expect to see every day in the Senate. One of us is a seven-fingered dirt farmer. The other has been called disheveled, wrinkled, and rumpled. Neither of us are winning any best dressed awards anytime soon. But the thing that really sets us apart? We’ll work with anyone to get the job done for our constituents. And we’ll always stand up to the special interests in Washington to help folks back home. But we’re facing the toughest reelection fight of our careers. Election experts are calling us the most vulnerable Democratic senators, and Mitch McConnell and his cronies are planning to unleash hundreds of millions of dollars to try and defeat us. We’ve got a lot of work to do between now and Election Day. **So we’re launching the Big Sky Buckeye Fund with a goal of raising $500,000 in the next 48 hours** to build up our resources and fight back against the millions that’ll be thrown our way. **[Ready to roll up your sleeves and get to work? Become a founding donor of our Big Sky Buckeye Fund by splitting a contribution between our campaigns and Tammy Baldwin today. name: Diane Sare
subject: Zoom Call 8:30 pm Tonight! Sare Campaign Going nationwide
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sare for Senate
body:
| | [](https://www.sareforsenate.com/?e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20231120_8_30_pm_activists_cal&n=1)
---
Friend As you will see in the [release below](https://www.sareforsenate.com/r?u=fk3qs1mHicx9-w03tafB2G8vNGMp4KGcuuJPtVN2Yhb9td1ZtaHP53WrauPaSbdseA7xeO59KWQWiihoPci4JLSbkL6nuf--LBJciMSkCSV9ZBzGl7Xse069HqMQN3iPXUZDHQ5gs50_hCgjyAuDoRDeUvhW5FwElCVIDvxhTMMmWgy9FHJxj54LsYRkEKsr&e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20231120_8_30_pm_activists_cal&n=2), we are recruiting activists in every state to build momentum for my New York State U.S. Senate Race, and to get the United States to change course now! Thanksgiving Week and the 60th anniversary of the JFK Assassination make this a very appropriate time to restore our nation to the anti-British-colonialism identity for which we were once loved by freedom-seeking people the world over.
### **Join Zoom Meeting 8:30 pm EDT, Monday November 20**
https://us02web.zoom.us/j/89721943105?pwd=b3dFb3hzdFJFczIvdnNvRGZyMTg0QT09
Meeting ID: 897 2194 3105
Passcode: 559017 \--- One tap mobile
+19294362866,,89721943105#,,,,*559017# US (New York)
+13017158592,,89721943105#,,,,*559017# US (Washington DC) For urgent release:
## [Sare for Senate Launches a National Campaign for Peace on Earth](https://www.sareforsenate.com/sare_for_senate_launches_a_national_campaign_pdf?e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20231120_8_30_pm_activists_cal&n=3)
November 19, 2023— Billions of people across the globe are watching in horror and spiritual agony as the British and American-backed Bibi Netanyahu regime moves to eliminate up to 2.3 million Palestinian people in Gaza. Millions have demonstrated in the streets from London to Washington to Istanbul demanding a halt to the killing of innocents, including over 5,000 children as of this writing. The question is not only how do we stop this senseless slaughter, but how do we lift mankind to a new level where violence against other human beings becomes a thing of the past? The United States, which declared the first successful anti-colonial revolution against the British Empire in 1776, has a crucial role to play in bringing a new paradigm into existence. But 60 years after the assassination of President John F. Kennedy, we have lost our way. In fact, the capitulation of the American people to the Warren Commission cover-up and everything which followed it, including the jailing of America’s most qualified presidential candidate, Lyndon LaRouche, has had its intended result: we have become the new British Empire on nuclear steroids capable of annihilating the entire planet, where, given the mentally frail but vicious condition of our current “president,” sane leaders of the world are gingerly walking on eggshells trying to avoid triggering the end of us all. They hope, and Americans hope, that the 2024 Federal Elections, where one-third of the U.S. Senate, the entire House of Representatives, and the Presidency are all up for a long-overdue replacement, could be a great cleansing, perhaps like a giant toilet flushing, where an entirely new leadership might come in to save the day. We find ourselves facing the greatest opportunity of our lifetimes where the rotten imperialist system based in the City of London and Wall Street is nearing its desperate end, and a new system which upholds the inalienable rights of Man and the perfect sovereignty of each nation can become the new order of the planet. But our own beloved republic, which should embody these principles, has instead become the enforcer of everything all free people abhor. Tragically, although former President Donald Trump and Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. are both viewed as threatening enough to the dying order of the “Great Reset” crew that they are being harassed with lawsuits, as in the case of Trump, or induced to destroy themselves, as Kennedy has done with his implicit support for the genocide in Gaza, neither of them has demonstrated the quality of leadership needed for this moment, and anyone who would, as Lyndon LaRouche did, will not be allowed remotely near the presidency. Therefore, my campaign for U.S. Senate from New York will now become a nationwide effort with the rapid recruitment of organizing committees in each state dedicated not merely to my election as a United States Senator from New York and the delightful uproar that would ensue as a result, but to working with me to ensure that the entire program of Lyndon LaRouche is adopted as policy by the United States Government. For those not familiar, this means the immediate reinstatement of the FDR-era Glass-Steagall Act (and the bankrupting and prosecution of the banksters who made this mess), followed by the replacement of the Federal Reserve with a National Bank which would fund urgently needed great projects to increase the productivity of the American workforce, augmented by a crash program to develop a fusion-powered economy. All of this would most efficiently be done in concert with other nations including China, currently the most productive nation on the planet, as well as Russia, and many others. We must adhere to former Secretary of State and President John Quincy Adams’ admonition to not go abroad in “search of monsters to destroy," but to come together, as John F. Kennedy proposed, to advance the “freedom of man.” What better state from which to launch such a campaign than the great State of New York, where our first President, George Washington, was inaugurated, and from whence Alexander Hamilton, James Madison and John Jay issued the _Federalist Papers_ , laying the basis for our Constitution? My campaign is dedicated to unifying our nation from New York and making her a trusted partner in the new paradigm already underway, as the BRICS-plus process indicates. We shall restore the great Island of Manhattan from the stinking cesspool of degeneracy and financial dictatorship typified by former clients of the late Jeffrey Epstein, to a gleaming “City on the Hill” of commerce, culture, and a dialogue of civilizations of which Americans can be proud. Can you imagine that? | [](https://www.sareforsenate.com/donate?e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20231120_8_30_pm_activists_cal&n=4 "DONATE") [DONATE](https://www.sareforsenate.com/donate?e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20231120_8_30_pm_activists_cal&n=4)
---
\--Diane
* * *
[](https://www.sareforsenate.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6hhYeg6uqrmVjcmfPLFdm4zVmvb8S7HE8Z_RlHQCC7m4&e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20231120_8_30_pm_activists_cal&n=5) | [](https://www.sareforsenate.com/r?u=YqgukYA3Mrlri-dqG7I8Tst9BOlZ9OlCCK74nOWoOKg&e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20231120_8_30_pm_activists_cal&n=6) | [](https://www.sareforsenate.com/r?u=6hyvAYXBs1PELL28GD73y2TAV1jfx9D-rSZxIUaL162PHBHURBc1qsFUGlrBqSav&e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20231120_8_30_pm_activists_cal&n=7) | [](https://www.sareforsenate.com/r?u=h1LOxbVy26ImgEbXJVo-ZZXVyx336ZlBfOdYcb7kM01j94uPh32frcmIhKSp55_4&e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20231120_8_30_pm_activists_cal&n=8) | [](https://www.sareforsenate.com/r?u=w5XKTZ0h8dEcNEoc_HghfJi8wVgkxoBFeO9SbtDkrsOsB53pTkfNsNzYoZI4W0Bq&e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20231120_8_30_pm_activists_cal&n=9) | [](https://www.sareforsenate.com/r?u=GQ96LxW7tJscudkL8mlwNyyQszqhD4wGTfakbeHue5PWHQ_UvD5z0w5lHezUkTQJ&e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20231120_8_30_pm_activists_cal&n=10)

name: Victor Riches
subject: Children’s book socialists teachers are afraid of
body:
[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6a1dcc768f3143d4b98452dca96f0c55&_e=lL9xC4ZwBd0b2HMHlCuTZ7_kfhjbCJxnTJBE0sJSFY9inaFpsM92OsYX-lTRV3Wb62lbt34trmjMiDSQqml9C7hcdwYqMt-XQpvpyqMFC8fjbNbz1xnY36ti6KS1Y-LEUmwnsGoSejFpNzYwPx7BGpMqq2KYX3imEUJ0kMxbtzOirLF7jvRZ7NcjfPW0-XGvfdvp259Xk83W8LhpbCfSKG3GfTGBvnXWTnaJpflZa8OuZyM39PiZZ02K_4N4zi2-Em1qupmzK0j1_eT4Y8SsM0b2qmbKP7fxjO_QkQqW6SA%3D)
We are facing a crisis in our education system.

Friend,

We are facing a crisis in our education system.

According to a recent study, most Americans lack a basic understanding of their constitutional rights. Many cannot even name the three branches of government.

That's why the Goldwater Institute created a new type of children's book, A Is for the American Dream -- to instill a renewed appreciation for the pillars of our constitutional republic. We are now working on distributing this fun book to children and families nationwide.
_[You can support the Goldwater Institute's work to teach kids about
the American Dream, by donating here >](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6a1dcc768f3143d4b98452dca96f0c55&_e=lL9xC4ZwBd0b2HMHlCuTZ7_kfhjbCJxnTJBE0sJSFY9inaFpsM92OsYX-lTRV3Wb62lbt34trmjMiDSQqml9C7hcdwYqMt-XQpvpyqMFC8fjbNbz1xnY36ti6KS1Y-LEUmwnsGoSejFpNzYwPx7BGur_rtVrz_SmAYIVkaPQfBQWZ1JqjFM1NQOFvNlxUFZOOBCE6kIndAiPuMXS5zyyZW_A1lP-U5q2kame1BCJTMv6tzeVn_4VL6M6HNRBFawMxS5RGzyMBxhNmETnsyzqkJYlaMfOzjkNmfy5Meucf_U%3D)[>](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6a1dcc768f3143d4b98452dca96f0c55&_e=lL9xC4ZwBd0b2HMHlCuTZ7_kfhjbCJxnTJBE0sJSFY9inaFpsM92OsYX-lTRV3Wb62lbt34trmjMiDSQqml9C7hcdwYqMt-XQpvpyqMFC8fjbNbz1xnY36ti6KS1Y-LEUmwnsGoSejFpNzYwPx7BGuyMNwi328PVsH4CawSPlsO6a_McZaeiVwMwsfC4QwAyr3S_a3fdeBj1m6NHK_gexY6y4zD9F1-R2pO8bMuxXZA2huKekYpmEZnBc2Sntpt-ggjrIyhbHeBgURbzxxfngAflR8F8VPEltQD5Lcl7kXs%3D)_

[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6a1dcc768f3143d4b98452dca96f0c55&_e=lL9xC4ZwBd0b2HMHlCuTZ7_kfhjbCJxnTJBE0sJSFY9inaFpsM92OsYX-lTRV3Wb62lbt34trmjMiDSQqml9C7hcdwYqMt-XQpvpyqMFC8fjbNbz1xnY36ti6KS1Y-LEUmwnsGoSejFpNzYwPx7BGpFyQIuUFTAjSfED32ngRJPlUrw3tmLNOiyxaOzTElmPZYVd_jVC-GYOs3YYlJCHtr-Laiar9jXO0rhSkuRkCKjG4HILJs8e0RwSsKYnhwhvAb5uvHTFqEUEu-1gel6jPdeL4dqGdSDDySzPTABckvc%3D)

I'm Victor Riches, President and CEO of the Goldwater Institute, the nation's preeminent liberty organization fighting for your constitutional liberties in legislatures and courtrooms across the country.

_**A Is for the American Dream**_ teaches kids that everyone can achieve success and prosperity through hard work and perseverance, no matter their background or social status.

[My goal is to raise $30,000 to continue creating and distributing great resources like _A Is for the American Dream_ to schools and libraries. clean_body: We are facing a crisis in our education system. Friend, We are facing a crisis in our education system. According to a recent study, most Americans lack a basic understanding of their constitutional rights. Many cannot even name the three branches of government. That's why the Goldwater Institute created a new type of children's book, A Is for the American Dream -- to instill a renewed appreciation for the pillars of our constitutional republic. We are now working on distributing this fun book to children and families nationwide. I'm Victor Riches, President and CEO of the Goldwater Institute, the nation's preeminent liberty organization fighting for your constitutional liberties in legislatures and courtrooms across the country. A Is for the American Dream teaches kids that everyone can achieve success and prosperity through hard work and perseverance, no matter their background or social status. The book comes at a time when public schools are exposing our children to radical leftist agendas that teach toxic ideologies like Critical Race Theory, all while they cut parents out of important conversations about what's happening to their kids. These narratives push a slanted view of America, one that is overwhelmingly negative, divisive, and simply false! Goldwater designed A Is for the American Dream to help the next generation develop an appreciation for the freedoms and responsibilities that come with living in the United States. The book exposes kids to everything that makes our nation exceptional -- the Constitution, the Declaration of Independence, voting rights, prosperity, bravery, and more! It teaches kids that whether they want to be a painter, an astronaut, a mom or a dad, an inventor, a gymnast, a teacher, or a business owner, the American Dream is within their grasp. The Goldwater Institute has stood on the front lines in the fight to protect children from radical leftist indoctrination. We passed the first universal school choice program in the country and have passed reforms to yank DEI practices out of colleges. But it's not enough to defeat bad ideas. We must also replace them with good ideas. A is for the American Dream teaches children about important American principles like bravery, hard work, liberty, and opportunity. You can play a major role in getting this book in front of more children by supporting the Goldwater Institute. Click below to show your support today. Thank you for helping us reach the next generation, Victor Riches President & CEO Goldwater Institute The Goldwater Institute is recognized by the Internal Revenue Service as a 501(c)(3) organization. Our federal identification number is 86-0597661. Defend the Constitution 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

| | Peter, It’s Sam Brown and Hung Cao.

As military veterans, we know what it takes to keep Americans safe.

That’s why after our visit to our Southern Border, we are absolutely FURIOUS.

Democrats are letting our border fall by the wayside, and it’s putting Americans in danger.

It’s time we send leaders to DC who know what it’s like to defend America both at home and abroad, and that’s why we’re reaching out to you today.

**We’re both running for Senate because our call to service didn’t end when we hung up our military uniforms.**

body:

Peter,

defend the Squad against AIPAC’s attacks.

progressive primary challenger in 2020 and 2022. The hypocrisy is

It is a day to remember the lives of transgender and non-binary individuals we have lost to transphobia and senseless acts of violence. I’m committed to making our state and country a place where no one faces discrimination or violence because of their gender identity or expression. I also understand that legislation has a direct impact on the level of anti-trans violence in this nation. In a year where an unprecedented number of anti-trans bills were passed, it’s not enough to lend these victims our thoughts and prayers. We must honor them with action. [**_Today, and every day, I am committed to defending the rights and liberties of every American because that is the promise of our democracy. clean_body: | Today is Transgender Day of Remembrance, Peter. It is a day to remember the lives of transgender and non-binary individuals we have lost to transphobia and senseless acts of violence. I’m committed to making our state and country a place where no one faces discrimination or violence because of their gender identity or expression. I also understand that legislation has a direct impact on the level of anti-trans violence in this nation. In a year where an unprecedented number of anti-trans bills were passed, it’s not enough to lend these victims our thoughts and prayers. We must honor them with action. | Thank you for joining me in remembering and celebrating the lives and experiences of transgender people. – David Mitch McConnell's super PAC is preparing to spend hundreds of millions to flip the Senate in 2024, and we need to be ready to fight back with everything we've got. David Trone knows that the path to holding our Democratic Senate majority runs right through Maryland – that's why he needs our support. | David Trone for Maryland P.O. Box 83998 Gaithersburg, MD 20883-3998 United States | mailto:info@davidtrone.com Paid for by David Trone for Maryland.

name: James Carville
subject: You should be scared
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
Peter -- we need to talk about the map.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231120-1?refcode=em20231120-1&refcode2=1180_552475_UrOOgD&akid=1180%2E552475%2EUrOOgD)
Not my friend Bob Casey’s map of Pennsylvania, but the 2024 Senate map.
I’ve been in politics a long time, but it doesn’t take an expert to see that **the path to protecting Democrats’ slim Senate majority is getting smaller.**
Across the country, the opportunity for Dems to pick up a Senate seat is slim. But it gets worse: Joe Manchin’s retirement announcement was a BOMBSHELL for Democrats, giving Mitch McConnell an easy pick-up opportunity. **Now, the GOP only has to flip ONE more seat to retake the chamber, and I’m telling ya -- they’re hoping it’ll be PA.**
If we lose here, Democrats can kiss the Senate majority goodbye. With Mitch McConnell in charge, he and his cronies will push their far-right agenda and wreck our country.
Are you scared? Because you should be, Peter.
**[But it’s not all doom and gloom. We can stop Mitch McConnell from taking back the gavel, and it starts with re-electing Bob Casey. So can I count on you to chip in to Bob’s campaign right now?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231120-1?refcode=em20231120-1&refcode2=1180_552475_UrOOgD&akid=1180%2E552475%2EUrOOgD)**
**[Donate Now ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231120-1?refcode=em20231120-1&refcode2=1180_552475_UrOOgD&akid=1180%2E552475%2EUrOOgD)**
Look, Bob can’t win this thing alone. He’s up against a mega-millionaire hedge fund guy who can spend HUGE sums of his own money to self-fund this race. That’s on top of the millions upon millions that dark money super PACs and GOP megadonors are gearing up to spend to flip PA’s Senate seat red.
If we don’t show up for Bob TODAY, we’re toast. Hell if I’m gonna let that happen.
**[That’s why I’m in your inbox, pleading with you to pitch in any amount right now to keep this seat and our Senate majority in Democratic hands.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231120-1?refcode=em20231120-1&refcode2=1180_552475_UrOOgD&akid=1180%2E552475%2EUrOOgD)**
Let’s win this thing.
-- James Carville

We are facing a crisis in our education system.

Friend,

We are facing a crisis in our education system.

According to a recent study, most Americans lack a basic understanding of their constitutional rights. Many cannot even name the three branches of government.

That's why the Goldwater Institute created a new type of children's book, A Is for the American Dream -- to instill a renewed appreciation for the pillars of our constitutional republic. We are now working on distributing this fun book to children and families nationwide.
_[You can support the Goldwater Institute's work to teach kids about
the American Dream, by donating here >](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=549ebfb2d74749ed9baf0c268ba90d5a&_e=e66tlLKsjv1Io4hzTWEJRiyab0qf4IyFgKXAK15YM06oI_zAZdloxylfW68Dh2e7EjVu_G-ABKPJZt-jwr9NxofwEy5jDh38Gadtc0DipyNKoXaabtG_Qo36SEMWvel8ePnIJrRYa4Vbw-nID3ek4ElrilOk0JQAFc7XN75wK7s_pEzsbRSKiccCMQ736yvF2VZ1ujbBFcQbRAOsyXte2eaR4lvUmTZRkQ4_wXWODPF6mDb-uto_vlSV3ITA6xPI1S5QGfKgj0vRWrWJD0krGUweNIJK6GAWyLosf8Yq83Q%3D)[>](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=549ebfb2d74749ed9baf0c268ba90d5a&_e=e66tlLKsjv1Io4hzTWEJRiyab0qf4IyFgKXAK15YM06oI_zAZdloxylfW68Dh2e7EjVu_G-ABKPJZt-jwr9NxofwEy5jDh38Gadtc0DipyNKoXaabtG_Qo36SEMWvel8ePnIJrRYa4Vbw-nID3ek4BsqiT5in9DoleLtwmWfU4k3gI8HddmJSuwiK0G78Hee1z69p88mhqJCkz2bicZPRGhGMrS-NHiJYx24toqzQl4TBa7uR2SqV93V_K45TLZWLZZAKND-oDQ5nYHJYQZ1l8lqnL_d7NTgNXZ91rHcHuo%3D)_

I'm Victor Riches, President and CEO of the Goldwater Institute, the nation's preeminent liberty organization fighting for your constitutional liberties in legislatures and courtrooms across the country.

_**A Is for the American Dream**_ teaches kids that everyone can achieve success and prosperity through hard work and perseverance, no matter their background or social status.

[My goal is to raise $30,000 to continue creating and distributing great resources like _A Is for the American Dream_ to schools and libraries. Please click here to donate >>](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=549ebfb2d74749ed9baf0c268ba90d5a&_e=e66tlLKsjv1Io4hzTWEJRiyab0qf4IyFgKXAK15YM06oI_zAZdloxylfW68Dh2e7EjVu_G-ABKPJZt-jwr9NxofwEy5jDh38Gadtc0DipyNKoXaabtG_Qo36SEMWvel8ePnIJrRYa4Vbw-nID3ek4OZUKPW1JPSguwiBZpg66cnQavJhoKgQRRzvCAWQQ2HMthQC6wDn0hqIZj1AJ6x8kVfg2BJjWJ3QjB4qsVXAng6CG7e4PKinCR4NBT0Uv3MxaKindbVCZenNMw8GbtPiPVGpZpccjJJei2HKPxC6Ue8%3D)

[Donate](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=549ebfb2d74749ed9baf0c268ba90d5a&_e=e66tlLKsjv1Io4hzTWEJRiyab0qf4IyFgKXAK15YM06oI_zAZdloxylfW68Dh2e7EjVu_G-ABKPJZt-jwr9NxofwEy5jDh38Gadtc0DipyNKoXaabtG_Qo36SEMWvel8ePnIJrRYa4Vbw-nID3ek4LLdowIb-EmqmY0NU021OBPVTUf7Q-Oo27JeC6wiV3DQ2smzXakVTfPdBRmeX78cZIOWPAaae2LlYg93iT9HNkz8lMgdEX_eFy-qTA3M90o4Usbw83vUA0C5EaTvOvNXtV-A12Z05lLcd4hvPLYEb7w%3D)

The book comes at a time when public schools are exposing our children to radical leftist agendas that teach toxic ideologies like Critical Race Theory, all while they cut parents out of important conversations about what's happening to their kids.

**These narratives push a slanted view of America, one that is overwhelmingly negative, divisive, and simply false!**

Goldwater designed _**A Is for the American Dream**_ to help the next generation develop an appreciation for the freedoms and responsibilities that come with living in the United States.

[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=549ebfb2d74749ed9baf0c268ba90d5a&_e=e66tlLKsjv1Io4hzTWEJRiyab0qf4IyFgKXAK15YM06oI_zAZdloxylfW68Dh2e7EjVu_G-ABKPJZt-jwr9NxofwEy5jDh38Gadtc0DipyNKoXaabtG_Qo36SEMWvel8ePnIJrRYa4Vbw-nID3ek4HxthC838TlYAPSFiy6aG9NHt5T5QYRjZiHNzcdLu-U__GoDZyDj1YWrtlxCP_pISi541SLej3vOzYBDac7zFGFyJGndCqCJ8lN3Ii7qS_iu8ANIzZyr8ltQY03f8yKRXWzLPqFDqjU0cfUFAkprUPk%3D)

The book exposes kids to everything that makes our nation exceptional -- the Constitution, the Declaration of Independence, voting rights, prosperity, bravery, and more!

It teaches kids that whether they want to be a painter, an astronaut, a mom or a dad, an inventor, a gymnast, a teacher, or a business owner, the American Dream is within their grasp.

[Your support helps the Goldwater Institute give a freedom-focused education to more children. Please click here to donate $10, $35, or even $50 today >>>](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=549ebfb2d74749ed9baf0c268ba90d5a&_e=e66tlLKsjv1Io4hzTWEJRiyab0qf4IyFgKXAK15YM06oI_zAZdloxylfW68Dh2e7EjVu_G-ABKPJZt-jwr9NxofwEy5jDh38Gadtc0DipyNKoXaabtG_Qo36SEMWvel8ePnIJrRYa4Vbw-nID3ek4H8BnPnDIhfocqQ05nwP7egGACjcLLfg1ecsUl_9tPqkvlgxt0s3ym4enc1DwwE8QldtnSqX2_0JUHyexKuZLDpt0zxQRUM9xt5oQrmkUZ74_-g7LjVZVyG06yNctczQPNe9jtl_xj2rpRypOMcdnhE%3D)

The Goldwater Institute has stood on the front lines in the fight to protect children from radical leftist indoctrination. We passed the first universal school choice program in the country and have passed reforms to yank DEI practices out of colleges.

But it's not enough to defeat bad ideas. _We must also replace them with good ideas_.

_**A is for the American Dream**_ teaches children about important American principles like bravery, hard work, liberty, and opportunity.

You can play a major role in getting this book in front of more children by supporting the Goldwater Institute. **Click below to show your support today.**

clean_body: We are facing a crisis in our education system. Friend, We are facing a crisis in our education system. According to a recent study, most Americans lack a basic understanding of their constitutional rights. Many cannot even name the three branches of government. That's why the Goldwater Institute created a new type of children's book, A Is for the American Dream -- to instill a renewed appreciation for the pillars of our constitutional republic. We are now working on distributing this fun book to children and families nationwide. I'm Victor Riches, President and CEO of the Goldwater Institute, the nation's preeminent liberty organization fighting for your constitutional liberties in legislatures and courtrooms across the country. A Is for the American Dream teaches kids that everyone can achieve success and prosperity through hard work and perseverance, no matter their background or social status. The book comes at a time when public schools are exposing our children to radical leftist agendas that teach toxic ideologies like Critical Race Theory, all while they cut parents out of important conversations about what's happening to their kids. These narratives push a slanted view of America, one that is overwhelmingly negative, divisive, and simply false! Goldwater designed A Is for the American Dream to help the next generation develop an appreciation for the freedoms and responsibilities that come with living in the United States. The book exposes kids to everything that makes our nation exceptional -- the Constitution, the Declaration of Independence, voting rights, prosperity, bravery, and more! It teaches kids that whether they want to be a painter, an astronaut, a mom or a dad, an inventor, a gymnast, a teacher, or a business owner, the American Dream is within their grasp. The Goldwater Institute has stood on the front lines in the fight to protect children from radical leftist indoctrination. We passed the first universal school choice program in the country and have passed reforms to yank DEI practices out of colleges. But it's not enough to defeat bad ideas. We must also replace them with good ideas. A is for the American Dream teaches children about important American principles like bravery, hard work, liberty, and opportunity. You can play a major role in getting this book in front of more children by supporting the Goldwater Institute. Click below to show your support today. Thank you for helping us reach the next generation, Victor Riches President & CEO Goldwater Institute The Goldwater Institute is recognized by the Internal Revenue Service as a 501(c)(3) organization. Our federal identification number is 86-0597661. Conservative Liberty Wire 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

| | | This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f13851673c854677ba95e6d4a3e28227&_e=yuBSSUBiaXQiQ55Yw7Xrn5F6EtRO4TfzqVcI3z0KvSKxQ05hnIEuBBmpPXRswg7-Y5lG6h71M0Sbl_APyi_vbzMZ9dQfvviBUcyt81B6qwzLJGN_0xV-dm_Ld_O0q7BBwkZ4g1-65vUFuFvOyqKkU1oYY5M2ubQo5bReB32gnBhbfMEiDKMTUL6M4YjpdpQDiw9NE5AVkGDRb-ZUmm-oM7iLg3mXhSn9cM0wavdR-zTB_sNdTgtZkFwFBizLUcAQysG7nbBIkY5r6Kt2A8J_XPvxnWGfX_AyFxX55X1krmUBmnCHFsSv2T0Stex8pcF6bkWGNFCsYTGlfuAucyIthuScVJKbW0lfTI3PdoJVaaHMSJuUTlhI5Fl0mI8crXqx_BzOFZG6jr2wGjUDcQXRm9t5dTZ22WTJUk0fzpVgHCe51N2A-HfNnUjhZ9liwWMQ)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f13851673c854677ba95e6d4a3e28227&_e=yuBSSUBiaXQiQ55Yw7Xrn5F6EtRO4TfzqVcI3z0KvSKxQ05hnIEuBBmpPXRswg7-Y5lG6h71M0Sbl_APyi_vbzMZ9dQfvviBUcyt81B6qwzLJGN_0xV-dm_Ld_O0q7BBwkZ4g1-65vUFuFvOyqKkU1oYY5M2ubQo5bReB32gnBhbfMEiDKMTUL6M4YjpdpQDiw9NE5AVkGDRb-ZUmm-oM7iLg3mXhSn9cM0wavdR-zTB_sNdTgtZkFwFBizLUcAQysG7nbBIkY5r6Kt2A8J_XAth0l_bcFO97J9yB3oapf_IC9u39pzeQy-JyxUx0P2qdlaW9P7Hm7MBaWzEfAH9dEcgDhvBp9SgSbA22rxyHn5TOkCVzu40YVCSfnS1OEjvFO_FWSwcV1TPVugiHkwwU0ULnfh4PvuY58-NnkWnIC-GA0ECdYvW9VX4gy5w247t)" which you can now own on DVD.

| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f13851673c854677ba95e6d4a3e28227&_e=yuBSSUBiaXQiQ55Yw7Xrn5F6EtRO4TfzqVcI3z0KvSKxQ05hnIEuBBmpPXRswg7-Y5lG6h71M0Sbl_APyi_vbzMZ9dQfvviBUcyt81B6qwzLJGN_0xV-dm_Ld_O0q7BBwkZ4g1-65vUFuFvOyqKkU1oYY5M2ubQo5bReB32gnBhbfMEiDKMTUL6M4YjpdpQDiw9NE5AVkGDRb-ZUmm-oM7iLg3mXhSn9cM0wavdR-zTB_sNdTgtZkFwFBizLUcAQysG7nbBIkY5r6Kt2A8J_XNb9btiUx2WItIYJKc8_qFE5LWVYtk7a9Vy9vMwn1jcwitAKD_IYgnwhpHZa6tDAg9q0HsfqYmBxfXYt7up5RG_CCYN8gtZK3u6W7XPMgNvQEOknr6OR0wPtkyWCBixnTvLpO3z64I2thIwRb5ve712-oYnVVIwpT4WDgJBQyX2A).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09

Hillsdale College

We know who Trump is because we had four years of him in office. He is anti-woman, anti-democracy, anti-LGBTQ+, anti-immigrant, and his policies are directly against the interests of the working people of America.
Monica De La Cruz has brought that same MAGA agenda to TX-15. Her policies will make basic rights, like healthcare and reproductive care, harder for South Texans to access.
**Peter, it is clear that in this election, alt-right hate and extremism is on the ballot once again.**
We must fight back if we are to have any chance of bringing meaningful change to South Texas.

clean_body: Guess who met Trump in McAllen? | | | Peter, this weekend Trump was in TX-15 for what his campaign called “an official state visit.” Well guess who met Trump in McAllen? If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll instantly process your contribution to Michelle Vallejo: | We know who Trump is because we had four years of him in office. He is anti-woman, anti-democracy, anti-LGBTQ+, anti-immigrant, and his policies are directly against the interests of the working people of America. Monica De La Cruz has brought that same MAGA agenda to TX-15. Her policies will make basic rights, like healthcare and reproductive care, harder for South Texans to access. Peter, it is clear that in this election, alt-right hate and extremism is on the ballot once again. We must fight back if we are to have any chance of bringing meaningful change to South Texas. ¡Vamos Por Quince! Team Vallejo | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Michelle Vallejo for Congress Michelle Vallejo for Congress PO Box 1265 Mission, TX 78573

body:
After all these years, I can’t think of a stronger rebuke of Calvert's long-standing, anti-LGBTQ agenda than by replacing him with an openly gay prosecutor like Will, who will uphold the law and fight for equal rights.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/73687540/439338502/395234972?refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2023-11-20_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFkY2Q2M2FkLWNmODctZWUxMS04OTI1LTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=XUsAvtSa7Z0ijWPIhwfb_SMETQjRXpvoam7orEjBnow=)
---
Hi there, Peter, it's Mark Takano.

I'm reaching out to ask you to split a [_**$10 donation**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/73687547/439338513/395234972?refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2023-11-20_1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFkY2Q2M2FkLWNmODctZWUxMS04OTI1LTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=XUsAvtSa7Z0ijWPIhwfb_SMETQjRXpvoam7orEjBnow=) between Fight for Progress and Will Rollins’ campaign before his next deadline hits. Before I do, I want to be vulnerable for a moment and share a personal story about my coming out experience.

In 1994, my Republican opponent outed me as gay by sending out bigoted, homophobic campaign mailers in our race.

This was before I'd even come out publicly.

Coming out is an extremely personal moment, so you can imagine my horror finding out I had been outed so publicly -- and in such a hateful way.

**And you might be familiar with the person who did it -- Ken Calvert, the same Republican that Will Rollins is now running to unseat.**

Calvert blamed “the times” and claims he has since changed, but his attacks on the LGBTQ community haven’t. He voted against the Matthew Shepard hate crimes bill. He voted against gay adoption and voted to keep us out of the military.

**After all these years, I can’t think of a stronger rebuke of Calvert's long-standing, anti-LGBTQ agenda than by replacing him with an openly gay prosecutor like Will, who will uphold the law and fight for equal rights.**

[_**Will’s race happens to be one of the most consequential elections in the country in the Democrats’ effort to retake the House. He can win, but he’ll need your support to do it. If you can, please split a contribution of $10 or more between FIght for Progress and Will’s campaign before their next fundraising deadline.**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/73687549/439338517/395234972?refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2023-11-20_1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFkY2Q2M2FkLWNmODctZWUxMS04OTI1LTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=XUsAvtSa7Z0ijWPIhwfb_SMETQjRXpvoam7orEjBnow=)

clean_body: After all these years, I can’t think of a stronger rebuke of Calvert's long-standing, anti-LGBTQ agenda than by replacing him with an openly gay prosecutor like Will, who will uphold the law and fight for equal rights. | = Hi there, Peter, it's Mark Takano. I'm reaching out to ask you to split a = between Fight for Progress and Will Rollins’ campaign before his next deadline hits. Before I do, I want to be vulnerable for a moment and share a personal story about my coming out experience. In 1994, my Republican opponent outed me as gay by sending out bigoted, homophobic campaign mailers in our race. This was before I'd even come out publicly. Coming out is an extremely personal moment, so you can imagine my horror finding out I had been outed so publicly -- and in such a hateful way. And you might be familiar with the person who did it -- Ken Calvert, the same Republican that Will Rollins is now running to unseat. Calvert blamed “the times” and claims he has since changed, but his attacks on the LGBTQ community haven’t. He voted against the Matthew Shepard hate crimes bill. He voted against gay adoption and voted to keep us out of the military. After all these years, I can’t think of a stronger rebuke of Calvert's long-standing, anti-LGBTQ agenda than by replacing him with an openly gay prosecutor like Will, who will uphold the law and fight for equal rights. = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Mark * | | = Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee. name: Rick Larsen
subject: Improving health policies in rural WA-02
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Citizens to Elect Rick Larsen
body:
Breaking Down Barriers to Rural Health Care
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73687599/439338641/-201694504?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMjU0NDFjOS1jZjg3LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=g9P_sCV_7XBya09ye3pJ_DDOKbSLl9W5zmgLX6k-1HM=&emci=e4945e41-cb87-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=e25441c9-cf87-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=9494239)
---

| | **Ensuring access to high quality, affordable health care is essential for everyone, but especially challenging for folks who live in rural Northwest Washington communities.** In Washington, our rural hospitals serve upwards of 70% of the geographic area and 15% of our population. What sets rural hospitals apart from their counterparts in more densely populated areas? They create critical connections for local health care services and a bridge to specialized care outside the community at bigger medical facilities. **My goal is to better understand and address the unique challenges rural communities face in delivering health care to enable all people to live healthy lives, so that is why I have joined a bipartisan Congressional Caucus on rural health.** Here is what I will be working on with the caucus:
* Improving access to specialized substance abuse prevention and treatment
* Breaking down barriers for military families and veterans
* Increasing the number of beds for long-term care and pediatric behavioral health
* Addressing workforce shortages
* Improving access to reproductive health care

Of course, I will continue to champion federal investments in resources and innovative solutions to lower drug prices and improve health care access and outcomes in rural communities. [**I am excited to get to work with the caucus to improve health outcomes for**** _every_****zip code. If you would like to support this effort, consider chipping in to my re-election campaign.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73687600/439338659/1596212816?refcode=2023-11-20-rural&recurring=&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=e25441c9-cf87-ee11-8925-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMjU0NDFjOS1jZjg3LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=g9P_sCV_7XBya09ye3pJ_DDOKbSLl9W5zmgLX6k-1HM=) _Rick_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:

| | Peter – Election Day is **tomorrow.** All of us on Team Riebe are determined to make the most of these final hours and do everything we can to get Kathleen across the finish line. We're busy calling voters and boosting our online outreach. Make no mistake: **there is absolutely enough time left to reach new voters and close the margin in this race.** We need to make sure we have the resources for our final big push. All of us on Team Riebe are determined to make the most of these final hours and do everything we can to get Kathleen across the finish line. We're busy calling voters and boosting our online outreach. Make no mistake: there is absolutely enough time left to reach new voters and close the margin in this race. We need to make sure we have the resources for our final big push. But to fund all of our Election Eve and Election Day outreach, we need to raise $1,267 more in the next few hours. = = ** Donate Now If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = ---|--- = | = = Every effort from supporters like you has brought our movement here — in a position to pull off an incredible victory in a seat where Democrats aren't supposed to have a chance to compete. The senior editor of** FiveThirtyEighttweeted this morning that the margin in UT-02 "is going to catch some people by surprise" and wrote about how Kathleen has put this district on the map. = So let's lock in for this final stretch, and work for every last vote! = Best, Team Riebe = | | | Paid for and authorized by Riebe for Congress. |

subject: NEW: Chairman Video
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Washington State Republican Party
body:
WAGOP Chairman Jim Walsh shares his weekly video updates with WA Republicans.

http://wsrp.org
Ballots Are Out, Vote By November 2nd!

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WeGlgXqOx-Y

With ballots out, now is the perfect time to get out there and volunteer on a conservative campaign. Every door you knock on in these local races matter a lot and the results of this election year will be used as a bellwether for the 2022 midterms.

We are also hosting another WSRP Statewide Day Of Action on Saturday, October 30th! Bring a friend or neighbor to volunteer for a few hours to help local conservatives win in November! Sign up here to join our Statewide Day Of Action! (https://form.jotform.com/212737084845058)
State Sen. Gildon On Vaccine Mandates
https://soundcloud.com/user-450836972/wagop-report-state-sen-chris-gildon-on-vaccine-mandates-and-democrat-anti-policing-laws
State Senator Chris Gildon (R - Puyallup) joins the podcast this week to discuss vaccine mandates, anti-policing laws, the Long-Term Care Tax, and how he got his start in politics. WAGOP is now on Apple Podcasts and Spotify, follow us and never miss an episode! Listen here. (https://soundcloud.com/user-450836972/wagop-report-state-sen-chris-gildon-on-vaccine-mandates-and-democrat-anti-policing-laws)
Republican Leaders Fight Inslee's Mandate
Thanks to our Republican leaders in the State House and Senate for fighting back and offering a strong rebuke of Inslee's harmful vaccine mandate. Below is an excerpt of their most recent statement to the press:

“We are already experiencing higher prices and empty shelves partially as a result of COVID's shutdowns and workforce shortages. Today's deadline, with its unnecessarily hardline consequences, will only make that worse when hundreds, if not thousands, lose their jobs and are denied unemployment benefits. It also threatens public safety by reducing our police forces at a time when crime is already rising. People feel unsafe. They are afraid of what criminals will do when there are even fewer law enforcement officers to respond. And they are worried about people's chances of survival if there aren't enough first responders to help in an emergency. The governor underestimates the potential impact of his actions.

“Coercion, intimidation, threats and public shaming are not tactics a leader should be using against the people. The governor's obvious disdain for those who are choosing to lose their jobs rather than compromise their right to make their own medical decisions is unhelpful. He is dividing the public – segregating us and turning people against each other. Yesterday, even unvaccinated health-care workers were heroes. Today, they become villains in the governor's narrative."

Read the full statement. (https://jtwilcox.houserepublicans.wa.gov/2021/10/18/republican-leaders-todays-vaccine-deadline-threatens-critical-services-public-safety/?fbclid=IwAR3WxI9H29hbbmfbZhdkDS9QjqdVd2TIRCdjNjUkUlLdeThtbUjK_WBWJuw)
Smiley Campaign Shows Grassroots Support In Latest Fundraising Quarter
Tiffany Smiley is fighting hard to retire Patty Murray and her latest fundraising numbers show not only has Tiffany raised more than $1.6 million but she also has unequivocal grassroots support, with over 10,000 donors from Washington State. Flipping a U.S. Senate seat is hard work but Tiffany has shown in the only 5 months since starting her campaign, that she is a force to be reckoned with. Learn more about how Tiffany stands on the issues here (https://www.smileyforwashington.com/issues) .
Contact:
Steve Johnson
Communications Director
Washington State Republican Party
(425) 460-0570
steve@wsrp.org (mailto:steve@wsrp.org)

or ** unsubscribe from this list (https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=4f90cbb438&e=6a281f566d&c=27da832e42)

name: Josh Shapiro
subject: Bob Casey
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHAPIRO FOR PENNSYLVANIA
body:
Hi Derek, Governor Josh Shapiro here. body:

---

# **Did The FBI and their "Bad Actors" Incite The Violence At The Capitol Building?**
---
| CLICK ON IMAGE BELOW and subscribe to our YouTube Channel "The Grassroots Army" to watch the LIVE where I break down some of the newly released footage from the so-called "Insurrection".
---
| [ ](https://9l762.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/sh/1t6Af4OiGsDg0fV3Ji0XTonBupr9Lp/tIMx0DAeK3G_)
---
|
### We The People DEMAND Transparency From Our Government
---
| Another busy week at the Grassroots Army Headquarters. Like many of you, I just want the TRUTH, no matter how horrible it may be. The American people deserve to know the truth, NOT some political narrative. They lied about the "plandemic"!Lockdowns DID MORE harm than good!Online schooling and unnecessary mandates set our children and grandchildren's education back decades!The vaccine may be doing more harm than good!The so-called "Insurrection" may have been incited by our own FBI and their bad actors! If we lose this next election cycle, I feel this little idea called America will be lost.
---
| **Argentina Elects****Javier Milei****As Its Next President. Who Is He And Why Does This Matter?** Let's revisit Tucker Carlson's interview with him in early September 2023.Click on the image below to watch the interview and make sure you subscribe to the Grassroots Army RUMBLE Channel

| [ ](https://9l762.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/sh/1t6Af4OiGsE8LNhTi46Se4r1Iept3t/aIG2pjecMYta)
---
| | | | Happy Thanksgiving to you and your family. Please say a special prayer for our military men and women who are deployed and also for the wrongly imprisoned, who are sitting in a prison cell, because they were doing what they thought was right for our country. God Bless You.God Bless the State of Michigan.And of course and always, God Bless these United States. Garrett SoldanoGrassroots Army

---
| **1 in 5 children in the U.S. face hunger. 1 in 6 face homelessness. And this week is National Hunger & Homelessness Awareness Week.**

The effects of childhood hunger and homelessness extend far beyond food and housing themselves—although those are critically important as well. **Facts about childhood hunger and homelessness:** **Fact #1:** Systemic inequities mean that experiencing hunger is much more common among Black and Latino children.

**Fact #2:** Children experiencing hunger are at higher risk of developmental issues.

**Fact #3:** Children experiencing homelessness are at higher risk of being split up from family.

**Fact #4:** Experiencing homelessness as a child is traumatic and poses several mental health risks.

**Fact #5:** Missing meals in the first three years of life can be particularly harmful to a child, increasing their risk of medical problems and hospitalization.

**Fact #6:** Repeating a grade in primary school is more common among children experiencing hunger.

No child should ever undergo the hardship associated with hunger and homelessness.

**We need leaders who meet the issues of hunger and homelessness with compassion, and who push for policies that seek to _help_ members of some of the most vulnerable populations—not punish them.**

Thank you for joining me this National Hunger and Homelessness Awareness Week,

Annie
---
* * *
| | PAID FOR BY THEIR FUTURE PAC

name: Jackson Lahmeyer
subject: Is The Christmas Tree Pagan??? Some Christians Say "Yes It Is..."
body:
Christmas Trees... Pagan? Some Christians make the claim that the Christmas tree is pagan in its' origin. I took 6 minutes to address that claim in
| | [](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=3727055.1259.1.470370566a1e3ec7a58ded0651cf1f00) |
---

body:
The political hatchet job against Speaker Johnson ENRAGES me to no end.

| |

---
| | | Even as a former CIA Director...

Even as a former Secretary of State...

Even as a former Member of Congress...

Washington DC never ceases to amaze me - I can't believe what I'm seeing right now. _I 'm sorry but __I need to vent for a minute:_

**The SECOND Mike Johnson was named the new House Speaker, the Liberal Mob sprang into action. They IMMEDIATELY initiated a pre-planned, coordinated political hatchet job against him for being: 1) a strong Conservative and 2) a God-fearing Christian.**

The Liberal Mob eviscerated him in the press. They called him a Cristo-fascist. They said he's too Conservative and too Christian for the top job. They even rushed out hit pieces about his wife.

It's a disgrace. Unfortunately, we've been forced to play on defense because the Liberal Mob keeps crushing us in fundraising...

_But that 's finished. Now we're going on offense! _

_**[I'm teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise to raise an UNPRECEDENTED one million dollars in the next 48 hours. I know, I know - it's ambitious. But bullies only back down with a show of force. If that's what it takes to win, I'll do everything in my power to get there.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a271bc53f6f648aa9247e08c890e2021&_e=irbBwttLeI_7K0MsqNQ7SdF6LYRhbhkx-QLCvs_YWZms7B1NpkQUzvbGs1NmQ7voKfFX8MeVRi2Ovwm7esciMS5Om4eJoaoHWts2NxTnK_NKIw37zjOhz8Ars_Ur-79sB4V0JtRuueQ-Io-svflksfg_dEWEwwfts_WIItOuY4uGnDfxuyGUGcIDukHCu70dFSjYcjmDI__yqjiu8eSSF8YpdZi1thN9MWFv-sQ65582AfoZYUeGYHSJMiL4cqcmrlCViV_cLraTKekO3v8mf2m998LHVE6rairnQm2h2LbUcQw3q32rgk41v-YQ3f2fUFE446Cn67e0ADMfoc5iqH0Yfx6u_-th_h-R4RWl0xw5C67wkYZu7rYmBeJtycs1Kj3Mq7GonFVaVxOfhW-gJEa76A4TdiJuJiPJATLoKe9PkGn6-lH9uk2Qjifj7_wRq1ig2Pk24ZLkucJESnX3FQ%3D%3D "I’m teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise to raise an UNPRECEDENTED one million dollars in the next 48 hours. I know, I know – it’s ambitious. But bullies only back down with a show of force. If that's what it takes to win, I'll do everything in my power to get there.")**_

Will you rise to the occasion and help us defeat the Liberal Mob once and for all?

clean_body: The political hatchet job against Speaker Johnson ENRAGES me to no end. | | | | | Even as a former CIA Director... Even as a former Secretary of State... Even as a former Member of Congress... Washington DC never ceases to amaze me - I can't believe what I'm seeing right now. I 'm sorry but I need to vent for a minute: The SECOND Mike Johnson was named the new House Speaker, the Liberal Mob sprang into action. They IMMEDIATELY initiated a pre-planned, coordinated political hatchet job against him for being: 1) a strong Conservative and 2) a God-fearing Christian. The Liberal Mob eviscerated him in the press. They called him a Cristo-fascist. They said he's too Conservative and too Christian for the top job. They even rushed out hit pieces about his wife. It's a disgrace. Unfortunately, we've been forced to play on defense because the Liberal Mob keeps crushing us in fundraising... But that 's finished. Now we're going on offense! "I’m teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise to raise an UNPRECEDENTED one million dollars in the next 48 hours. I know, I know – it’s ambitious. But bullies only back down with a show of force. If that's what it takes to win, I'll do everything in my power to get there." Will you rise to the occasion and help us defeat the Liberal Mob once and for all? | | | "DO YOUR PART: SEND IN $25" | | | "DO YOUR PART: SEND IN $50" | | | "DO YOUR PART: SEND IN $100" | | | "SEND IN ANOTHER AMOUNT" Listen: As a Conservative - and as a Christian - the political hatchet job against Speaker Johnson ENRAGES me to no end. But just sitting around and stewing over it plays right into their hands. That's why I'm sending you this email. Lord knows I'm stepping in if they're coming for folks like you and me - including Speaker Johnson and Leader Scalise. Are you with me? "We have a steep mountain to climb in the next 48 hours. Frankly, we need your help right now. If you can spare a few bucks, I’m personally asking you to step up and join me in this critical fight." Thank you. God bless you. | Peter,

In 1938, my grandparents left South Dakota, seeking a brighter future. They planted roots just a stone's throw away from what is now the Tacoma Mall.

There, my grandparents became local business owners, farmers, and dedicated members of their community. They, along with my dad, taught me the value of hard work and the importance of putting other people first.

Today, I've stepped up to run for Congress because of those values and because the same opportunities that brought my family to Washington and helped them build a better life are slipping away for too many. [_**Will you join me in my fight to make the American Dream attainable again by contributing $25 today?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73688811/439343007/-1505844277?refcode=BLU_EM_HFFG_2023-11-20_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDA1NzQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTFlNzUyMDYtZDM4Ny1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=OcZbO4hHb6iQAgdFQBnstxGIZSP049FNoAS7DBx_c58=)

name: Team McBride
subject: Trans Day of Remembrance
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73688950/439343339/-1047396217?refcode=EM_FL_MCB_20231120_na_tdor_team_nc_natl_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjI0OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNjJiNTA0Yy1kMzg3LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y4XN8U9hjTjdvbS3fw_TLXWr7t27xuwmArJ9yW2PE2Q=)
---
In 2023, at least 26 trans or gender non-conforming people have had their lives taken. **We must remember those who’ve lost their lives — not just with our words, but with our actions.** By standing up for what’s right and pushing back on anti-trans legislation. By showing up in our communities when trans folks are attacked. By standing up to bigotry and ignorance. **Today — on Trans Day of Remembrance — and every day.** The far-right has tried to use the LGBTQ+ community as a scapegoat for their own policy failures. In 2023 alone, more than 400 anti-LGBTQ+ bills (more than 200 of which specifically targeted trans and non-binary folks) have been introduced in state legislatures. They want to put their bigotry into law — hide their fear and hatred behind policies that erase LGBTQ+ folks and put trans and non-binary communities into direct harm. **[If you’ve got a moment, please take some time to read Human Rights Campaigns’ 2023 report on violence against the trans community today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73688957/439343340/1771793690?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjI0OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNjJiNTA0Yy1kMzg3LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y4XN8U9hjTjdvbS3fw_TLXWr7t27xuwmArJ9yW2PE2Q=&emci=d41f042a-ba87-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=162b504c-d387-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=36397936)** In solidarity,
Team McBride
| | Sarah McBride serves her home state in the Delaware State Senate, where she has passed historic paid leave, gun safety, and nondiscrimination laws. If elected, Sarah will be the first openly trans member of Congress, which means extremists are lining up to attack her. clean_body: | = In 2023, at least 26 trans or gender non-conforming people have had their lives taken. We must remember those who’ve lost their lives — not just with our words, but with our actions. By standing up for what’s right and pushing back on anti-trans legislation. By showing up in our communities when trans folks are attacked. By standing up to bigotry and ignorance. Today — on Trans Day of Remembrance — and every day. The far-right has tried to use the LGBTQ+ community as a scapegoat for their own policy failures. In 2023 alone, more than 400 anti-LGBTQ+ bills (more than 200 of which specifically targeted trans and non-binary folks) have been introduced in state legislatures. They want to put their bigotry into law — hide their fear and hatred behind policies that erase LGBTQ+ folks and put trans and non-binary communities into direct harm. In solidarity, Team McBride | | Sarah McBride serves her home state in the Delaware State Senate, where she has passed historic paid leave, gun safety, and nondiscrimination laws. If elected, Sarah will be the first openly trans member of Congress, which means extremists are lining up to attack her. She needs our help to stand up to their hatred. = | = = = = | Paid for by McBride for Delaware P.O. body:

**_Politico_**** _:_**** ****Why New York could be the next abortion battleground** Team, if you've paid attention to the news lately, you've likely heard that Ohio recently became the seventh state (post-_Dobbs_) where voters rejected the MAGA GOP’s anti-choice agenda and enshrined abortion rights in their state constitution. It’s a _HUGE_ win for reproductive care. In 2024, we have another chance to chalk up a win for abortion rights. Not only is reproductive freedom on the ballot in New York, but we have a chance to flip a battleground seat held by an extreme, anti-choice Republican named Anthony D’Esposito. If we flip this seat, we have a chance to take back the House for Democrats and save abortion rights. **It’s that simple.** Anthony D’Esposito has a long track record of pushing an extreme agenda, including voting for legislation that would imprison doctors who provide abortion care to their patients, and he has even said he would “probably” support a 15-week abortion ban nationally. **In short: D’Esposito has got to go, and together, we can defeat him by supporting Kevin Thomas for Congress.** But here’s the thing. This fight will be far from easy. Kevin needs to know you’re all in to protect reproductive rights, team. So before the end of today, tell us: **Are you ALL in to save reproductive rights in 2024?** | [YES](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73689069/439343786/2029510721?noskip=true&refcode=ea.c9df90ff-d387-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ms=ea.c9df90ff-d387-ee11-8925-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTU5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOWRmOTBmZi1kMzg3LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NRIfhQe8LIuxbRCVhNR2QAcoYQjNzod7NZW_u-Vhaow=) | [NO](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73689070/439343787/2029510721?noskip=true&refcode=ea.c9df90ff-d387-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ms=ea.c9df90ff-d387-ee11-8925-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTU5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOWRmOTBmZi1kMzg3LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NRIfhQe8LIuxbRCVhNR2QAcoYQjNzod7NZW_u-Vhaow=)

body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

INSIDER NEWS FROM THE FRONTLINES OF THE POLITICAL REVOLUTION

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

HEADLINES: Progressives Victories in 2023! | $100 Million vs The Squad |
Peace Candidate Barbara Lee for Senate | Make Amazon Pay Black Friday |
Transforming the Mass Dem Party | & MORE!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/12479?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20231120_NL_RevReportRS_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&amount=10&t=1011&akid=4921%2E5885482%2Eegz1bP ][IMG]

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/12479?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231120_NL_RevReportRS_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&amount=10&t=1012&akid=4921%2E5885482%2Eegz1bP ]Make a statement and support Our Revolution’s critical work to elect
progressive leaders who will fight alongside our movement for economic
justice, social justice, and racial justice. Pitch in $10 today and we’ll
send you these three new stickers as our thanks!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8480?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231120_NL_RevReportRS_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&amount=10&t=1013&akid=4921%2E5885482%2Eegz1bP ][IMG]

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8480?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231120_NL_RevReportRS_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&amount=10&t=1014&akid=4921%2E5885482%2Eegz1bP ][IMG]

BIG NEWS — Barbara Lee triumphed Saturday in the CA Democratic Party
endorsement vote for the U.S. Senate seat in California — beating out
opponents Adam Schiff and Katie Porter!

Our Revolution leaders and activists were with Barbara Lee at the
convention, where she won 42% of the delegates in the endorsement vote for
the U.S. Senate race.

“I am incredibly proud and honored to receive the support of so many
hard-working Democratic Party delegates,” said Congresswoman Lee.

“From day one, this campaign has been focused on delivering the
progressive agenda that working people in California deserve: a Green New
Deal, single-payer healthcare, and economic, racial, social and
environmental justice for all,” she said.

“Our momentum is picking up speed, and tonight’s vote is evidence that our
movement is touching people across the Golden State. The people want a
tried and tested progressive with the record to prove it. I’m ready to
deliver.”

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8480?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231120_NL_RevReportRS_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&amount=10&t=1015&akid=4921%2E5885482%2Eegz1bP ][IMG]

Thanks to our grassroots supporters, Our Revolution had a big showing at
the convention, holding exciting progressive events with Barbara Lee and
helping to organize delegates to back her candidacy!

On Friday, we joined her for the grand opening of her booth at the
Convention Center and hosted our Progressive Party with CA Working
Families Party, then kept it going with a special reception with Barbara
Lee in downtown Sacramento — followed by a big volunteer event on
Saturday!

Our Revolution Executive Director Joseph Geevarghese [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/12497?t=1016&akid=4921%2E5885482%2Eegz1bP ]rallied the crowd
to keep growing the upswell of progressive energy behind Barbara, which we
