clean_body: [ stdin# ][IMG] INSIDER NEWS FROM THE FRONTLINES OF THE POLITICAL REVOLUTION HEADLINES: Progressives Victories in 2023! | $100 Million vs The Squad | Peace Candidate Barbara Lee for Senate | Make Amazon Pay Black Friday | Transforming the Mass Dem Party | & MORE! ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] [ ]Make a statement and support Our Revolution’s critical work to elect progressive leaders who will fight alongside our movement for economic justice, social justice, and racial justice. Pitch in $10 today and we’ll send you these three new stickers as our thanks! ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] BIG NEWS — Barbara Lee triumphed Saturday in the CA Democratic Party endorsement vote for the U.S. Senate seat in California — beating out opponents Adam Schiff and Katie Porter! Our Revolution leaders and activists were with Barbara Lee at the convention, where she won 42% of the delegates in the endorsement vote for the U.S. Senate race. “I am incredibly proud and honored to receive the support of so many hard-working Democratic Party delegates,” said Congresswoman Lee. “From day one, this campaign has been focused on delivering the progressive agenda that working people in California deserve: a Green New Deal, single-payer healthcare, and economic, racial, social and environmental justice for all,” she said. “Our momentum is picking up speed, and tonight’s vote is evidence that our movement is touching people across the Golden State. The people want a tried and tested progressive with the record to prove it. I’m ready to deliver.” [ ][IMG] Thanks to our grassroots supporters, Our Revolution had a big showing at the convention, holding exciting progressive events with Barbara Lee and helping to organize delegates to back her candidacy! On Friday, we joined her for the grand opening of her booth at the Convention Center and hosted our Progressive Party with CA Working Families Party, then kept it going with a special reception with Barbara Lee in downtown Sacramento — followed by a big volunteer event on Saturday! Our Revolution Executive Director Joseph Geevarghese [ ]rallied the crowd to keep growing the upswell of progressive energy behind Barbara, which we see paying off with this major endorsement from the state party delegates! For more about Barbara and to volunteer with Our Revolution’s organizing team, please visit our [ ]Progressives for Barbara Lee website and sign up today! ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] 2023 VICTORIES! Our Revolution endorsed more than 100 candidates for elected office at all levels of government, and over 74% won, thanks to our grassroots supporters and activists! Bernie Sanders started Our Revolution to engage folks in the political process and grow power from the bottom up — and that’s exactly what we’re doing. [ ][IMG] Our candidates ran strong progressive campaigns, and your donations powered millions of direct voter contacts — email, texts, calls, and more — to mobilize voters to elect progressives coast to coast. In his post-election analysis, John Nichols said on [ ]Democracy Now that Tuesday’s results show “a much more progressive country than a lot of the pundits would tell you. In election after election, people voted for abortion rights, labor rights, and progressive values.” “This is a very powerful reminder that there’s a route forward. But it isn’t a route of concession,” Nichols said. “It’s a route of activism and engagement with communities that are rising up and saying they want a different direction, a more progressive direction, for this country.” [ ]Read all about our 2023 victories below - but first! - if you can, please kick in a few bucks to help us staff up and gear up for the big elections ahead in 2024! ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Looking to the battles ahead in 2024, we know we must defeat the far right in the Presidential election while also electing more progressives to Congress — folks like Barbara Lee, who will be a powerful partner for Bernie Sanders in the Senate. Our movement will also need to unify to defend progressive allies who have become a target of powerful lobbying groups hoping to oust them from office. AIPAC is getting ready to spend over $100M to try to replace pro-peace members of Congress like Rashida Tlaib, Ilhan Omar, Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez, Cori Bush, Summer Lee, Jamaal Bowman, and Ayanna Pressley — at a time when 66% of Americans want our government to work toward a ceasefire. Last week, the Republican-led House of Representatives voted to censure Rashida Tlaib - the only Palestinian-American in Congress - for her support for civilians in Gaza and the West Bank, which has earned her relentless slander from her colleagues in Washington and the press. [ ]SIGN NOW to protect our hard-won progressive caucus from cynical dark money and rightwing attacks. The working class can't afford to lose the power of these seats. ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] In September of 2001, Barbara Lee cast the lone “No” vote in Congress against a blank check for war in Afghanistan. She endured death threats, hate mail, and media slander for years. But history vindicated her. Today, Barbara Lee is the only candidate for U.S. Senate in California calling for a ceasefire in Gaza. Check out this [ ]LA Times article on why Barbara is the Peace Candidate in this race compared to her opponents Katie Porter and Adam Schiff. Join us in standing with her, and sign up to volunteer with Our Revolution’s team to help elect Barbara Lee to the Senate. Election Day is March 4th! [ ]VOLUNTEER FOR BARBARA LEE ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] We’rve added Pittsburgh to our list of progressive cities with the election of Sara Innamorato into the powerful seat of Allegheny County Executive. We backed Sara as she beat big money back in May to win the primary and now she forms a progressive trifecta in the city with Mayor Ed Gainey and U.S. Rep Summer Lee, whom she ran alongside successfully for PA House back in 2018 with Our Revolution’s support. As County Exec, Sara will lead the second-largest county in Pennsylvania and have the power to help protect abortion care, push for county-wide housing, and address human rights violations in the county jail. [ ][IMG] Great news out of Virginia, all of our candidates won — holding the State Senate, flipping the State House, and forming a bulwark against Gov. Glenn Youngkin to maintain Virginia as a bastion for reproductive rights in the South. Winners include Nadarius Clark, Rozia Henson, Adele McClure, and Joshua Cole for Virginia State House; and Jennifer Carrol Foy, Stella Pekarsky, and Lashrecse Aird for State Senate. We didn’t overlook any progressive candidates in Virginia, including Steve Descano who won Fairfax County Commonwealth Attorney, and Parisa Dehghani-Tafti who won Arlington County Commonwealth Attorney. ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Abortion wins in Ohio! Organizers fought hard to get out the vote and shut down the rightwing playbook — passing Ohio Issue 1 to enshrine abortion rights in the state Constitution. After the Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade, a small but loud group of deep-pocketed extremists took to the states, determined to gut abortion laws. But the resistance has been successful. Marijuana legalization also passed in Ohio, showing that Democrats need young folks and progressives to hit the ground and drive voter turnout. Looking ahead to 2024, we’re already kicking off organizing around Fair Maps to fend off Republican gerrymandering schemes in the Buckeye State. [ ][IMG] Our Revolution candidates are taking over city councils in Ohio! Congrats to OR members Trevor Elkins, who won Newburgh Heights Mayor, and Kim Mann, the newest member of Fairview Park City Council! Jan-Michele Lemon Kearney also won a seat on the Cincinnati City Council. And, there was an exciting victory for our entire slate in Hilliard, Ohio, where progressives have now taken control of the City Council, including Cynthia Vermillion, Emily Cole, and Greg Betts! ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] “Progressives took control of the Minneapolis City Council” - [ ]Star Tribune All 9 Our Revolution Twin Cities candidates won, taking over the City Council in Minneapolis: Jeremiah Ellison, Elliot Payne, Jason Chavez, Aisha Chughtai, Katie Cashman, Soren Stevenson, and Robin Wonsley. In St. Paul, progressives snagged City Council victories with Mitra Jalali, Nelsi Yang, Anika Bowie, Saura Jost, and Cheniqua Johnson. [ ][IMG] We’re also growing progressive power in Duluth, MN, where Our Revolution candidate Wendy Durrwachter won a tight race for City Council. If we win one more seat, Democrats will have control of the council. Wendy is a single mother, restaurant worker, and accomplished composer — and she will bring a necessary working class perspective to the council: "When something needs to be done, I step up and do it. I’m not afraid to call out those who abuse their power." ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Victories in the Seattle area! As corporations broaden their dark money fundraising networks into city council and school board races, we need working-class champions ready to confront them head-on. That’s why we were proud to endorse this winning slate of progressive candidates in Washington state! Our slate winners include Charles Adkins for Everett School Board, Tammy Morales for Seattle City Council, and Teresa Mosqueda and Jorge Baron King for King County Council. ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Our Revolution stood with Izola Shaw in her run for Rockville City Council At-Large and we are proud of her victory. Our organizers made more than 15,000 voter contacts in her district and turned out the progressive vote for this great candidate! OR Member Izola Shaw was chair of the Montgomery County Racial Equity and Social Justice Advisory Committee, helped found the County’s Racial Equity Network (MORE), and helped pass the Racial Equity and Social Justice Act. She has worked with the County Executive on public works, policing, rent stabilization, and environmental protection through the Rockville City Academy. ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Our entire slate of candidates won in New York City, making the council even more progressive to advance our priorities in the Big Apple! These winners include Carlina Rivera, Althea Stevens, Amanda Farias, Tiffany Caban, Lincoln Restler, Jennifer Gutierrez, Crystal Hudson, Chi Osse, Sandy Nurse, Alexa Aviles, Shahana Hanif, and Rita Joseph. [ ][IMG] And, the whole Our Revolution-endorsed Ithaca Solidarity Slate was victorious — Jorge DeFendini and Phoebe Brown won re-election to the Ithaca Common Council, and Kayla Matos won her race to join them on the council. This is exciting news out of Ithaca, where these progressive council members can make a real difference in the everyday lives of working-class folks in the community. [ ][IMG] In Onondaga County, Maurice Brown won a seat in the legislature with a pledge to confront vital community issues like the lead crisis, high housing costs, and unreliable public transportation. These are the races that determine the direction of cities and help us build progressive power at the level of government closest to people’s lives. ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Our Revolution member Jared Evans was re-elected to the Indianapolis City Council with 53% of the vote in a district that Trump Republicans won in 2022 and which city media predicted would go Republican again. We’re getting many Republicans to vote Democrat for the first time because progressive policies offer real material improvements to people’s lives and because of the direct voter mobilization operation that our grassroots donors make possible. Jared has been a strong progressive ally in Indianapolis, fighting for higher wages, good jobs, and more for the blue-collar neighborhoods he serves in District 17 — and we are proud to have his back! ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Our Revolution endorsed Sheila Jackson Lee for Houston Mayor, and on November 8th she got enough votes to make it to the runoff against John Whitmire — a Democratic defector who sides with radical Republicans on voter suppression and racist policing policies. U.S. Rep. Jackson Lee is a long-time member of the Congressional Progressive Caucus, and she’s a fighter for Medicare for All, the Raise the Wage Act, and the George Floyd Justice in Policing Act. As the next Mayor, she’s committed to promoting policies to expand healthcare, create good jobs, increase affordable housing, promote safe and reliable public transportation, and protect the city from climate disasters. She’s also been endorsed by SEIU Texas, the Communications Workers of America, and other key Our Revolution allies. ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Congrats to the Our Revolution Medford slate! OR members and progressives won big for the Medford City Council in Massachusetts: Anna Callahan, Zach Bears, Kit Collins, Justin Tseng, Emily Lazzaro, and Matt Leming. Also, for the Cambridge School Board, winners include Richard Harding, Jose Luis Rojas Villarreal, David Weinstein, and Rachel Weinstein. ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] The above wins from last Tuesday come on top of major victories earlier this year as Our Revolution has been blazing a path for progressive cities. In April, we helped elect progressive Mayor Brandon Johnson to take the helm in Chicago - where he already delivered on a promise to raise wages for tipped workers in the city. Our Revolution teamed up with One Fair Wage this year to make sure everyone gets a living wage and tipped workers aren’t left behind. ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] And, our organizers were key to winning a progressive majority in St. Louis with new Board President Megan Green joining progressive mayor Tishaura Jones in Cori Bush’s congressional district. They’re taking on developers in a fight for affordable housing, and they’ve already passed a universal basic income pilot program! ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] This Thanksgiving, we are grateful for the solidarity of all our movement allies here and around the world. This Black Friday, workers from around the world will stand shoulder to shoulder in a global day of action to Make Amazon Pay — pay its workers, pay its taxes, and pay for its climate damage. Keep an eye out for strikes and protests in over [ ]30 countries for dignity on the job and a sustainable future for all! ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Our Revolution partner U.S. Rep. Ro Khanna has introduced the State-Based Universal Health Care Act! This is a bill that would allow states to develop their single-payer healthcare plans! This is instrumental in the pathway toward a federal Medicare For All program. State by state, we are fighting for universal healthcare, but we’re also partnering with Ro Khanna and Bernie Sanders in a push to end medical debt, stop hospital price-gouging, and lower drug prices. ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Our Revolution Massachusetts organizers just won the state Democratic Party’s support for Medicare for All, union organizing rights for state house staff, and an audit of the state legislature! Meanwhile, resolutions calling for a majority-elected Party leadership, more transparent governance, and incentives to get “dark money” out of primaries were defeated — but with major declines in party membership, the fight for a more democratic, grassroots-oriented party continues. “We are thrilled that four resolutions were adopted by the state committee,” said Michael Gilbreath, a Wayland Democrat and leader of Our Revolution MetroWest. “However, we have to keep fighting for a more active, democratic, and transparent Democratic Party.” ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Corporate donors are planning to spend more than ever against our progressive candidates next year because they know the working class is taking back power. Donate now to grow our election fund so we can beat back oligarchy with democracy. [ ]PITCH IN NOW FOR 2024! ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Cost of food and housing continue to skyrocket, and wealth inequality continues to explode thanks to billionaires and corporations rigging our political system. We need more voices speaking up and fighting back — on the streets and in the halls of power. That’s why we’re organizing the progressive movement and electing progressive leaders coast to coast who will actually get to work for the American people instead of serving Big Pharma, Wall Street, defense contractors, and other special interests. [ ]Make a statement and help support Our Revolution’s critical work by pitching in $10 here to get these three new stickers for the price of one! ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] You can help elect Barbara Lee to the Senate from anywhere in the country — making calls, sharing on social media, and more. If you're in California, you can help by knocking on doors or reaching out to friends - even hosting or attending a house party! [ ]We invite you to join Our Revolution’s Progressives for Barbara Lee's organizing team. Let's make this a people-powered campaign and send Barbara Lee to the Senate. ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] From boots on the ground to the halls of Congress — we are building an organized progressive movement at every level of government. If you’re already a member of Our Revolution, THANK YOU! If you’re not yet an [ ]official member, please consider signing up for a recurring monthly donation today! [ ]PLEASE SUPPORT OUR REVOLUTION ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] [ ]WHEN WE ORGANIZE, WE WIN! ★ ★ ★ [ ]Facebook | [ ]Twitter | [ ]Instagram | [ ]Youtube | [ ]Website | [ ]Sign Up [ ]Our membership swag Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive group in America. [ ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the establishment by committing to a recurring donation of just $5 or more a month! name: Secretary Mike Pompeo
subject: I need to vent
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
The political hatchet job against Speaker Johnson ENRAGES me to no end.

| |

---
| | | Even as a former CIA Director...

Even as a former Secretary of State...

Even as a former Member of Congress...

Washington DC never ceases to amaze me - I can't believe what I'm seeing right now. _I 'm sorry but __I need to vent for a minute:_

**The SECOND Mike Johnson was named the new House Speaker, the Liberal Mob sprang into action. They IMMEDIATELY initiated a pre-planned, coordinated political hatchet job against him for being: 1) a strong Conservative and 2) a God-fearing Christian.**

The Liberal Mob eviscerated him in the press. They called him a Cristo-fascist. They said he's too Conservative and too Christian for the top job. They even rushed out hit pieces about his wife.

It's a disgrace. Unfortunately, we've been forced to play on defense because the Liberal Mob keeps crushing us in fundraising...

_But that 's finished. Now we're going on offense! _

_**[I'm teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise to raise an UNPRECEDENTED one million dollars in the next 48 hours. I know, I know - it's ambitious. But bullies only back down with a show of force. If that's what it takes to win, I'll do everything in my power to get there.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=f85fc1da2d69483f80728d5f0548d119&_e=1tP36_CdZZD8e9JssFixRqyoKJCl3cGt1nAeVDC1IsS-MoDEW5ad2bXABef-QAgJzw2midNVImtjV_wu8HiA_kUuRuIvr2Cp5QlX5Yx1yq_EqYLeEl6PQE16On-NZOv6wg7pBWiqzu0lvWI9CQSqcA_2ufexJ_BkBTecL1IDDx_8MGAlJxeJF299i1HHr-s9hIwdajanwmrnKreRQ2oPB9_vcw4Wj09YRBQXfVl3oCJTiLsIZSWrWZqQr-0gjyKH9iI3fP2tfSr93q8RzeKuJEpFEV-NMnOnFdYPFjiiPZ8yCxzQ1Ig6fL5J4f8Amk2WoLkq6ovCaeJg1fPBlcE1Fy9I5gb-aid8GQQSgGtt2Zxyf5TqogxGMeRYw0-9fmZhBvGoJDeox_fYEgBhL1GZYXCaPO9X42_eHXBiWNnj7lW3RE_xPKQ4eoQcgScR9sn3h8wrutF25Q-AfHpkAddcHQ%3D%3D "I’m teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise to raise an UNPRECEDENTED one million dollars in the next 48 hours. I know, I know – it’s ambitious. But bullies only back down with a show of force. If that's what it takes to win, I'll do everything in my power to get there.")**_

Will you rise to the occasion and help us defeat the Liberal Mob once and for all?

Listen:

As a Conservative - and as a Christian - the political hatchet job against Speaker Johnson ENRAGES me to no end.

**But just sitting around and stewing over it plays right into their hands. **

That's why I'm sending you this email.

Lord knows I'm stepping in if they're coming for folks like you and me - including Speaker Johnson and Leader Scalise. Are you with me?

_**[We have a steep mountain to climb in the next 48 hours. Frankly, we need your help right now. If you can spare a few bucks, I'm personally asking you to step up and join me in this critical fight.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=f85fc1da2d69483f80728d5f0548d119&_e=1tP36_CdZZD8e9JssFixRqyoKJCl3cGt1nAeVDC1IsS-MoDEW5ad2bXABef-QAgJzw2midNVImtjV_wu8HiA_kUuRuIvr2Cp5QlX5Yx1yq_EqYLeEl6PQE16On-NZOv6wg7pBWiqzu0lvWI9CQSqcA_2ufexJ_BkBTecL1IDDx_8MGAlJxeJF299i1HHr-s9hIwdajanwmrnKreRQ2oPB9_vcw4Wj09YRBQXfVl3oCJTiLsIZSWrWZqQr-0gjyKH9iI3fP2tfSr93q8RzeKuJEpFEV-NMnOnFdYPFjiiPZ8yCxzQ1Ig6fL5J4f8Amk2WVcMg6-CFOX6XFZ8UUeEdQM0WNmmenhTJZWzfLzaN9-N2VmzGGvGavYYAgTpajGleWfd-wqdaEbBVhwkbuLZWA2EjVwcbPgFEsfVCG5ECBvSU5fNAtdU7qPm5hUU7eaeUVtfnBb9GcoEUWUDU9u-S9A%3D%3D "We have a steep mountain to climb in the next 48 hours. Frankly, we need your help right now. If you can spare a few bucks, I’m personally asking you to step up and join me in this critical fight.")**_

Thank you. God bless you.

I 'm sorry but I need to vent for a minute: The SECOND Mike Johnson was named the new House Speaker, the Liberal Mob sprang into action. name: Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions

| This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6c5a966f0f1f4fde91f458c6d4a0e18b&_e=cBUiHLBN0pVK5vyl69i7qWU7NmZqctNFsI_7gp1rJE8GnmzfXZ3g-atb_lbuA0Y8dnAyobCEbU0Wtht2y9H2v8z9amYubI6L_iRyvfnLroDbxP49hw-TkxeTiuqL6Z3nFeWKfqdBW9tzrmtiQLNLK51qMCviMYEIHWEk0cw9x-hw6pFrJ4oxdb4Lq_txQqiOuc47kvr0LyMV49drkotygQnk0fIZyUl6b2-qCHlEMOtBUAqQfY_r1UjYKi33_Ptj8ys404heSTRTVUzQsTVqk2FCC8W71-nZ5lx9CnFLSE4lvi1_qXiGYVEFN3cp0hgQ2jOt7bjezfo18M1j-YhvXquCckLQqOW4UPwRKj13QgQ0M9lfbXfgInUr4vjE9RfO3_cA6cxId2Muo6GZN4LLo1eR2xNcPPF63cFDGFNhqI0LZHVHNix1-ICm_vShLl5O)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6c5a966f0f1f4fde91f458c6d4a0e18b&_e=cBUiHLBN0pVK5vyl69i7qWU7NmZqctNFsI_7gp1rJE8GnmzfXZ3g-atb_lbuA0Y8dnAyobCEbU0Wtht2y9H2v8z9amYubI6L_iRyvfnLroDbxP49hw-TkxeTiuqL6Z3nFeWKfqdBW9tzrmtiQLNLK51qMCviMYEIHWEk0cw9x-hw6pFrJ4oxdb4Lq_txQqiOuc47kvr0LyMV49drkotygQnk0fIZyUl6b2-qCHlEMOtBUAqQfY_r1UjYKi33_Ptj8ys404heSTRTVUzQsTVqk-TizHduDyeKZ04fA4capAyOJ40Gj-OHN9w5X1o4jQcks6umqbVxqDDY0FeCHp68-aN65HuHNUbt69ao9364M2no8x0EI1_SUWFbzrV9GLvveKzcpbyO6hzE14JfpejLVUs-br1x3XMVOC-hci-DKjn722UcUFB47_YyiMeQAK1V)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6c5a966f0f1f4fde91f458c6d4a0e18b&_e=cBUiHLBN0pVK5vyl69i7qWU7NmZqctNFsI_7gp1rJE8GnmzfXZ3g-atb_lbuA0Y8dnAyobCEbU0Wtht2y9H2v8z9amYubI6L_iRyvfnLroDbxP49hw-TkxeTiuqL6Z3nFeWKfqdBW9tzrmtiQLNLK51qMCviMYEIHWEk0cw9x-hw6pFrJ4oxdb4Lq_txQqiOuc47kvr0LyMV49drkotygQnk0fIZyUl6b2-qCHlEMOtBUAqQfY_r1UjYKi33_Ptj8ys404heSTRTVUzQsTVqk-BEuCJvUmUTFKSHVXNC5s7k5_xacA_LKUsK3vOA9sRhJCojq7S3tK_9wzrMgfREToDyazo4_2oABwDc3yRvC1BcC6DgTF9fRWj9b2JB4Zw8sEtEnFFUmbXS3fP6xv9on7pKvx33xBof1_Mxgh4TdtZj86WEYwkGWUlXQqJrc2BT)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6c5a966f0f1f4fde91f458c6d4a0e18b&_e=cBUiHLBN0pVK5vyl69i7qWU7NmZqctNFsI_7gp1rJE8GnmzfXZ3g-atb_lbuA0Y8dnAyobCEbU0Wtht2y9H2v8z9amYubI6L_iRyvfnLroDbxP49hw-TkxeTiuqL6Z3nFeWKfqdBW9tzrmtiQLNLK51qMCviMYEIHWEk0cw9x-hw6pFrJ4oxdb4Lq_txQqiOuc47kvr0LyMV49drkotygQnk0fIZyUl6b2-qCHlEMOtBUAqQfY_r1UjYKi33_Ptj8ys404heSTRTVUzQsTVqk9hv_fAXPItWJnYe4adhrVEu-2cMQuM5Qu7PoIHdSIucQw5OKzRrfkqdEThvqIGfEY4afd4BdZKTDUR82Ufv_37CwIg_ilupE516iBhJd-ID0X7a1zaeOtBB6mL1EcxeLOfTVrGt6-KOlGLYN5VkW20JSIduy1gGTdyO3jFB1Pj2).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

name: Andrew Wynne, FCA
subject: WATCH: Elon Musk breaks down Soros’ strategy to “erode the fabric of civilization”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Courts America |
body:
This clip is a must-watch for all conservatives. | | | [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=1063cf6a21a144b2ae3a521412c7bbc8&_e=46X6M2xOi4TeamOqtposHfMbbvEfK_E-5JnveDUaH0UfpaAic3JFH1jkREeYjlqXcpB4Xn_DcMO2VxPDXpCOWBNtvY1NVwB-hzeDBbyNVwW1DkDwQpvUYjEdE4H8GxeUFFn6Iu85XHvST8ezMe3xh_2pbDDmy8vBVx1CvwyjiSAiumsAqY_2AhlSbhbCy9uXnt7WHquVCIF920uRUhMf4ANIppMN7cqsE8D9nN1mFtAPdQbIxd_aUnxCH4KZJVuso2arYWdBsjymwmyo74oytcAOONlzfo024vV3WiS0VVw70VNkvQJv2GVBqmehoLsVeRGd9WEveEnT1ZWXlxsGNfVlcYunt6-S_B6S3d9ff7duay9iNxdg6qUXqd9ONljj)
---
Peter, Why does George Soros prefer to invest in local races?

**Elon Musk just blew his strategy wide-open on Joe Rogan’s podcast: It’s because it’s such a _great_ deal.**

---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=1063cf6a21a144b2ae3a521412c7bbc8&_e=46X6M2xOi4TeamOqtposHfMbbvEfK_E-5JnveDUaH0UfpaAic3JFH1jkREeYjlqXcpB4Xn_DcMO2VxPDXpCOWBNtvY1NVwB-hzeDBbyNVwW1DkDwQpvUYjEdE4H8GxeUFFn6Iu85XHvST8ezMe3xh_2pbDDmy8vBVx1CvwyjiSAiumsAqY_2AhlSbhbCy9uXnt7WHquVCIF920uRUhMf4ANIppMN7cqsE8D9nN1mFtCn4Pc951u53br6CPunq63L1fFXJjh1ZRPYs2vmWy2vxTj3TNWzao8cVGXX8aOB8V-2Xvn1HdlWFtcAj_JMG8tvWveoHNgeywFMj4v9Pwewhla438odsHNT6Yn0NKWnbU15nlA8cadFF3lDDX1WQBBA)
---
**_[WATCH THE FULL CLIP NOW>>](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=1063cf6a21a144b2ae3a521412c7bbc8&_e=46X6M2xOi4TeamOqtposHfMbbvEfK_E-5JnveDUaH0UfpaAic3JFH1jkREeYjlqXcpB4Xn_DcMO2VxPDXpCOWBNtvY1NVwB-hzeDBbyNVwW1DkDwQpvUYjEdE4H8GxeUFFn6Iu85XHvST8ezMe3xh_2pbDDmy8vBVx1CvwyjiSAiumsAqY_2AhlSbhbCy9uXnt7WHquVCIF920uRUhMf4ANIppMN7cqsE8D9nN1mFtBPZLx6pO5Xo9SlSi5y4DEMdvnuzqoBK_x9EGFuCtayEwvkJfsk7Xv4vawCR4bqk8U8Qp9nQDSdnxIRMxwdfY2cOe9JlkOx4k7VKv0vEtpaVhS1_mFkWoP0uYRy4xjSgQoO1TNvMev0voiWufoMeu1Y)_** His analysis is so compelling that we’re sending you the whole transcript:

_“The lowest value for money is a presidential race. Then the next lowest value for money is a Senate race, then a Congress. But once you get to sort of city and state district attorneys, the value [is] extremely good.... _

_Soros realized that you don’t actually need to change the laws; you just need to change how they’re enforced.” _

He’s right: And we see the terrible fruit of his investment in cities all over America—**a massive crime wave with no end in sight.**

But Peter, George Soros isn’t the only one who has figured this tactic out.

**We’re _[Fair Courts America](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=1063cf6a21a144b2ae3a521412c7bbc8&_e=46X6M2xOi4TeamOqtposHfMbbvEfK_E-5JnveDUaH0UfpaAic3JFH1jkREeYjlqXcpB4Xn_DcMO2VxPDXpCOWBNtvY1NVwB-hzeDBbyNVwW1DkDwQpvUYjEdE4H8GxeUFFn6Iu85XHvST8ezMe3xh_2pbDDmy8vBVx1CvwyjiSAiumsAqY_2AhlSbhbCy9uXnt7WHquVCIF920uRUhMf4ANIppMN7cqsE8D9nN1mFtDjDoijvebMyrKg60c0BA1CmguY9GTXVOljUA0SUsC9AT8G7yo0Y17KB1Vn0C63nToiMBAGdlepwkAxxp-9KOw_Dy04mWyKgv0sjHNF_T_2idbU3uR_hF9kLVgTY3SJlkBoCn9P12_1LS7pLvwtjq-O)_. We are the ONLY organization taking a direct stand against Soros prosecutors. It’s clear after this last election: the momentum is on our side.**

But tracking these prosecutorial races across the country is a massive undertaking — which is why there has not yet been a concerted effort to fight back against the network of dark money influence... _until now_.

**We’re taking Soros on, head-to-head, but we can't do it without the support of patriots like you.**

So we’re asking you to take Elon Musk’s advice: [make your dollar go further towards saving America by donating to elect law and order prosecutors in local races](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=1063cf6a21a144b2ae3a521412c7bbc8&_e=46X6M2xOi4TeamOqtposHfMbbvEfK_E-5JnveDUaH0UfpaAic3JFH1jkREeYjlqXcpB4Xn_DcMO2VxPDXpCOWBNtvY1NVwB-hzeDBbyNVwW1DkDwQpvUYjEdE4H8GxeUFFn6Iu85XHvST8ezMe3xh_2pbDDmy8vBVx1CvwyjiSAiumsAqY_2AhlSbhbCy9uXnt7WHquVCIF920uRUhMf4ANIppMN7cqsE8D9nN1mFtCfNOz-YybXaM6pqBq4Ak0ZaElPBHRgh7MjUJa-WJldwY8wlvIEK_Fx_D2nCFqUzPw5FTTa8NwmUYPxryDHuu4h80I7MLghU85Tj2zNx1MUNAcvI8-ZFxWgh5s3wvh4TK73eDjGxTBep5jv1bNT1cOm). Peter - when I became Speaker of the House on October 26th, I knew one of the first things we needed to do was build out our team of supporters online.

So, we got to work immediately and [**set a goal of finding 100,000 conservatives to join Team Johnson by the time Thanksgiving rolled around.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=1f9b6b6e83fc4099a7cd5cd772b1caf7&_e=EckhUNHzWREaA8U7zG20LA7spxHR13KRNbLcW86TSp7R2KgXKbqbNVra3e-yTxi6KRpYKhZkV_hq_OnHZKBvjuUzKX9okUHMwqsshXq3F_4GZSPbT-KTa-pWYFZTSXG8xObuY1smwAofdxCm88TUk4GKDINy5GpzKPYGGlC7XsXRKZLjHpLhe8Z36ghAvCWjRvE4nQENf-qYdTvSpVGYGB5HdUNG1O9Po7xWGHb-UjZGat_eafPGqYc2M9iUDulWnrfMpHTceIL5DsgA1yEU2LwR_1_GGl3xIrtiqQeFz68eWmy5TNPfNZ9rve2wFbHTf5dX_7bBXR-FaSKvDjvv1ZnZHk8oZf11QhNOS-8d4SbUI7smoKylt8mrUgITTMKMQgsh6ITUkDmtGPmKF6B3ow%3D%3D)

To date, we have not hit our goal. With Thanksgiving just two days away, we have a lot of work to do.

If you've already signaled your support for our team as we work to hold onto our thin majority heading into next year's election, _thank you._ If you haven't, [**please consider being one of the thousands of signatures I need to find before the Macy's Thanksgiving Day Parade begins on Thanksgiving morning.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=1f9b6b6e83fc4099a7cd5cd772b1caf7&_e=EckhUNHzWREaA8U7zG20LA7spxHR13KRNbLcW86TSp7R2KgXKbqbNVra3e-yTxi6KRpYKhZkV_hq_OnHZKBvjuUzKX9okUHMwqsshXq3F_4GZSPbT-KTa-pWYFZTSXG8xObuY1smwAofdxCm88TUk4GKDINy5GpzKPYGGlC7XsXRKZLjHpLhe8Z36ghAvCWjRvE4nQENf-qYdTvSpVGYGB5HdUNG1O9Po7xWGHb-UjZGat_eafPGqYc2M9iUDulWQfgyxOf-PjdVBuGxDhOFx-5HwjMb1zWkA_2_R0b6BgzGmah6uwfls0yc0oi85qUdcLtwziP8UIK_D3Cq80p_cvFNRfLm1qfxou5yKCH7VPn9n63NCtXuKPOnsZ83dqnojkhDJRrRYM__ZkFuIwlXew%3D%3D)

Peter, Democrats have spent the last three years under President Biden trying to turn our great nation into a banana republic.

While voters don't seem to have much of an appetite for Joe Biden, Democrats in the House and Senate have done everything they can to prop up his failing presidency while undoing all the critical work President Trump and Congressional Republicans moved forward in recent years.

We're doing our best to continue providing conservative solutions to our nation's most vexing concerns. _Still, I must be honest - doing so would be infinitely easier if we had a more significant majority._ [**We only have a slim cushion right now, meaning there is ZERO room for error.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=1f9b6b6e83fc4099a7cd5cd772b1caf7&_e=EckhUNHzWREaA8U7zG20LA7spxHR13KRNbLcW86TSp7R2KgXKbqbNVra3e-yTxi6KRpYKhZkV_hq_OnHZKBvjuUzKX9okUHMwqsshXq3F_4GZSPbT-KTa-pWYFZTSXG8xObuY1smwAofdxCm88TUk4GKDINy5GpzKPYGGlC7XsXRKZLjHpLhe8Z36ghAvCWjRvE4nQENf-qYdTvSpVGYGB5HdUNG1O9Po7xWGHb-UjZGat_eafPGqYc2M9iUDulWXeiECr2GeH_kSC_QNLssjc_3rG5I8goKhB_9SHUS4fn3j_uWdVdHBec9D6SzY1UH0lGKFMix3hdiLbO1QWvdRpRtWq5jiswLU4UTEo21UD9p1hF6dzaGqpd9l5x_5fxAZTvKI7GmTyU8x_2vpGIZbg%3D%3D)

Our immediate goals for next year are two-fold:

1. Hold onto the House majority
2. Expand our House majority

While voters don't seem to have much of an appetite for Joe Biden, Democrats in the House and Senate have done everything they can to prop up his failing presidency while undoing all the critical work President Trump and Congressional Republicans moved forward in recent years. We're doing our best to continue providing conservative solutions to our nation's most vexing concerns. Still, I must be honest - doing so would be infinitely easier if we had a more significant majority. Our immediate goals for next year are two-fold: 1. Hold onto the House majority 2. _**"The problem is that Democrats' 2024 Senate challenges go far beyond West Virginia. They face such a starkly unfavorable map that, if things even go somewhat poorly for the party, they could fall into a deep Senate hole for years to come."**_
Peter,

With Joe Manchin out, the Senate runs directly through Montana. And this means that we have our work cut out for ourselves. **[Let me give you a couple of reasons why Joe Manchin's retirement announcement elevates our race to the top spot:](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=ad01747e5641443e8882ed4f14a83a46&_e=tQtEnjac1yXSIh_do62_NG3B_7LiCfmpGf5UTDZdkv0vOegyzV_6qBU-5gq-mxLJ_vLJ_-_r4YnrOZiLlQ2ay9M_LijaHePYNf_dYGJH-HF5ToCJQJF6jR1ZTYEYsKTnIdCr0G-zIyH3e7W7gLATPbgXz1d_BIVmP7FnB2nbGnQkyZhOUt7nnUC5kt5q1Hu7kOl5PnSsE8_Uo8hsbGr0QnWXNNWYWGCD-DRPZx-tpaYfYZKndC5HdOdJyPQfz8JAnkLVcBFqnd8rQcTreXjrzFeyTHD-6fShHBgnoVlQv0rpjH3PxOZXPhyrnm6Q_U3KXdXh9p6CXaw4AjPEl2pNvlEWtj690jEbCJweKbe7qCbD_oBPLCZS-kzy7DV_2OrQGzaN66wMjE9H88AQ9kg7-g%3D%3D)**
* Chuck Schumer no longer has to decide where to put his resources–they're coming to Montana. With Joe Manchin out of the race, Schumer will all but write off West Virginia, ceding the seat to Republicans. Manchin's retirement will likely free up between $25-$50 million in defense funds for the Democrats. **[[link to donate]](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=ad01747e5641443e8882ed4f14a83a46&_e=tQtEnjac1yXSIh_do62_NG3B_7LiCfmpGf5UTDZdkv0vOegyzV_6qBU-5gq-mxLJ_vLJ_-_r4YnrOZiLlQ2ay9M_LijaHePYNf_dYGJH-HF5ToCJQJF6jR1ZTYEYsKTnIdCr0G-zIyH3e7W7gLATPbgXz1d_BIVmP7FnB2nbGnQkyZhOUt7nnUC5kt5q1Hu7kOl5PnSsE8_Uo8hsbGr0QnWXNNWYWGCD-DRPZx-tpaYfYZKndC5HdOdJyPQfz8JA26gGl7pxE7BpAB_pDO4NzYNIAL5gk1e-KhbdUuend0GxroC-OBZ3KnHz5OMkXbQrgwEON2_XACcrTm9N0vQep_4OAw1snsHOMbrmWGLKti8-ognFTfpDQXxJo8zwkSc6pXMuXwFaXd6rqQh1VhLmLA%3D%3D)**

* Schumer won't have to persuade wealthy coastal donors into donating to a Manchin reelection effort. Instead of choosing between protecting Manchin or Tester - or contributing to both candidates - they'll be donating the maximum amount only to Tester. Coastal donors have helped Tester shatter Montana fundraising records each quarter, accumulating $15 million in donations since January 1st. I need help catching up because, to be frank, we haven't brought in a fraction of this from our online community. [**[link to donate]**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=ad01747e5641443e8882ed4f14a83a46&_e=tQtEnjac1yXSIh_do62_NG3B_7LiCfmpGf5UTDZdkv0vOegyzV_6qBU-5gq-mxLJ_vLJ_-_r4YnrOZiLlQ2ay9M_LijaHePYNf_dYGJH-HF5ToCJQJF6jR1ZTYEYsKTnIdCr0G-zIyH3e7W7gLATPbgXz1d_BIVmP7FnB2nbGnQkyZhOUt7nnUC5kt5q1Hu7kOl5PnSsE8_Uo8hsbGr0QnWXNNWYWGCD-DRPZx-tpaYfYZKndC5HdOdJyPQfz8JAlh6yzO3uM_pjfRbT7K4kDSY0suS2Jjl9jjkULiu-VtmShaQe5Zi_pvG70rin7LpsNAriN1c5Y3P8BrhYbcFregvKzwCZYt7z9n5ARjYJvmYIh7EZ7bu1Px-92pu_8X-z-3puzumBH_4xYgi5hMQdpg%3D%3D)

* The other Democrat incumbents up for reelection this year are from states Biden won in 2020. That doesn't necessarily mean Republicans don't have a shot to win these races, but the incumbents aren't as likely to need as much money to win as my opponent will.

All of these things, taken together, mean that Jon Tester is about to become the recipient of some MAJOR cash. And while that alone doesn't guarantee he'll find a way to extend his nearly quarter-century political career, he might be able to buy (_**read lie**_) his way to reelection if he raises $200,000,000+.

clean_body: We have everything going for us except one thing: money. | | "The problem is that Democrats' 2024 Senate challenges go far beyond West Virginia. They face such a starkly unfavorable map that, if things even go somewhat poorly for the party, they could fall into a deep Senate hole for years to come." Peter, With Joe Manchin out, the Senate runs directly through Montana. And this means that we have our work cut out for ourselves. Chuck Schumer no longer has to decide where to put his resources–they're coming to Montana. With Joe Manchin out of the race, Schumer will all but write off West Virginia, ceding the seat to Republicans. Manchin's retirement will likely free up between $25-$50 million in defense funds for the Democrats. [[link to donate]]() Schumer won't have to persuade wealthy coastal donors into donating to a Manchin reelection effort. Instead of choosing between protecting Manchin or Tester - or contributing to both candidates - they'll be donating the maximum amount only to Tester. Coastal donors have helped Tester shatter Montana fundraising records each quarter, accumulating $15 million in donations since January 1st. I need help catching up because, to be frank, we haven't brought in a fraction of this from our online community. [[link to donate]]() The other Democrat incumbents up for reelection this year are from states Biden won in 2020. That doesn't necessarily mean Republicans don't have a shot to win these races, but the incumbents aren't as likely to need as much money to win as my opponent will. All of these things, taken together, mean that Jon Tester is about to become the recipient of some MAJOR cash. And while that alone doesn't guarantee he'll find a way to extend his nearly quarter-century political career, he might be able to buy (read lie) his way to reelection if he raises $200,000,000+. subject: NEW MICH POLL: Trump Beats Biden 46-41%
body:
The Detroit Free Press reports new polling that shows Donald Trump beating Joe Biden in Michigan | | | [](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=655bacf648bb08554f648197&u=https%3A%2F%2Ftombarrettforcongress.com%2F%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D655b8d95552bbc25a7f24da8%26ss_email_id%3D655bacf648bb08554f648197%26ss_campaign_name%3DNEW%2BMICH%2BPOLL%253A%2BTrump%2BBeats%2BBiden%2B46-41%2525%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2023-11-20T19%253A03%253A31Z&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&c=b_655b8d95552bbc25a7f24da8&l=en-US&s=Bw5C5Olhz7b07G7rMt6Zv5Bw_Yg%3D)
---
| Peter Willis - Brand new [polling from EPIC-MRA](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=655bacf648bb08554f648197&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.freep.com%2Fstory%2Fnews%2Fpolitics%2Felections%2F2023%2F11%2F18%2Felection-2024-biden-trump-poll-michigan%2F71619518007%2F&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&c=b_655b8d95552bbc25a7f24da8&l=en-US&s=7bXlkpvaNQiqB9hXOtbt_8FfqmY%3D) shows former President Donald Trump beating Joe Biden 46-41% in Michigan, the same margin that the left wing New York Times [showed in their polling](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=655bacf648bb08554f648197&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.nytimes.com%2F2023%2F11%2F05%2Fus%2Fpolitics%2Fbiden-trump-2024-poll.html&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&c=b_655b8d95552bbc25a7f24da8&l=en-US&s=5uu_FAwE_pdXqnNiYa_Nm5eDPOE%3D) two weeks ago.
---
What’s more, the polling showed President Trump beating Biden in nearly every demographic group - **even young people and union members!**
* Trump beats Biden 48-35% among ages 18-34
* Trump beats Biden 46-39% among ages 35-49
* Trump beats Biden 47-40% among union members

**Independent voters - who will decide this election - favor Donald Trump by a jaw-dropping 45-18%.**
---
[_ _ Elect Tom Barrett _ _](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=655bacf648bb08554f648197&u=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Ftom-barrett-for-congress%2Fnew-poll&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&c=b_655b8d95552bbc25a7f24da8&l=en-US&s=exrsE-D18ySlAmCBBEuYJL1QbiE%3D)
---
These new polls show that Michigan voters do not like the direction of our country and want to stop the Biden Agenda.Only 37% of Michiganders have a favorable opinion of Joe Biden with 56% unfavorable. **A whopping 69% disapprove of his job performance and only 30% approve.** That’s why I’m running, and that’s why I need your help.My opponent is Gretchen Whitmer’s hand-picked candidate, and while I spent 22-years in the U.S. Army, he spent 22-years in elected office. And when he was forced out because of term limits, _**he became Gretchen Whitmer’s top lobbyist.**_ Now, he’s running against me for Congress in the top open seat race in the country.
---
[_ _ Support Tom Barrett _ _](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=655bacf648bb08554f648197&u=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Ftom-barrett-for-congress%2Fnew-poll&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&c=b_655b8d95552bbc25a7f24da8&l=en-US&s=exrsE-D18ySlAmCBBEuYJL1QbiE%3D)
---
Michigan Republicans will win in 2024 but that requires every one of us to do what we can and that’s why I hope you will help me flip Michigan’s 7th District and protect our House Majority.[Please make a $25 donation today and help us reach our goal!](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=655bacf648bb08554f648197&u=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Ftom-barrett-for-congress%2Fnew-poll&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&c=b_655b8d95552bbc25a7f24da8&l=en-US&s=exrsE-D18ySlAmCBBEuYJL1QbiE%3D)

Populist Javier Milei Wins Argentina Presidential Election

http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zjrjf88b024d8onfto4vco2lenkaee3embptbb4g_rp22sh2s8i6eo30clh62o72cph238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kui3bd9ieir38cti69qbacpkmerj79hnmmrq0ttgelor9djhemhb8crkmkp7b9dkm6qj9dd7eiprctd469rjactheipr8dd0e9qjct5h6kpr2t5k66qqacdl6oon9dtjmuh2bs

http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zunc17edoq927do9rna0hu8nd9tn219r8mvfmtt0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t46mqj4t5m6gpr4cjkmkpj9ctn6ej3fddnk1rr0tbhmir72td2mgpn9d9iemir9cdl6iqqet5jmpqq8cjn6kpr2t5jmgqq0sjl6pqb2d9jm5qb8cdlkkoradhheirr7dt246h22sh2s8i6eo30clh62o72cph2bs

Libertarian candidate Javier Milei secured victory in the Argentinian
presidential election on Sunday, defeating left-leaning economy
minister Sergio Massa, according to The Associated Press. Sergio
Massa, Argentina’s Economy Minister, conceded defeat to populist
Javier Milei in the highly polarized presidential runoff even before
official results were released by the electoral authority, according
to the AP.

name: Team AOC
subject: AIPAC wants Alexandria out
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
AIPAC just announced that they are going to spend $100 million to get rid of Alexandria and the Squad
#
It’s official: the American Israel Public Affairs Committee — one of the wealthiest and most powerful PACs in the country — is recruiting Democratic primary challengers to defeat Alexandria and six other members of the Squad next year.
**AIPAC is gearing up to spend at least $100 million to unseat the Squad.** They don’t like that we support a bilateral ceasefire in Gaza, even though that’s an opinion shared by a large majority of Americans.
They’ve already found challengers for Representatives Bush, Bowman, Lee, and Omar. Now they’re looking for one for us.
[We need to be ready to fight back. Will you please help us make sure Alexandria has the resources she needs with a $5 contribution?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20231120.LHFYzY&refcode=em20231120-5346-P_FND_EGR_HDL&t=1&akid=5346%2E2526796%2EIr2gyX)
**[Contribute](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20231120.LHFYzY&refcode=em20231120-5346-P_FND_EGR_HDL&t=2&akid=5346%2E2526796%2EIr2gyX)**
To AIPAC, it apparently doesn’t matter that criticism of the Israeli government’s indiscriminate bombardment of Palestinians is virtually non-existent among U.S. politicians. As far as they’re concerned, the only acceptable level of dissent is zero.
AIPAC spent $30 million in last year’s Democratic primaries, much of it targeted on defeating progressive candidates, and especially candidates of color. While their attack ads rarely mention the conflict in the Middle East, AIPAC disproportionately messages against champions of progressive policies — **all while providing unconditional support to the 109 Republicans who refused to certify the 2020 presidential election.**
[Will you contribute $5 right now to help us defeat AIPAC? AIPAC is going after Alexandria in 2024 and we need to be prepared.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20231120.LHFYzY&refcode=em20231120-5346-P_FND_EGR_HDL&t=3&akid=5346%2E2526796%2EIr2gyX)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20231120.LHFYzY&refcode=em20231120-5346-P_FND_EGR_HDL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=5346%2E2526796%2EIr2gyX)**
Thank you so much for your support and for everything you do to work for social, racial, economic, and environmental justice.
In solidarity,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20231120?refcode=em20231120-5346-P_FND_EGR_HDL&t=23&refcode2=5346_2526796_Ir2gyX&akid=5346%2E2526796%2EIr2gyX)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20231120-5346-P_FND_EGR_HDL&t=24&akid=5346%2E2526796%2EIr2gyX)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=25&akid=5346%2E2526796%2EIr2gyX) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=26&akid=5346%2E2526796%2EIr2gyX) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=27&akid=5346%2E2526796%2EIr2gyX)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=29&akid=5346%2E2526796%2EIr2gyX)

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

name: Mark Mullet
subject: addressing our housing crisis
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elect Mark Mullet
body:
| | My wife Kelley and I are worried.

We’re worried about how hard it is these days just to make ends meet here in Washington, and we’re particularly worried that our kids simply won’t be able to afford to raise their own families in our state.

Tackling the affordability crisis needs to be our next Governor’s first priority, and we know that addressing the issue of affordable housing is the first step.

[If you agree that we need a Governor who will prioritize housing availability, will you click here and sign our petition?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73691480/439351555/126258312?source=MM_EM_PT_90DO_231120_1_1&refcode2=e0165bc0-d887-ee11-8925-00224832e811&contactdata=PTQ47Td1OLhYHTqUL8udRMrggh5OEgTMXVLcYQ59IOJl6Vq4aF7tEPAX+bdE4aLV&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MzAxMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMDE2NWJjMC1kODg3LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pN8O2j-yZ3Fk_3rpDGqwOFRRXYdbz-sP3Pjj74y_h6Q=&emci=502e9113-9c85-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=e0165bc0-d887-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=45626167) | | **[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73691481/439351556/126258312?source=MM_EM_PT_90DO_231120_1_1&refcode2=e0165bc0-d887-ee11-8925-00224832e811&contactdata=PTQ47Td1OLhYHTqUL8udRMrggh5OEgTMXVLcYQ59IOJl6Vq4aF7tEPAX+bdE4aLV&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MzAxMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMDE2NWJjMC1kODg3LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pN8O2j-yZ3Fk_3rpDGqwOFRRXYdbz-sP3Pjj74y_h6Q=&emci=502e9113-9c85-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=e0165bc0-d887-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=45626167)**
---
As the chair of the State Construction budget in the Senate, I was proud to make the largest investment our state has ever seen in the Housing Trust Fund, which is a major step forward.

But unless we make it easier to build new housing by cutting red tape and dealing with the enormous permitting delays builders currently face, we’ll never make progress in lowering the cost of housing.

Our next Governor can help cities and counties clear the current backlogs of permit requests, and I’m committed to making it happen.

[I need to know that you’re with me. Sign on today if you agree that affordable housing is a major crisis that needs to be addressed.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73691482/439351557/126258312?source=MM_EM_PT_90DO_231120_1_1&refcode2=e0165bc0-d887-ee11-8925-00224832e811&contactdata=PTQ47Td1OLhYHTqUL8udRMrggh5OEgTMXVLcYQ59IOJl6Vq4aF7tEPAX+bdE4aLV&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MzAxMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMDE2NWJjMC1kODg3LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pN8O2j-yZ3Fk_3rpDGqwOFRRXYdbz-sP3Pjj74y_h6Q=&emci=502e9113-9c85-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=e0165bc0-d887-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=45626167)

I’ve had a front row seat to the challenges we’re facing on this issue, and I know we need to face the housing crisis head-on if we’re going to make any progress.

Thanks for standing with me,

– Mark

|

clean_body: | | My wife Kelley and I are worried. We’re worried about how hard it is these days just to make ends meet here in Washington, and we’re particularly worried that our kids simply won’t be able to afford to raise their own families in our state. Tackling the affordability crisis needs to be our next Governor’s first priority, and we know that addressing the issue of affordable housing is the first step. | | As the chair of the State Construction budget in the Senate, I was proud to make the largest investment our state has ever seen in the Housing Trust Fund, which is a major step forward. But unless we make it easier to build new housing by cutting red tape and dealing with the enormous permitting delays builders currently face, we’ll never make progress in lowering the cost of housing. Our next Governor can help cities and counties clear the current backlogs of permit requests, and I’m committed to making it happen. I’ve had a front row seat to the challenges we’re facing on this issue, and I know we need to face the housing crisis head-on if we’re going to make any progress. Thanks for standing with me, – Mark | Mark Mullet is running for Governor to make Washington safe, affordable and prosperous. | | ---|---|--- | = ** Paid for by Elect Mark Mullet Mullet for Governor (D) PO Box 2072 Issaquah, WA 98027 United States

Hey Peter, When I was a kid, my mom would roll out pastie dough, and we’d chop onions, carrots, rutabaga, potatoes, and beef, and we’d make 30 or 40 pasties at a time (some for dinner and some for the freezer). And then, Mom would make gravy for us kids while my dad hoarded the ketchup bottle. As an adult — I go 50/50 (half gravy/half ketchup). Childhood memories with gravy — ketchup for the refined palate. Regardless, the age old debate looms: does your family eat their pasties with ketchup or gravy? | [Team Ketchup](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73691704/439352275/-686895923?refcode=EM_FL_BAR_20231120_fr_gravyvsketchup_cand_kw_90da_xx_sbt&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGUzYzkxNGMtZDk4Ny1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=LrKXOtt7bhIro2tBK_d8h04cdew0M1m8aJrLlZ3jqeg=)

clean_body: When I was a kid, my mom would roll out pastie dough, and we’d chop onions, carrots, rutabaga, potatoes and beef, and we’d make 30 or 40 pasties at a time (some for dinner and some for the freezer). | = Hey Peter, When I was a kid, my mom would roll out pastie dough, and we’d chop onions, carrots, rutabaga, potatoes, and beef, and we’d make 30 or 40 pasties at a time (some for dinner and some for the freezer). And then, Mom would make gravy for us kids while my dad hoarded the ketchup bottle. As an adult — I go 50/50 (half gravy/half ketchup). Childhood memories with gravy — ketchup for the refined palate. Regardless, the age old debate looms: does your family eat their pasties with ketchup or gravy? | = = (I recognize that there might be a sadist out there that eats them plain - maybe consider how much better your pastie would be with either.) = Let us know what team you’re on by donating to our campaign, and we’ll let you know the winner at the end of the month. name: Restore Our Nation
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions
188d92cdddd40f90da47bc74ea2ba8fb
188d92cdddd40f90da47bc74ea2ba8fb
| This sponsored message from Restore Our Nation is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/joQqZnhufRCfnGvEFBwcuA~~/AARclAA~~~)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/joQqZnhufRCfnGvEFBwcuA~~/AARclAA~~~)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/joQqZnhufRCfnGvEFBwcuA~~/AARclAA~~~)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/joQqZnhufRCfnGvEFBwcuA~~/AARclAA~~~).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

Restore Our Nation
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

name: Ashely Ehasz
subject: Fight like hell for the living
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ehasz for Congress
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73691790/439352579/-826917173?refcode=EM_FL_EHA_20231120_na_transremembranceday_cand_mf_30da_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxM2EzMmM3Mi1kOTg3LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zsFM66d2yOMlbFXfjJOWekIepQvlMX8hQBY9ZV2_0zM=)
---
Today is Trans Day of Remembrance – when we memorialize those who've been murdered this year by transphobia. The Human Rights Campaign reports that at least 25 beautiful souls were taken this year by violence and hate. For much of 2023, I've been feeling overwhelmed and deeply concerned by the intolerance and bigotry I saw:
* Lawmakers in nearly every state introduced 586 anti-LGBTQ+ bills.
* Our schools and libraries became battlegrounds where Moms for Liberty pushed their hate and fear. (I spoke out at Central Bucks.)
* Brian Fitzpatrick and his fellow Republicans picked Mike Johnson, who has worked for an anti-LGBTQ+ hate group, as their Speaker.

But my sense of hope has been renewed by what we saw across the country and right here in Pennsylvania just two weeks ago. People inside and outside of Pennsylvania, full of intolerance and bigotry, spent a lot of money betting voters would side with them. But Pennsylvanians showed we aren't buying their ugly message. That those who peddle hate are the ones who stand alone, not me or you, co-pilots. I also know those victories will not be the end of this fight. Brian Fitzpatrick, Mike Johnson, and the rest of their party are going to bet big on hate, intolerance, and bigotry again next year. Those aren't the values I fought for in the Army, and it's why I got into this race – to protect the people of PA-01 no matter their gender, who they love, their race or creed or income or age. **Today, we remember and grieve for those we've lost. clean_body: | = Today is Trans Day of Remembrance – when we memorialize those who've been murdered this year by transphobia. The Human Rights Campaign reports that at least 25 beautiful souls were taken this year by violence and hate. For much of 2023, I've been feeling overwhelmed and deeply concerned by the intolerance and bigotry I saw: Lawmakers in nearly every state introduced 586 anti-LGBTQ+ bills. Our schools and libraries became battlegrounds where Moms for Liberty pushed their hate and fear. (I spoke out at Central Bucks.) Brian Fitzpatrick and his fellow Republicans picked Mike Johnson, who has worked for an anti-LGBTQ+ hate group, as their Speaker. But my sense of hope has been renewed by what we saw across the country and right here in Pennsylvania just two weeks ago. People inside and outside of Pennsylvania, full of intolerance and bigotry, spent a lot of money betting voters would side with them. But Pennsylvanians showed we aren't buying their ugly message. That those who peddle hate are the ones who stand alone, not me or you, co-pilots. I also know those victories will not be the end of this fight. Brian Fitzpatrick, Mike Johnson, and the rest of their party are going to bet big on hate, intolerance, and bigotry again next year. Those aren't the values I fought for in the Army, and it's why I got into this race – to protect the people of PA-01 no matter their gender, who they love, their race or creed or income or age. Today, we remember and grieve for those we've lost. And we commit to fight like hell for the living.** Thanks for being in this fight with me, = Ashley 🚁 | Ashley Ehasz is a U.S. Army veteran, Apache helicopter pilot, and proudly pro-choice Democrat running to unseat Republican Brian Fitzpatrick and represent Pennsylvania’s 1st Congressional District to defend our democracy, restore reproductive rights, tackle corporate greed, advocate for bold gun safety measures, and fight for working families across southeast PA. | = | Paid for by Ehasz for Congress Ehasz for Congress 1800 Byberry Road #1336 Bensalem, PA 19020 United States Ashley Ehasz is a former member of the U.S. Army. Peter,

As Speaker of the House, I work _**FOR**_ the people.

When I ran for this position, I made a promise to release the footage from January 6th, so Americans could see for themselves what happened that day, _rather than the opinions of the partisan January 6 Committee._ **And I am delivering on that promise.**

body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions

| This sponsored message from Full Mag News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0a53fd19ae304ec7be35d63ac01f57e9&_e=qujhKvVEm4Z9d613j9wy23pS0jvc20kW_3_fZ6_YRIKGz30QMwlgh4ByvDiGsC_2btSWycQ7SXDg0zYQ52AjUhUdiCDOMhCmy0p3NQf-jVFMlPJXHsFrah--tx65uplwQPlmAxcTADLeyLmgNQx0xb36cK6brHW2lDzWnwgIdeRV9nijb6Ek8U87EHc_G7m-y-PYf3b0NMRKWItyRmdzHuyVRqhjYIjlip_jU-HSY-KlGvEwo5DNQSTfA7Xam6H6yz6ExZvLkf_mi2FrqfZIdALTrS84EDAdmQNNgMG_j8mz4Qhb4bZ-kS2w_s8pMX3kMfZdC4pbZRAWYT3V1gGSXYwPtwR8UyQE8v-41AXuACrMS_kl0_v_e5wTprZxv83Sw_Md6QkBhcfT8jSwGFLRnOXKL99mRGAl31J_QXcjvuxy1YbQTgluMk33fVb8ycIX)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0a53fd19ae304ec7be35d63ac01f57e9&_e=qujhKvVEm4Z9d613j9wy23pS0jvc20kW_3_fZ6_YRIKGz30QMwlgh4ByvDiGsC_2btSWycQ7SXDg0zYQ52AjUhUdiCDOMhCmy0p3NQf-jVFMlPJXHsFrah--tx65uplwQPlmAxcTADLeyLmgNQx0xb36cK6brHW2lDzWnwgIdeRV9nijb6Ek8U87EHc_G7m-y-PYf3b0NMRKWItyRmdzHuyVRqhjYIjlip_jU-HSY-KlGvEwo5DNQSTfA7Xam6H6yz6ExZvLkf_mi2FrqfZIdERwQwyMtEwC84fZXLhpd_WVOdZBMj6n3CXM2ItAyoBY3uGjAGDKX0u6eHYIJsYKN0m9Qpsi_53XWWUYMr1pQy8JHz0ojQFC5CeV9y5V0I5IYDRbyDBc5h5dNzhIealX5rAPz7wjJ3c7johCZWJorVWOt1M5_WbMg0Il-A4WtNQe)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0a53fd19ae304ec7be35d63ac01f57e9&_e=qujhKvVEm4Z9d613j9wy23pS0jvc20kW_3_fZ6_YRIKGz30QMwlgh4ByvDiGsC_2btSWycQ7SXDg0zYQ52AjUhUdiCDOMhCmy0p3NQf-jVFMlPJXHsFrah--tx65uplwQPlmAxcTADLeyLmgNQx0xb36cK6brHW2lDzWnwgIdeRV9nijb6Ek8U87EHc_G7m-y-PYf3b0NMRKWItyRmdzHuyVRqhjYIjlip_jU-HSY-KlGvEwo5DNQSTfA7Xam6H6yz6ExZvLkf_mi2FrqfZIdKgrFNnZ9ng8kXrU-UbpQoYT8EyrnPP7N6T8QgK0p3SfAiHhDVxNMyTU6ixnxVWUef-g1jQFbQ67zWAusGNor73D9hoK8p9aBbrUqLNoWpffSoJW6up1QJGURJ_2CqCnMl2go_ZI1xyUb-8RGsdfXLgOzhUex4oWjjtWaghXUy0X)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0a53fd19ae304ec7be35d63ac01f57e9&_e=qujhKvVEm4Z9d613j9wy23pS0jvc20kW_3_fZ6_YRIKGz30QMwlgh4ByvDiGsC_2btSWycQ7SXDg0zYQ52AjUhUdiCDOMhCmy0p3NQf-jVFMlPJXHsFrah--tx65uplwQPlmAxcTADLeyLmgNQx0xb36cK6brHW2lDzWnwgIdeRV9nijb6Ek8U87EHc_G7m-y-PYf3b0NMRKWItyRmdzHuyVRqhjYIjlip_jU-HSY-KlGvEwo5DNQSTfA7Xam6H6yz6ExZvLkf_mi2FrqfZIdK9ur5ryC9b9k3m3Bct5O0OCvJ___rC2M1emLjDQUy4emxsCaxlBvMfquY6N8Kd1RJA6Cu4Oxc14_tNPSt9q8KeqbZ7Uzc8NBRWYFOEQZFLJ2AIlAortWScHKOUymO2ChD3GfmxIJhBm47Bb1koNItVjgYcdCO1K14a36gRMrSQd).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: Viral video about Tesla driving 752 miles on a single charge
body:
A prototype Tesla is sending shockwaves through the auto industry

| Viral video about Tesla driving 752 miles on a single charge A prototype Tesla is sending shockwaves through the auto industry: It drove 752 miles... across the ENTIRE state of Michigan... On a single battery charge! [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=70aa8e32dc0e46bea204cd031f939098&_e=5LSO82gZbwm8hjV4VOEbzXSDGpT54VsgS3ypvepZIltZ6O9Af2jKPmA5IF45cTvpLJgEFU6GeiMaFAtrwLpODRRPhVXCeSQLhdGdF6PcIlXEjOr4pr1RRQAJkAerTOcrbQr5YrGUI2TvWzOoVMvw-gCNnpcAYRGUkPaZW4MWDd4jqSJNiyLk6sHozNLuDYqpIOtUm3yYARI_uVT4yB6J4MbkgnY5_Ly7VG8_gu4gnspABGQDBgkvvhpdbY7F3PbR9JJFURSwpGfPyITXgFG_C4NaCcB4A-GANmOLcgfza9U%3D) The secret? A new type of battery I call "Forever Lithium." Musk was so blown away... That, within a month, he announced his entire fleet would be switching to this battery. And that "Forever Lithium" will "emerge as the dominant chemistry for Tesla." You don't need to own an EV now or plan to buy one to profit from this switch. Because a few miles south of this experiment... An [obscure Indiana firm](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=70aa8e32dc0e46bea204cd031f939098&_e=5LSO82gZbwm8hjV4VOEbzXSDGpT54VsgS3ypvepZIltZ6O9Af2jKPmA5IF45cTvpLJgEFU6GeiMaFAtrwLpODRRPhVXCeSQLhdGdF6PcIlXEjOr4pr1RRQAJkAerTOcrbQr5YrGUI2TvWzOoVMvw-rAyvmysCC7fzy0tk30FvANoE8ycUd-7L-m0e4YMZ9ie8neMkz6q8RsLdWA-_YdBoWaHZAZf0e98sDF_Y7V9tKDd7yu8CIR9OvDmZW79VSBilxm958MDReU5zezGmiJN4EKZZWtUCs6j6ddSSWX1KYk%3D) is now positioned to mint more millionaires than the rise of Tesla. They've inked a deal to produce "Forever Lithium" inside a new $3 billion battery facility. And investors who take a stake now could be richly rewarded. [**Click here for the full video report.**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=70aa8e32dc0e46bea204cd031f939098&_e=5LSO82gZbwm8hjV4VOEbzXSDGpT54VsgS3ypvepZIltZ6O9Af2jKPmA5IF45cTvpLJgEFU6GeiMaFAtrwLpODRRPhVXCeSQLhdGdF6PcIlXEjOr4pr1RRQAJkAerTOcrbQr5YrGUI2TvWzOoVMvw-qv02MlREYUHlwAc58Sn3JggZSsg2OoSydXwNbHHrWsm0leB23XLKPD7TOWxbo1ANVoZK4s3n6QjP1et3fSBfC1OyTEyk7s53fDadHk6Thv4CPHRQ2cPgIYFlECXem-tqn0NJD6XcRHkIgi7Xmp_wfc%3D)

name: Jon Tester & Sherrod Brown
subject: Not your typical politicians:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | Hi Folks—

Jon Tester and Sherrod Brown here. We’re reaching out today because we’re in the middle of the two most competitive Senate campaigns, and we need your help to win.

We’re not the typical politicians you’d expect to see every day in the Senate. One of us is a seven-fingered dirt farmer. The other has been called disheveled, wrinkled, and rumpled. Neither of us are winning any best dressed awards anytime soon.

But the thing that _really_ sets us apart? We’ll work with anyone to get the job done for our constituents. And we’ll always stand up to the special interests in Washington to help folks back home.

But we’re facing the toughest reelection fight of our careers. Election experts are calling us the most vulnerable Democratic senators, and Mitch McConnell and his cronies are planning to unleash hundreds of millions of dollars to try and defeat us.

We’ve got a lot of work to do between now and Election Day. **So we’re launching a massive goal of raising _$500,000_ in the next 48 hours** to build up our resources and fight back against the millions that’ll be thrown our way.

**[Ready to roll up your sleeves and get to work defending the Senate? Split a contribution between our campaigns and the DSCC today. Your support will help us meet our goal, build our resources, and keep fighting for the hardworking people of Montana and Ohio in the Senate.](https://go.dscc.org/go/16567?amount=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=20231120-JonTesterSherrodBrown-TesterBrownMoneyBomb-Pros-sl1&refcode=20231120-JonTesterSherrodBrown-TesterBrownMoneyBomb-Pros-sl1&akid=12692%2E9716520%2EQjZq9e)**

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately and be split between Jon Tester, Sherrod Brown, and the DSCC.

name: Defend Cori Bush (via Working Families Party)
subject: Right-wing forces target Squad member Cori Bush
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St
body:
| | | Peter, On October 16th, Rep. Cori Bush introduced a resolution calling for a ceasefire in Israel and Gaza, humanitarian aid, and the safe return of hostages, to save as many lives as possible. Two weeks later, a primary challenger announced he would try and defeat her.1 Since then, reports have emerged that AIPAC is set to spend over **$100 MILLION** to take out progressive members of Congress — and that Cori will be one of the first in their sights.2 **We’re proud to stand with Cori Bush everyday, and to officially endorse her today for re-election in 2024.** With an announced primary challenger, now is a critical moment in this campaign — and it’s up to all of us to show Cori we have her back. **[Can you contribute $10 or any amount to make sure Cori has the resources she needs to get out the vote and beat back a right-wing-funded primary challenge? Two weeks later, a primary challenger announced he would try and defeat her.1 Since then, reports have emerged that AIPAC is set to spend over $100 MILLION to take out progressive members of Congress — and that Cori will be one of the first in their sights.2 We’re proud to stand with Cori Bush everyday, and to officially endorse her today for re-election in 2024. With an announced primary challenger, now is a critical moment in this campaign — and it’s up to all of us to show Cori we have her back. In her first term, Cori Bush has championed legislation that puts the working families of St. Louis and the entire country front and center. A relentless advocate for racial, social, health care, and environmental justice, Cori has led the movement to guarantee housing for all — leading a national movement on the steps of the U.S. House of Representatives calling on the CDC to extend the eviction moratorium, as well as introducing legislation to permanently implement an eviction moratorium throughout the pandemic. And along with other WFP champions in Congress, Cori was one of the first leaders to courageously stand up and call for a ceasefire in Israel and Palestine in order to save lives. Losing Cori’s voice to a Republican-funded primary challenge would be a loss for everyone who cares about democracy and justice. Her voice, along with the voices of other WFP champions in Congress, represent the views of communities that are too-rarely heard in the halls of power in D.C. That’s exactly why the Republican megadonors who fund AIPAC are so laser focused on spending millions in Democratic primaries next year to try and take them out. | | Patriot,

---
Technically, our VIP contest for my year-end reception ended last night...
---
_..._ __But when I look at our movement’s millions and millions of incredible supporters, how could I only pick just one VIP?__

---
**So, I’ve decided to host BACK-TO-BACK receptions next month to continue the celebration of our absolute DOMINATION of Crooked Joe**** _(we’re already leading by double digits!)_**

---
And just like the first, I’ll fly one lucky winner (plus a guest of your choice) out to Florida for __FREE__ for this December 6 reception.
---
I’ll cover your hotel, you’ll get to enjoy hors d'oeuvres and refreshments on me, and we’ll even take a photo together so that you can remember this special night forever!

---
**[So please, make a contribution of any amount to MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN – and you’ll be automatically entered to WIN a VIP trip to meet yours truly at my end-of-year reception in Hallandale Beach, Florida.](https://link.donaldjtrump.com/u/click?_t=c26d591425684a3289b90149d613a03c&_m=8a0d2eaa4b6142dfbe840794c3fcc3b3&_e=2O9OUoh5P9Zqoum_Iv33hqpkAbT5l5mb2keobcOA0JtF-LW7UQZjZL0ehi7Ez4nTiqQJPCieAu_Nj4-ruv7_0doi1Un64uYsWrOWFmDDCpWJ87q617tIaUCRblRlysxDcj1ukklggn8KOXn0gFGGXWszWrf40RNBME1qGQ9HeLHnR4Z4182iTDU2lHDr7pcoGu-VXCvW0qq9qZqmD6gETWH_Bh9M91vDWFplD0ITWbPiFCvlHcjd4kNv3aPm-UfHKHQNhdyRan0IpY-032F_7ayY46OLoQjjJDuoLcvpvF22nDstp7Rzs0hobQFRJy8qTaCBXeMl2EmoR7us5modCynK9SGYfAm0MUMKsJaPqx6ziAmtPVDBTpSqUdXzDkHjRJpdaA2G7JY0jSPg32iKeR-CJfR0s-5Hx2yCL9Ye436JXZZZKTm-O2eOcZp2-xb-hZpx6cTa7AQoBcH2KWKmqq2pHs4RFB4l7bVL1q6k4nlG6a2WTO069A9ZTgSwSoaq)**

By sending a text message from your mobile phone, you are providing your written consent to receive calls and SMS/MMS messages, including autodialed and automated calls and texts, to that number from the Save America JFC. Text message and data rates may apply. Consent is not required as a condition of entry. Text STOP to 88022 to opt out. Entries must be received between November 20, 2023, at 12:00 a.m. Eastern Time, and ends on November 27, 2023, at 11:59 p.m. Eastern Time. Odds of winning depend on the number of eligible entries received. One (1) “Prize Winner” will receive a trip for two to a December 6, 2023 reception in Hallandale Beach, Florida consisting of the following: (i) round-trip coach class airfare for the Prize Winner and one (1) guest to the event destination from the major U.S. airport nearest Prize Winner’s residence within the 48 contiguous United States; (ii) two (2) tickets to the event featuring President Donald J. Trump; (iii) two (2) day one (1) night first class hotel accommodations (1 room, double occupancy); (iv) one (1) photograph of the Prize Winner and guest with President Trump; approximate retail value (“ARV”) of the Prize: $24,000. The Promotion is open only to U.S. citizens or lawful permanent U.S. residents who are legal residents (green card holders) of the 50 United States, Puerto Rico, and the District of Columbia and are at least 18 years of age (or the age of majority under applicable law). Winners must be 18 or older (or of majority under applicable law) and meet other requirements as described in the Official Rules. It’s because of the commitment and support from real Patriots, like YOU, that we will SAVE AMERICA! Thank you again for your generous support.
