name: =?utf-8?Q?David=20Canepa=20for=20County=20Supervisor?=
subject: Peter, let's do this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by David Canepa for Supervisor 2024, FPPC# 1399463
body:
I need you with me | |
---
| | [ ](https://davidcanepa.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=46c1d4af8f9db208806c0d78a&id=048f8df6d0&e=0961f0e7e8)
---
| | Peter,

This is an exciting time for our San Mateo County communities. 2024 elections are rapidly approaching, and folks are already throwing their hat into the ring for elections up and down the ballot.
**Peter, I'm proud to announce I'm running for re-election as San Mateo County Supervisor, and I need your support.**
[This campaign is about building on the significant progress we've made here in San Mateo County. But we're only as strong as the grassroots supporters standing with us. Can you join us in the work of bringing our campaign to even more people by donating today?](https://davidcanepa.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=46c1d4af8f9db208806c0d78a&id=4130485566&e=0961f0e7e8)
---
| [JOIN TEAM CANEPA](https://davidcanepa.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=46c1d4af8f9db208806c0d78a&id=12743f4af6&e=0961f0e7e8 "JOIN TEAM CANEPA")
---
| [ ](https://davidcanepa.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=46c1d4af8f9db208806c0d78a&id=8873701921&e=0961f0e7e8)
---
| In this early stage of this campaign, your support can make a massive difference.

When we secured this seat in 2016, we ran a promise of bringing our community's voice to the table on the issues that matter. I'm proud to say we've followed through on that commitment, and have forged a people-focused coalition focusing on real solutions for our friends and neighbors.

_**I couldn't have done this without so many people like you.**_

I'm a proud fourth-generation San Mateo County resident, and I live in Daly City with my son. I started my career of service serving on the Daly City Council and eventually as mayor.

I've been trusted by my peers to represent our communities on several boards such as the Metropolitan Transportation Commission and the San Mateo Health Commission to address both local and statewide issues. But we're not stopping there. Here's what we're prioritizing as we enter into this race to continue our leadership as Supervisor:

1️⃣ Preparing for climate change by making investments to combat wildfires, flooding and sea level rise

2️⃣ Improving health care, including greater access to mental health services and interventions

3️⃣Housing homeless individuals and families and providing intensive wraparound services such as job training

[Peter, providing San Mateo communities with the needed resources to continue our progress is my top priority. But we're going to need your grassroots support to fund the outreach needed to bring our communities into these important discussions. Can you help fund our early efforts to reach voters by donating today?](https://davidcanepa.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=46c1d4af8f9db208806c0d78a&id=b6e7e5076e&e=0961f0e7e8)
---
| [DONATE NOW](https://davidcanepa.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=46c1d4af8f9db208806c0d78a&id=837da42e94&e=0961f0e7e8 "DONATE NOW")
---
| In friendship,
David Canepa
---
| | | | David Canepa is running for re-election to the San Mateo County Board of Supervisors to continue providing county residents with the resources and tools necessary to create a community that is healthy, environmentally conscious, equitable and economically prosperous.

As a fourth generation son of San Mateo County and graduate of Skyline College, David cares deeply about the residents of San Mateo County, as he has lived and worked in this community his entire life.

[](https://davidcanepa.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=46c1d4af8f9db208806c0d78a&id=7b14e97b48&e=0961f0e7e8)

David is a proud fourth-generation San Mateo County and lives in Daly City with his family.

His extensive experience in public service includes serving two terms on the San Mateo County Board of Supervisors and as mayor and councilmember on the Daly City Council.

David serves on several regional boards and commissions tasked with improving traffic congestion and its impacts on the environment including the Metropolitan Transportation Commission, SamTrans and Commute.org.

He also serves on the San Mateo Medical Center and Health Plan of San Mateo boards with a mission to improve health outcomes for all county residents.

**Prefer to donate via mail? Address a check to**

**Re-elect David Canepa for San Mateo County Supervisor 2024
20 Park Road
Suite E
Burlingame, CA 94010**

---
| [SUPPORT DAVID](https://davidcanepa.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=46c1d4af8f9db208806c0d78a&id=196fa9eead&e=0961f0e7e8 "SUPPORT DAVID")
---
| | Paid for by David Canepa for Supervisor 2024, FPPC# 1399463.
---
| _Copyright © 2023 Re-elect David Canepa, All rights reserved._
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Re-elect David Canepa20 Park RoadSuite EBurlingame, CA 94010
[Add us to your address book](https://davidcanepa.us13.list-manage.com/vcard?u=46c1d4af8f9db208806c0d78a&id=9e3193fceb)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://davidcanepa.us13.list-manage.com/profile?u=46c1d4af8f9db208806c0d78a&id=9e3193fceb&e=0961f0e7e8&c=2b7cd983af) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://davidcanepa.us13.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=46c1d4af8f9db208806c0d78a&id=9e3193fceb&e=0961f0e7e8&c=2b7cd983af).

name: Juanita at United We Dream Action
subject: NO new funding for ICE and CBP
body:
We have to keep up pressure on Congress to defund hate: | | | Peter, last week Congress averted a government shutdown by passing a bipartisan short-term spending bill — **that contained NO new funding for ICE or CBP!** United We Dream Action has been organizing with allied organizations all year to prevent any additional funds from flowing into the Department of Homeland Security’s detention and deportation machines — and that pressure is seeing results. _But this fight isn’t over._ Supplemental funding plans are in the works, and immigration policy and billions in funding for ICE and CBP are still being negotiated by the House and Senate. The government should be investing in real immigration solutions, not the militarization of our border or the stripping away of human rights. That’s why UWDA is focusing our efforts on demanding Congress DEFUND these hateful and dangerous organizations in the supplemental funding package. **Will you chip in any amount today to help us mount pressure on Congress before a final deal is reached and billions of more dollars are spent on the deportation machine?** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [express donate: $10](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953y62hYNn9HaFt_zHKvI4OP8Mwn-pOwLbmCYBrz_zAPar4sSMhpIo1tykzexjDojGI46dvulz1C36Lo6Z6GNwol0-pB8M_mCtxAcX_tBw_OASxlhdiny3al5UZvyo0KHsSnD8Kt0sL9fgJ88dUMtwQcVfUZiTPIgh0Ta9AlYoSR3Tb2RSMrw2nriuyE4hfCWhH7RD9Mi3bWCtG_aNPDBqtNBfzNJNlHEb2P-n2kK7IxYTf0ijJyGqqoK0H3GAI73LKmzKo2UDPmVgOoeFNiGdYmW7iKWZVS6BiPc1m-6jnecFd2vD3uCMmhYJFIk1Xm31TDffCHbHkFbPbukFA5WECv58aImzB44KOScHN__bMFT_T-pSCtJnL7lFqkTCojV19Mtk21sGU-OO54JkzoVf2r5c-48S7QXmXIHJB3LQNbUeA/41g/0ciVBAeySG6h1BgqvhSZhA/h0/FKolh8fcyLixYMSKrkvN-OAqyE64JiPicnsJkdSbtuk)

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: Why I do what I do
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| No one should ever have to worry about affording health care.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=1569%2E35263%2E2jZsC7)
Peter, something you might not know about me is that I was diagnosed with a serious illness as a child. Fortunately, after spending three months in the hospital, I was able to recover. After I got better, my grandparents, who raised me, began to search for an insurance policy to make sure I was protected in case I ever got sick again. But they couldn’t find one. At any price. From any insurer. All because of my previous illness, and these two words: _**“pre-existing condition.”**_ **I got into public service because I watched my grandparents make enormous sacrifices to pay for my health care out of pocket.** I’ll never forget what it was like to watch them stay up late at night, worrying that if I fell ill again, they wouldn’t be able to afford the care to help me get better. No one should ever have to worry about things like that. But I know that I’m not alone in this experience. 133 million Americans know what it's like to live with the label "pre-existing condition" attached to our care — and before the _Affordable Care Act_ was passed, many of us could be denied coverage for that exact reason. Today, insurance companies can no longer discriminate against someone based on their pre-existing condition. I championed health reform and fought to allow young people to stay on their parent’s insurance plan up to age 26. **These policy changes have helped millions more Americans access the care they need.** But our work is far from over, Peter. As Republicans launch attacks on our health care and threaten protections for people like me with pre-existing conditions, it’s more important than ever that we defend Wisconsin and our Democratic majority in the Senate. If Mitch McConnell and the GOP’s potential hand-picked megamillionaire challenger takes back the Senate, they could drag our country back to a time when insurance companies have the power to do whatever they want. **[I’ll never stop fighting to defend accessible health care, but I can’t do this work alone. Will you make a contribution to help me defend our Senate majority and prevent Republicans from rolling back our hard-earned progress?](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-nov23.TOAtRC&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20231120_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=1569%2E35263%2E2jZsC7)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2150?c0=tbe-em-nov23.gM21RB&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20231120_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=1569%2E35263%2E2jZsC7)
